sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
The mighty God is Jesus, The Prince of peace is He,
The everlasting Father, The King eternally,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
The wonderful in wisdom By whom all things were made;
The fulness of the Godhead In Jesus is display’d.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
It’s all in Him, it’s all in Him,
The fulness of the Godhead is all in Him;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
It’s all in Him, it’s all in Him,
The mighty God is Jesus, and it’s all in Him.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Emmanuel, God with us,Jehovah, Lord of hosts!
The coming present Spirit,Who fills the universe,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
The Advocate, the High Priest,The Lamb for sinners slain,
The Author of redemption;O glory to His name!

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
The Alpha and Omega,Beginning and the end,
The Living Word incarnate,The helpless sinner’s Friend,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Our wisdom and perfection,Our righteousness and pow’r,
Yes, all we need in Jesus We find this very our.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
“Our God from whom we’ve waited” Will be the glad refrain
If Israel recreated, When Jesus comes gain;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Lo! He will come and save us, Our King and Priest to be,
For in Him dwells all fulness, And Lord of all is He.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
A mansion is waiting in glory,
My Savior has gone to prepare;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
The ransomed who shine in its beauty,
Will dwell in that city so fair.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Oh, home above,
I’m going to dwell in that home;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Oh, home of love,
Get ready, poor sinner, and come.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
A mansion of rest for the weary,
Who toil in the vineyard of love;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
O sinner, believe, and be ready
To enter that mansion above.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
A mansion where heavenly music
Enraptures the glorified throng;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
They’re singing salvation, O sinner,
Come, join in that beautiful song.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
A mansion where angels are waiting
To welcome the holy and true,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
And when to the Savior low kneeling,
They’ll sing a sweet anthem for you.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
A mansion unclouded by sorrow,
Undimmed by the pains of farewell,

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Where all of earth’s pilgrims will gather,
With Christ in His glory to dwell.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
And can it be that I should gain
An interest in the Saviour’s blood?

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Died He for me, who caused His pain?
For me, who Him to death pursued?

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
He left His Father’s throne above,
So free, so infinite His grace;

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Emptied Himself of all but love,
And bled for Adam’s helpless race.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
‘Tis mercy all, immense and free;
For, O my God, it found out me.

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Amazing love! how can it be
That Thou, my God, shouldst die for me?

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
Long my imprisoned spirit lay
Fast bound in sin and nature’s night;

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
Thine eye diffused a quickening ray,
I woke, the dungeon flamed with light;

sections.label: Verse 15
sections.text:
My chains fell off, my heart was free;
I rose, went forth, and followed Thee.

sections.label: Verse 16
sections.text:
Amazing love! how can it be
That Thou, my God, shouldst die for me?

sections.label: Verse 17
sections.text:
No condemnation now I dread;
Jesus, and all in Him, is mine!

sections.label: Verse 18
sections.text:
Alive in Him, my living Head,
And clothed in righteousness divine,

sections.label: Verse 19
sections.text:
Bold I approach the eternal throne,
And claim the crown, through Christ my own.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Amazing love! how can it be
That Thou, my God, shouldst die for me?

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
"All things are ready" come to the feast!
Come for the table now is spread;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Ye famishing, ye weary come,
And thou shalt be richly fed.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Hear the invitation, Come whosoever will
Praise God for full salvation

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text: For "whosoever will"

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
"All things are ready" come to the feast!
Come for the door is open wide;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
A place of honour is reserved 
For you at the master's side.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
"All things are ready" come to the feast!
Come, while He waits to welcome Thee;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Delay not while this day is thine,
Tomorrow may never be.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
"All things are ready" come to the feast!
Leave ev'ry care and worldly strife;

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Come, feast up on the love of God,
And drink everlasting life.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Appartiens-tu à l’Epouse De Jésus, notre Seigneur?
Sera-ce pour toi un jour de joie

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Maranatha, Alléluia! (x3)
Jésus vient, et Son festin est preparé.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Pour celà pourrais-tu rénoncer au Monde et ses plaisirs?
Marches-tu dans la lumière, Es-tu prêt pour l’acceuillir?

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
L’état mondial nous révèle aussi Que Jésus vient bientôt.
Lorsque tout va s’accomplir, Ta délivrance viendra d’en haut.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Que mon Coeur attend ce règne Sans mort et sans destruction.
Passées seront les choses anciennes: C’est une nouvelle creation.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Maranatha, Alléluia! (x3)
Jésus vient, et Son festin est preparé.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Alas! And did my Saviour bleed,
 And did my Sovereign die?

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Would He devote that sacred head 
For such a worm as I?

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Well might the sun in darkness hide, 
And shut his glories in,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
When Christ, the mighty Maker, 
died For man, the creature’s sin.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
But drops of grief can ne’er repay 
The debt of love I owe;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Here, Lord, I give myself away,
 “Tis all that I can do!

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
At the cross, at the cross where I first saw the light,
And the burden of my heart rolled away

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
It was there by faith I received my sight,
And now I am happy all the day!

sections.label: Verse 99
sections.text: AT CALVARY

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Years I spent in vanity and pride,
Caring not my Lord was crucified,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Knowing not it was for me He died 
on Calvary

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Mercy there was great and grace was free, 
Pardon there was multiplied to me,

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
There my burdened soul found liberty, 
at Calvary.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
By God’s Word at last my sin I learned; 
Then I trembled at the law I’d spurned,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Till my guilty soul imploring turned 
to Calvary.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Now I’ve given to Jesus every thing, 
Now I gladly own Him as my King,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Now my raptured soul can only sing 
of Calvary.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
O the love that drew salvation’s plan! 
O the grace that brought it down to man!

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
On the mighty gulf that God did span 
at Calvary!

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Have you been to Jesus For the cleansing pow’r?
Are you washed in the blood of the Lamb?

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Are you fully trusting In His grace this hour?
Are you washed in the blood of the Lamb?

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Are you walking daily By the Saviour’s side?
Are you washed in the blood of the Lamb?

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Do you rest each moment In the Crucified?
Are you washed in the blood of the Lamb?

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
When the Bridegroom cometh, 
Will your robes be white,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Pure and white in the blood of the Lamb?
Will your soul be ready

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Lay aside the garments That are stained with sin,
And be washed in the blood of the Lamb?

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
There’s a fountain Flowing for the soul unclean,
Oh, be washed in the blood of the Lamb.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Are your garments spotless? 
Are they white as snow?

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Are your garments spotless? Are they white as snow?
Are you washed in the blood of the Lamb?

title: BACK TO THE BLESSED OLD BIBLE

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Back to the blessed old Bible,
Back to the city of God,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Back to the oneness of heaven,
Back where the faithful have trod.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Back from the land of confusion,
Passing the wrecks and the creeds;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Back to the light of the morning,
Jesus our Captain leads.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Back to the blessed old Bible,
Back to the light of its word:

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Be on our banners forever, 
Holiness unto the Lord"

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Back to the blessed old Bible,
Saints of Jehovah, rejoice;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Jesus is calling his people 
Back to the land of their choice

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
often our fathers have sought it
While we in Babel a bode,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Now we have found the fair city
Church of the living God.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Back to the blessed old Bible,
Leaving confusion and strife;

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Fleeing from Babel to Zion,
Back to the joy of our life.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Over the mountains we wandered,
Looking in vain for the right;

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Now in the evening we've found it,
Truth of the gospel light.

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
Back to the blessed old Bible,
back to the Master's call

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
Back to the words of our savior,
Loving, Obeying them all.

sections.label: Verse 15
sections.text:
Never in sects to be scattered,
Never again to do wrong;

sections.label: Verse 16
sections.text:
Unity, holiness, heaven,
Ever shall be our Song.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Have you been baptized into the Body?
Baptized with the Holy Ghost;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
There is but one way to enter in it,
Just as they did on Pentecost.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
There is but one Church, Bride or Body,
And into it we’re all baptized;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
By the one, true promised Holy Spirit;
Tho’ by the world we’re all despised.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Ev’ry creed has claim’d to be the Body,
But the “plumb-line” proved untrue;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
All their dreams, for God has so determined,
To bring His Son’s true Bride to view.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
When the Word of God was opened to them,
They entered in, and yet there’s room.

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Those who died before the Holy Spirit
Came upon us from on high

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
May, by faith with Saints of old departed,
Arise to meet Him in the sky.

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
When the Bridegroom comes, will you be ready;
And your vessel all filled and bright?

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
You will be among the foolish virgins
If you do not walk in the light.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Are you in the Church triumphant?
Are you in the Savior’s Bride?

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Come and be baptized into the Body,
And forevermore abide.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Oh baragumu...Twambatane na Yesu...
Yesu ndiye njiya...
Yeye ndiye ukweli...Tena ndiye uzima...

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Usharati wawawe... Kulevika wawawe...
Mashimango wawawe.... Kujimpenta wawawe....

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Baragumu, baragumu inaliya
Baragumu ya uhuru(x2)

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Yo ile inalia, baragumu
Ya uhuru(x2)

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
[D]Blessed assurance, [A]Jesus is [D]mine!
O what a [D7]foretaste of [G]glory di[D]vine!
[D]Heir of sal[A]vation, pur[D]chase of God,
[D7]Born of His [G]Spirit, washed [A]in His [A7]blood.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
[D]This is my [G]story, this is my [D]song,
[D]Praising my [A]Savior [A7]all the day [D]long;
[D]This is my [G]story, this is my [D]song,
[D]Praising my [A7]Savior all the day [D]long.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
[D]Perfect sub[A]mission, per[D]fect delight,
[D7]Visions of [G]rapture now [D]burst on my sight;
[D]Angels des[A]cending, bring [D]from above,
[D7]Echoes of [G]mercy, whis[A]pers of [A7]love.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text: BOYA YESU

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Boya Yesu eh okomoka (x2)
Okomona makambo ekolandayo na sima (x2)

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Ndima Yesu eh okomona bisengo (x2)    
Okomona bisengo ekolandayo na sima (x2)

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Satana akimi nguya na Yaweh eh, 
Santana akimi nguya na Yaweh na Gologotha

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text: Eeeh na Gologotha, eeh na Gologotha

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Landa Yesu okomona bisengo 
Okomona bisengo ekolandayo na sima(x2)

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Sowing in the morning, 
sowing seeds of kindness,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Sowing in the noontide
 and the dewy eves;

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Waiting for the harvest 
and the time of reaping,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
We shall come rejoicing,
 bringing in the sheaves.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Bringing in the sheaves(x2),
We shall come rejoicing, bringing in the sheaves;

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Sowing in the sunshine,
 sowing in the shadows,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Fearing neither clouds
 nor winter’s chilling breeze;

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
By and by the harvest 
and the labor ended,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
We shall come rejoicing,
 bringing  in the sheaves.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Going forth with weeping,
 sowing for the Master,

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Though the loss sustained,
 our spirit often grieves;

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
When our weeping’s over,
 He will bid us welcome,

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
We shall come rejoicing,
 bringing in the sheaves.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Bwana unipeleke, Kule kwa Baba 
Kweni muji wa raha

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Mulango ni Yesu 
Tuta ishi naye  Kule mbinguni

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Oh! Oh! Haleluya (x2)
Mule ndani ya Yesu

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Muna raha ya ajabu 
Isiyo na muisho Kule Mbinguni

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Yerusalema mupia  Muji wa amani 
Una meremeta

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Una pambwa pambwa 
Kwa ajili yangu Kweli ni ajabu

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Siku ita kuja  Ile ya furaha 
Tuta rukaruka

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Tuta tsheza tsheza
Kweni barabara  Ile ya zahabu

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Cast your burdens unto Jesus
For He cares for you.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Higher, higher Higher, higher 
Lift Jesus higher.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Lower, lower Lower, lower
Stamp Satan lower.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Deeper, deeper Deeper, deeper
With Jesus deeper.

title: CE MONDE N'EST PAS CHEZ MOI

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Ce monde n’est pas chez moi,Je suis juste un passant
Et mes trésors s’entassent Quelque part là au ciel.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Les anges me font signe Dépuis la porte du ciel,
Et je ne me sens jamais Comme chez moi dans ce monde.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Seigneur tu sais, N’y a point d’amis comme Toi.
Si le ciel n’est pas chez moi Alors que ferais-je?

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Les anges me font signe Dépuis la porte du ciel
Et je ne me sens jamais Comme chez moi dans ce monde.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Tous sont à mon attente, C’est tout ce que je sais,
Y’a longtemps, avec Christ J’ai bien tout arrangé

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Bien que faible et pauvre, Je sais qu’il me soutient.
Et je ne me sens jamais Comme chez moi dans ce monde.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Dans le pays de gloire, Nous vivrons â jamais;
De tout côtés les saints Crient «victoire», dans des chants

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
De la plus douce louange Qui montrent dépuis le ciel
Et je ne me sens jamais Comme chez moi dans ce monde.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Celui qui est moi est plus fort 
Que celui qui est dans ce monde Allelouia!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Celui m'a sauve est plus fort 
Que celui qui est dans ce monde Allelouia!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Celui qui m'a gueri est plus fort 
Que celui qui est dans ce monde Allelouia!

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Celui qui vient bientot est plus fort 
Que celui qui est dans ce monde Allelouia!

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text: Allelouia!

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text: Il est la haut dans sa parole

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
La guerison est la dans sa parole
La nouvelle naissance...
La benediction...

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Cha kutumaini sina Ila damu yake Yesu
Sina wema wa kutosha Dhambi zangu kuziosha (x2)

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Kwake Yesu nasi mama 
Ndiye mwamba : ni salama (x2)

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Njia yangu iwe ndefu Yeye hunipa wokovu
Mawimbi yakinipiga Nguvu zake ndiye nanga (x2)

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Damu yake na sadaka Nategemea daima
Yote chini yakiisha Mwokozi atanitosha (x2)

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Nikiitwa hukumuni Rohoni nina amani
Nikivikwa haki yake Sinahofu mbele yake (x2)

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Thou, my everlasting portion, 
More than friend or life to me,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
All along my pilgrim journey, 
Saviour, let me walk with Thee,

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Close to Thee, close to Thee, 
Close to Thee, close to Thee;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
All along my pilgrim journey, 
Saviour, let me walk with Thee.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Not for ease or worldly pleasure, 
Nor for fame my prayer shall be;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Gladly will I toil and suffer, 
Only let me walk with Thee.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Close to Thee, close to Thee, 
Close to Thee, close to Thee,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Gladly will I toil and suffer, 
Only let me walk with Thee.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Lead me through the vale of shadows, 
Bear me o’er life’s fitful sea;

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Then the gate of life eternal 
May I enter, Lord, with Thee.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Close to Thee, close to Thee, 
Close to Thee, close to Thee,

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Then the gate of life eternal 
May I enter, Lord, with Thee.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Combattant, jusqu’á la mort
Je serai combattant jusqu’á la mort

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Fidele , jusqu’á la mort
Je serai fidele jusqu’á la mort

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Obeissant , jusqu’á la mort
Je serai obeissant jusqu’á la mort

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Chretien , jusqu’á la mort
Je serai Chretien

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Jesus has a table spread, 
Where the saints Of God are fed,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
He invites his chosen people, 
“Come and dine;” With his manna

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
The disciples came to land, Thus obeying Christ’s command,
For the Master called to them, “Come and dine;”

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
“Come and dine,”  The master calleth,
“Come and dine;” You may feast at Jesus’ table all the time;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
He who fed the multitude, Turned the water into wine, 
To the hungry calleth now, “Come and dine.”

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
There they found Their hearts’ desire, 
Bread and fish upon the fire Thus He satisfies The hungry all the time.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Soon the lamb will take his bride to
Be ever at his side,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
All the host of heaven will assembled be;
Oh, 'twill be a glorious sight,

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
All the saints in spotless white;
And with Jesus they will feast eternally.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Come to the Saviour, Make no delay;
Here in His word He’s shown us the way

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Here in our midst He’s standing today,
Tenderly saying “Come!”

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Joyful, Joyful Will the meeting be
When from sin Our hearts are pure and free;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
And we shall gather,Saviour, with Thee,
In our eternal home.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Suffer the children Oh hear his voice.
Let every heart Leap forth and rejoice

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
And let us freely Make Him our choice
Do not delay but come.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Think once again He’s with us today
Heed now His blest Commands, and obey

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Hear now His accents Tenderly say
Will you My children come?

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I’ve wandered far away from God,
Now I’m coming home;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
The paths of sin too long I’ve trod,
Lord, I’m coming home.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Coming home, coming home,
Nevermore to roam;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Open wide Thine arms of love,
Lord, I’m coming home.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
I’ve wasted many precious years, 
Now I’m coming home;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
I now repent with bitter tears,
Lord, I’m coming home.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
I’m tired of sin and straying, Lord,
Now I’m coming home;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
I’ll trust Thy love, believe Thy Word,
Lord, I’m coming home.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
My soul is sick, my heart is sore,
Now I’m coming home;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
My strength renew, my hope restore,
Lord, I’m coming home.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
My only hope, my only plea,
Now I’m coming home;

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
That Jesus died, and died for me,
Lord, I’m coming home.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
I need His cleansing blood, I know,
Now I’m coming home;

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
O wash me whiter than the snow,
Lord, I’m coming home.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Ecoute O ciel Et tout ce que tu as
Combien Jésus-Christ Est riche en bonté

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Et toi terre des hommes Et betailles de champs
Oh louez-Le car Il est bon.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Combien Il est bon (3x) 
Mon Seigneur, mon Dieu

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Combien Il est bon, Alléluia 
Oui, je Le louerai toujours.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Il nous a crées Pour la vie éternelle
Mais nous avons péché Et avons tout perdu

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Mais dans sa bonté Il se décida
De nous ramener à la vie.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Et comme un agneau Il vint ici bas
Il versa son sang Pour nous racheter

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Depuis ce jour-là Nous pouvons crier
Oh! mort où est ton aiguillon?

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Pareil à un aigle Il rode sur nous 
Et voit nos besoins Nul n’est en danger

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Et a chaque tour Il jette ce cris
Ne craignez rien car je suis là.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Et comme une poule Entoure ses poussins
Jésus nous entoure Et prend soin de nous

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
D’où viendra l’orage Qu’il ne saura calmer
Oui nous sommes plus-ce qu’en Sécurité

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Je loue et j’adore Mon Seigneur Jésus
Pour tout ce qu’il ne Cesse de faire pour moi

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Oh je ne puis compter Ses nombreux bienfaits
Oh combien je veux l’adorer.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Every promise in the book is mine,
Every chapter, every verse, every line,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Every blessing of his love divine
Every promise in the book is mine.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Encamped along the hills of light,
Ye christian soldiers rise

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
And press the battle ere
The night shall veil the glow skies

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Gainst the foe in vales below
Let all our strenght be hurled

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Faith is the victory
We know that over comes the world.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Faith is the victory! Faith is the victory!
Oh, glorious victory That overcomes the world

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
His banner over us is love,
Our sword the word of God;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
We tread the road the saints 
Above with shouts of triumph trod.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
By faith, they like a whirlwind's breath
Swept on O'er every field

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
The faith by which they conquered death
Is still our shinning shield.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
On every hand the foe we find
Drawn up in dread array;

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Let tents of ease be left behind
Onward to the fray.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Salvation's helmet on each head,
With truth all girt about,

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
The earth shall tremble heath
Our tread, and echo with our shout.

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
To him that overcomes the foe,
White raiment shall be giv'n

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
Before the angels, he shall know
His name confessed in heav'n.

sections.label: Verse 15
sections.text:
Then onward from the hills of light,
Our hearts with love a flame;

sections.label: Verse 16
sections.text:
We'll vanquish all the hosts of night,
In Jesus's conqu'ring name.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Face to face with Christ, my Saviour, 
Face to face what will it be?

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
When to face in all His glory,
 Jesus Christ who died for me.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Face to face I shall behold Him 
Far beyond the starry sky

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Face to face in all His glory, 
I shall see Him by and by!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Only faintly now, I see Him, 
With the darkling veil between,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
But a blessed day is coming, 
When His glory shall be seen.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
What rejoicing in His presence,
 When are banished grief and pain,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
When the crooked ways are straightened, 
And the dark things shall be plain.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Face to face! O blissful moment! 
Face to face to see and know:

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Face to face with my Redeemer, 
Jesus Christ Who loves me so.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
s we travel through the desert,
Storms beset us on the way;
But beyond the river Jordan lies
A field of endless days.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Farther on still go farther,
Count the mile-stones one by one,
Jesus will forsake you never
It is better farther on

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
h my brother are you weary
Of the roughness of the way?
Does your strenght begin to fail you
And your vigor to decay?

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
esus, Jesus will go with you,
He will lead you to the throne,
He who died His garments for you
And the wine-press trod alone.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
t my grave I'll still be singing 
Though you weep for one that's gone
Singing as we once did sing it,
It is better farther on.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Farther on still go farther,
Count the mile-stones one by one,
Jesus will forsake you never
It is better farther on
*

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
FEELING SO MUCH BETTER
TALKING ABOUT THIS GOOD OLD WAY,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
FEELING SO MUCH BETTER
TALKING ABOUT THE LORD.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
LET’S GO ON, LET’S GO ON 
TALKING ABOUT THIS GOOD OLD WAY,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
LET’S GO ON, LET’S GO ON 
TALKING ABOUT THE LORD .

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
THE DEVIL HE DON’T LIKE IT,
TALKING ABOUT THIS GOOD OLD WAY.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
THE DEVIL HE DON’T LIKE IT 
TALKING ABOUT THE LORD.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
SO, LET’S GO ON, LET’S GO ON 
TALKING ABOUT THIS GOOD OLD WAY.

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
LET’S GO ON, LET’S GO ON 
TALKING ABOUT THE LORD

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Let me walk, blessed Lord, in the way Thou hast gone, 
Leading straight to the land above;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Giving cheer every where, to the sad and the lone, 
Fill my way every day with love.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Fill my way every day with love, 
As I walk with the heavenly Dove;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Let me go all the while, with a song and a smile, 
Fill my way every day with love.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Keep me close to the side of my Savior and Guide, 
Let me never in darkness rove;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Keep my path free from wrath, and my soul satisfied,
Fill my way every day with love.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Fill my way every day with love, 
As I walk with the heavenly Dove;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Let me go all the while, with a song and a smile, 
Fill my way every day with love.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Soon the race will be o’er, 
and I’ll travel no more But abide in my home above; Let me sing,

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
blessed King, all the way to the shore,
Fill my way every day with love.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Fill my way every day with love, 
As I walk with the heavenly Dove;

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Let me go all the while, with a song and a smile, 
Fill my way every day with love.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Fire, fire, fire... fire fall on me
On the day of pentecost, fire fall on me

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
A friend of Jesus, O what bliss,
That one so vile as I

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Should ever have a friend like this
To lead me to the sky.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Friendship with Jesus,
Fellowship divine,

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
O what blessed, sweet communion,
Jesus is a friend of mine.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
A friend when friendships cease,
A friend when others fail,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
A friend who gives me joy and peace,
A friend when foes assail.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
A friend when sickness lays me low,
A friend when death draws near,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
A friend as through the vale I go,
A friend to help and cheer.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
A friend when life’s short race is o’er,
A friend when earth is past,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
A friend to meet on heaven’s shore,
A friend when home at last.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Give me oil in my lamp, keep me burning.
Give me oil in my lamp, I pray.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Give me oil in my lamp, keep my burning,
Keep me burning till the dawn of day.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text: Give me joy in my heart, keep me singing…

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text: Give me peace in my heart, keep me resting…

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text: Give me love in my heart, keep me serving…

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Sing hosanna, sing hosanna,
Sing hosanna to the King of kings.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Give me that old-time religion (3x)
It's good enough for me.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
It was good for our mothers (3x)
And it's good enough for me.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
It has served our fathers (3x)
And it's good enough for me.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Makes me love everybody (3x)
And it's good enough for me.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
It will take us to heaven (3x)
And it's good enough for me.

title: GOD IS GOOD HES SO GOOD

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
God is good He has done me well !
Oh, my soul, rise up and Praise the Lord!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
God is good He has made me glad !
Oh, my soul, rise up and Praise the Lord!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
God is good He has set me free !
Oh, my soul, rise up and Praise the Lord!

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
God is good He has blessed me !
Oh, my soul, rise up and Praise the Lord!

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Marvelous grace of our loving Lord,
Grace that exceeds our sin and our guilt!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Yonder on Calvary’s mount outpoured,
There where the blood of the Lamb was spilled.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Grace, grace, God’s grace,
Grace that will pardon and cleanse within;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Grace, grace, God’s grace,
Grace that is greater than all our sin!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Sin and despair, like the sea waves cold,
Threaten the soul with infinite loss;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Grace that is greater, yes, grace untold,
Points to the refuge, the mighty cross.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Dark is the stain that we cannot hide;
What can we do to wash it away?

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Look! There is flowing a crimson tide,
Brighter than snow you may be today.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Marvelous, infinite, matchless grace,
Freely bestowed on all who believe!

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
You that are longing to see His face,
Will you this moment His grace receive?

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Oh happy day, that fixed my choice 
On Thee, my Saviour and my God!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Well may this glowing heart rejoice, 
And tell its raptures all abroad.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Oh happy day,  Oh happy day, 
When Jesus washed my sins away!
He taught me how to watch and pray,

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
And live rejoicing every day,
Happy day,  Oh happy day, 
When Jesus washed my sins away!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Oh happy bond, that seals my vows 
To Him who merits all my love!

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Let cheerful anthems fill His house, 
While to that sacred shrine I move

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
“Tis done; the great transaction’s done! 
I am my Lord’s and He is mine;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
He drew me, and I followed on, 
Charmed to confess the voice divine.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I’M REJOICING NIGHT AND DAY, AS I WALK THE PILGRIM WAY,
FOR THE HAND OF GOD IN ALL MY LIFE I SEE,

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
AND  THE REASON OF MY BLISS, YES, THE SECRET ALL IS THIS;
THAT THE COMFORTER ABIDES WITH ME.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
HE ABIDES,HE ABIDES, HALLELUJAH, HE ABIDES WITH ME!
I’M REJOICING NIGHT AND DAY, AS I WALK THE NARROW WAY,

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text: FOR THE COMFORTER ABIDES WITH ME.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
ONCE MY HEART WAS FULL OF SIN, ONCE I HAD NO PEACE WITHIN,
TILL I HEARD HOW JESUS DIED UPON THE TREE; THEN I FELL DOWN AT

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
HIS FEET, AND THERE CAME A PEACE SO SWEET, 
NOW THE COMFORTER ABIDES WITH ME.

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
HE IS WITH ME EVERY  WHERE, AND HE KNOWS MY EVERY CARE,
I’M AS HAPPY AS A BIRD AND JUST AS FREE; FOR THE SPIRIT HAS

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
CONTROL, JESUS SATISFIES MY SOUL,
SINCE THE COMFORTER ABIDES WITH ME!

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
THERE’S NO THIRSTING FOR THE THINGS OF THE WORLD, 
THEY’VE TAKEN WINGS; LONG AGO I GAVE THEM UP, AND INSTANTLY

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
ALL MY NIGHT WAS TURNED TO DAY, ALL MY BURDENS ROLLED AWAY,
NOW THE COMFORTER ABIDES WITH ME!

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
HE ABIDES,HE ABIDES, HALLELUJAH, HE ABIDES WITH ME!
I’M REJOICING NIGHT AND DAY, AS I WALK THE NARROW WAY,

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text: FOR THE COMFORTER ABIDES WITH ME.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
My heart was distressed ‘neath Jehovah’s dread frown,
And low in the pit where my sins dragged me down;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
I cried to the Lord from the deep miry clay,
Who tenderly brought me out to golden day.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
He brought me out of the miry clays,
He set my feet on the Rock to stay;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
He puts a song in my soul today,
A song of praise, Hallelujah!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
He placed me upon the strong Rock by His side,
My steps were established and here I’ll abide;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
No danger of falling while here I remain,
But stand by His grace until the crown I gain,

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
He gave me a song, ‘twas a new song of praise,
By day and by night its sweet notes I will raise;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
My heart’s overflowing; I’m happy and free,
I’ll praise my Redeemer, who has rescued me.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
I’ll sing of his wonderful mercy to me,
I’ll praise him till all men his goodness shall see;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
I’ll sing of salvation at home and abroad, 
Till many shall hear the truth and trust in God.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
There is constant joy abiding
In Christ my Lord and King;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Of His love that passeth knowledge
My heart and tongue shall sing.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
He is all in all to me,
And my song of songs shall be,

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Hallelujah, O my Saviour,
I am trusting only thee.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
When my path is veiled in shadows,
And clouds above me roll,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
I can smile amid the tempest,
His glory fills my soul.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
I can see is bow of promise
Through tears and trials deep;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
I can hear His voice like music,
That lulls my care to sleep.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
I shall yet behold and praise Him,
And dwell in perfect peace

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
In the golden land wave of beauty,
Where cloud and wave shall cease.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text: e leadeth me O blessed thought O words With heav’nly comfort fraught whate’er I do, Where’er I be still tis God’s hand that leadeth me.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
He leadeth me, He leadeth me
By His own hand He leadeth me
His faithfull follower I would be
For by His hand He leadeth me

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
ometimes ‘mid scenes of deepest gloom
Sometimes where Eden’s bowers bloom
By waters still, o’er troubled sea
Still tis God’s hand that leadeth me

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
He leadeth me, He leadeth me
By his own hand He leadeth me
His faithfull follower I would be
For by His hand He leadeth me

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
ord, I would clasp Thy hand in mine
Nor ever murmur or repine
Content, whatever lot I see
Since ‘tis God’s hand that He leadeth me

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
He leadeth me, he leadeth me
By his own hand he leadeth me
His faithfull follower I would be
For by his hand he leadeth me

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text: nd when my task on earth is done when By Thy grace, the vict’ry’s won e’en death’s Cold wave I will not flee since God thro’ Jordan He leadeth me

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
He leadeth me, he leadeth me
By his own hand he leadeth me
His faithfull follower I would be
For by his hand he leadeth me
*

title: HE THE PEARLY GATES WILL OPEN

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Love divine, so great and wondrous, 
 Deep and mighty, pure, sublime,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Coming from the heart of Jesus. 
 Just the same through tests of time!

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
He the pearly gates will open,  
So that I may enter in;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
For He purchased my redemption  
And forgave me all my sin.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Like a dove when hunted, frightened. 
 As a wounded fawn was I;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Brokenhearted, yet He healed me. 
 He will heed the sinner's cry.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Love divine, so great and wondrous, 
 All my sins He then forgave;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
I will sing His praise forever, 
For His blood, His power to save.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
In life's eventide at twilight, 
 At His door I'll knock and wait;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
By the precious love of Jesus, 
 I shall enter heaven's gate.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
He’s everything, He’s everything to me; (x2)
For He’s my father, my mother,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
My sister and my brother,
He’s everything to me.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Heshima na sifa kwake Baba mbinguni,
Aliyetupenda Zamani na sasa.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Haleluya, usifiwe! Haleluya, Amina!
Haleluya, usifiwe! Haleluya, Amina!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Heshima na sifa Kwake Yesu mwokozi,
Alitukufia kwa ‘jili ya zambi.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Heshima na sifa Kwake Roho ya nuru,
Anashuhudia Mwokozi na damu.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Haleluya, usifiwe! Haleluya, Amina!
Haleluya, usifiwe! Haleluya, Amina!

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I’m pressing on the upward way,
New heights I’m gaining every day;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Still praying as I’m onward bound,
“Lord, plant my feet on higher ground”

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Lord, lift me up and let me stand, 
By faith, on heaven’s Table land,

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
A higher plane than I have found;
Lord, plant my feet on higher ground.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
My heart has no desire to stay 
Where doubts arise and fears dismay;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Though some may dwell where these abound,
My prayer, my aim, is higher ground.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
I long to scale the utmost height,
And catch a gleam of glory bright;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
But still I’ll pray till heav’n I’ve found,
“Lord, lead me on to higher ground”.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Watamwimbia Yesu (sifa aleluya)
Watamwimbia  Mwana kondoo wa Mungu

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text: Heri wenye kuitwa, Ku karamu ya Mwana Kondoo wa Mungu

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Watamuabudu Yesu (Alfa na Omega)
Watamuabudu Mwana Kondoo wa Mungu

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Wataishi na Yesu ( Milele, milele)
Wataishi na Mwana Kondoo wa Mungu

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text: Heri wenye kuitwa, Ku karamu ya Mwana Kondoo wa Mungu

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I came to Jesus, weary, worn, and sad,
He took my sins away, He took my sins away;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
And now His love has made my heart so glad,
He took my sins away.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
He took my sins away, He took my sins away,
And keeps me singing ev'ry day!

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
I'm so glad He took my sins away,
He took my sins away.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
The load of sin was more than I could bear,
He took them all away, He took them all away;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
And now on Him I roll my ev'ry care,
He took my sins away.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
No condemnation have I in my heart,
He took my sins away, He took my sins away;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
His perfect peace He did to me impart,
He took my sins away.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
If you will come to Jesus Christ today,
He'll take your sins away, He'll take your sins away;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
And keep you happy in His love each day,
He'll take your sins away.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
O my brother, do you know the Savior,
Who is wondrous, kind and true?

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
He’s the “Rock of your salvation!”
There’s Honey in the Rock for you.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Oh, there’s Honey in the Rock, my brother,
There’s Honey in the Rock for you;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Leave your sins for the blood to cover,
There’s Honey in the Rock for you.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Have you “tasted that the Lord is gracious?”
Do you walk in the way that’s new?

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Have you drank from the living Fountain?
There’s Honey in the Rock for you.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Do you pray unto God the Father,
“What wilt thou have me to do?”

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Never fear He will surely answer;
There’s Honey in the Rock for you.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Then go out through the streets and by ways,
Preach the word to the many or few;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Say to every fallen brother,
There’s Honey in the Rock for you.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
[G]O Lord my God, when I in [C]awesome wonder
[G]Consider all the worlds Thy [D]hands have made,
[G]I see the stars, I hear the [C]rolling thunder,
[G]Thy power through[D]out the universe dis[G]played.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
[G]Then sings my soul, my [C]Savior God to [G]Thee:
[G]How great Thou art, how [D]great Thou [D7]art!
[G]Then sings my soul, my [C]Savior God to [G]Thee:
[G]How great Thou [D]art, how great Thou [G]art!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
[G]When through the woods and [C]forest glades I [G]wander,
And [G]hear the birds sing [D]sweetly in the trees,
[G]When I look down from [C]lofty mountain [G]grandeur,
And [G]hear the brook and [D]feel the gentle [G]breeze.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
[G]And when I think that [C]God, His Son not [G]sparing,
[G]Sent Him to die, I [D]scarce can take it [D7]in;
[G]That on the cross, my [C]burden gladly [G]bearing,
[G]He bled and died to [D]take away my [G]sin.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I am resolved no longer to linger, 
Charmed by the world’s delight;

He is the true one, He is the just one,

do what He willeth, He is the living way.

sections.label: Verse 7

I am resolved to enter the kingdom,
Leaving the paths of sin;

Friends may oppose me, 
foes may beset me, Still will I enter in

sections.label: Verse 9

Come, friends, without delay,

Taught by the Bible, led by the Spirit,
We’ll walk the heavenly way.

My heavenly home is bright and fair,

Yes, I feel like traveling on,
I feel like traveling on;

C'est son vrai Nom, oui c'est son Nom!

Il suit avec amour

Nos faibles pas et dans sa grace,

Bientot achevant sa victoire,

I'll sing about my Saviour
 Every where I go, Oh (x3)

Gone from my heart the world and all its charms,
now through the blood,   I’m saved from all alarm

Once I was lost, and way down deep in sin;

 but now  I’m cleansed from ev’ry stain thro’ Jesus blood.

Once I was  bound, but now I am set free;
 Once I was blind, but now the  light

I see; Once I was dead, but now in Christ I live;

title: I KNOW MY LORD WILL MAKE A WAY
I KNOW THAT MY REDEEMER LIVETH

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I know that my Reedemer liveth,
And on the earth again shall stand;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
I know eternal life He giveth,
That grace and pow'r are in His hand.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
I know, I know that Jesus liveth
And on the earth again shall stand

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
I know, I know that life He giveth
That grace and pow'r are in His hand.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
I know His promise never failleth
The word He speaks, it cannot die;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Tho' cruel death my flesh assailleth,
Yet I shall see Him by and by.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
I know my mansion He prepareth,
That where He is there I may be

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
O wondrous tho't for me He careth
And He at last will come for me.

sections.text:
I know not why God’s wondrous grace
To me He hath made known,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Nor why, unworthy, as I am
He claimed me for His own.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
But “I know whom I have believed,
And am persuaded that He is able

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
To keep that which I’ve committed
Unto Him against that day.”

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
I know not how His saving faith
To me He did impart,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Or how believing in His Word
Wrought peace within my heart.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
I know not how the Spirit moves,
Convincing men of sin,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Revealing Jesus through the Word,
Creating faith in Him.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
I know not what of good or ill
May be reserved for me,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Of weary ways or golden days,
Before His face I see.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
I know not when my Lord may come,
I know not how nor where,

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
If shall pass the vale of death,
Or “meet Him in the air,”

WE HAVE THE VICTORY

title: IN THE SWEET BY AND BY

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
There’s a land that is fairer than day,
And by faith we can see it afar;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
For the Father waits over the way,
To prepare us a dwelling place there.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
In the sweet by and by,
We shall meet on that beautiful shore;

sections.text:

The melodious songs of the blest,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:

Not a sigh for the blessing of rest.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
To our bountiful Father above,
We will offer the tribute of praise,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
For the glorious gift of His love,
And the blessings that hallow our days.

near where'er my path may be.

hen with the
