sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Hear the Saviour’s earnest call,
Jesus, the light of the world;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Send the Gospel truth to all,
Jesus, the light of the world.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Why not seek Him then today,
Jesus, the light of the world;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Go with truth the narrow way,
Jesus, the light of the world.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Come, confess Him as your King.
Jesus, the light of the world;

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Then the bells of heaven will ring,
Jesus, the light of the world.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
We’ll walk in the light, beautiful light,
Come where the dewdrops of mercy are bright;

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Shine all around us by day and by night,
Jesus, the light of the world.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
We’ll walk in the light, beautiful light,
Come where the dewdrops of mercy are bright;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Shine all around us by day and by night,
Jesus, the light of the world.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
O weary pilgrim, lift your head!
For joy cometh in the morning;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
For God in his own word has said
That joy cometh in the morning

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Joy cometh in the morning,
Joy cometh in the morning;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Weeping may endure, may endure for a night,
But joy cometh in the morning.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Ye feeble saints, dismiss your fears,
For joy cometh in the morning;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
And weeping mourners, dry your tears,
For joy cometh in the morning.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Let ev'ry tearful eye look up,
For joy cometh in the morning;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
And ev'ry trembling sinner hope,
For joy cometh in the morning.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Our God shall wipe our tears away,
For joy cometh in the morning;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Sorrow and sighing cannot stay,
For joy cometh in the morning.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Joy to the world! the Lord has come;
Let earth receive her King.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Let every heart prepare Him room,
And heaven and nature sing,

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
And heaven and nature sing,
And heaven, and heaven and nature sing!

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Joy to the earth! the Saviour reigns;
Your sweetest songs employ.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
While fields and streams and hills and plains
Repeat the sounding joy,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Repeat the sounding joy,
Repeat, repeat the sounding joy!

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
He rules the world with truth and grace,
And makes the nations prove

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
The glories of His righteousness,
The wonders of His love,

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
The wonders of His love,
The wonders, the wonders of His love.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I have found his grace is all complete,
He suplieth ev'ry need;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
While I sit and learn at Jesus feet,
I am free, Yes, free indeed;

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
It is joy unspeakable and full of Glory
Full of glory, full of glory

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
It is joy unspeakable and full of Glory
Oh, the half has never yet been told.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
I have found the pleasure I once craved,
It is joy and peace within.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
What a wondrous blessing! I am saved
From the awful gulf of sin.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
I have found that hope so bright and clear,
Living in the realm of grace;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Oh, the savior's presence is so near,
I can see his smiling face.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
I have found the joy no tongue can tell,
How its waves of glory roll

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
It is like a great o'er flowing well,
Springing up within my soul.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Yesu Kristo asifiwe! Alizichukua dhambi,
 ne'ma inatoka kwake kati' damu.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Umeosha moyo wako, umekuwa safi,
 huru umeondolewa dhambi kati' damu?

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text: :/: Kati' damu:/: umeosha moyo wako, umekuwa safi, huru?

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text: :/: Kati' damu:/: umeondolewa dhambi kati' damu?

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Ukilia, ukijuta, dhambi hazitoki kwamwe;
 haki kweli uta'pata kati damu.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Mambo yakusumbuayo Yesu a'ondoa mara,
unapata ukombozi kati' damu.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Yesu atakuchukua arusini mwake huko. 
Umevikwa nguo safi kati' damu?

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Je, wajenga ju' ya mwamba, moyo wako u mzima,
 unashinda kila saa kati' damu?

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Bwana Yesu asifiwe! Alitoa damu yake, 
na kwa damu ya thamani tutashinda.

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Asubuhi kubwa ile vita itakapokwisha, 
tutaimba kwa furaha ju' ya damu.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Kwetu ku di momwa mūlu, Mo mwikele Yesu
Ne bonso ba kwitabija E mo ba ka fika.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Yelusalema wa ndoe, Bamo ba pwa kala,
Ku fika bwabo bukila Bwa obe munonga.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Abo ba pwa ku funduka, Bendele kwa Leza,
Ne ku lumbuluka biya Kokwa ku tabuke.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Shi mobo etu a ngitu A bole mu lufu,
Tu di ne mobo a nyeke A mwa Yesu mūlu.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Aye we tu fwila batwe. We toije mashi.
U ke tu lubula kokwa, Kwikalako nandji.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text: Ki nini kitanitenga

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text: Akuna kia kunitenga na yesu wangu

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text: Tshinganyi tshia npandulula

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text: Kakuena tshia npandulula ni yesu wanyi

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Saviour lead me lest I stray
Gently lead me all the way

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
I am safe when by Thy side, 
I would in Thy love abide.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Lead me, lead me, 
Saviour lead me lest I stray

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Gently down the stream of time
Lead me Saviour all the way.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Thou the refuge of my soul
When life's stormy billows roll

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
I am safe when Thou art nigh
All my hopes on Thee rely.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Saviour lead me till  at last
When the storm of life is past

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
I shall reach the land of day
Where all tears are wiped away.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Le Dieu Puissant c’est Jésus, C’est le Prince de Paix.
Le Père de l’Eternité, Et le Roi de Bonté.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Le Merveilleux en sagesse, Par qui toute chose est faite,
La plenitude divine En Jésus incarnée.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Tout est en Lui, tout est en Lui,
La plenitude divine est toute en Lui;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Tout est en Lui, tout est en Lui,
Jésus est Dieu Tout-Puissant Et tout est en Lui.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Emmanuel: Dieu avec nous, Jéhovah l’Eternel.
L’Esprit tout Omniprésent Qui rempli l’univers.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Le Grand Sacrificateur Et l’Agneau des pécheurs. 
L’Auteur de la Rédemption Que béni soit Son Nom!

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Le commencement et la fin, L’Alpha et l’Omega.
La vraie Parole incarnée. L’Amie des rachetés.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
La sagesse et Perfection, La justice et Puissance.
Et tout ce dont j’ai besoin, Je le trouve en sa main.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Le Dieu que nous attendons Sera la gaie chanson
De l’Israël revenu Quand paraîtra Jésus

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Il viendra pour délivrer Notre Agneau immolé
La plénitude est en lui Le vainqueur de la nuit.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text: Le feu divin brûle dans mon Coeur (4x)

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text: J'aime Jésus de tout mon coeur     (4x)

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text: Mon coeur Le loue avec ferveur     (4x)

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text: Alleluia! Gloire à son Nom              (4x)

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text: Jésus revient pour me chercher     (4x)

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text: Oh! reçois-Le de tout ton Coeur     (4x)

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text: Je Le reçois avec bonheur!            (4x)

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
L’ETERNEL EST MON BERGER,
JE NE MANQUERAI DE RIEN.(x2)

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
OH…OH…OH…ALLELUIA (x3)
 AMEN!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
JESUS-CHRIST EST MON SAUVEUR
JE NE MANQUERAI DE RIEN.(x2)

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
JESUS-CHRIST EST MON ROCHER
JE NE MANQUERAI DE RIEN.(x2)

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Let’s talk about Jesus,
The King of kings is He,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
The Lord of lords, Supreme
Throughout Eternity;

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
The great I AM, the Way,
The Truth, the Life, the Door;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Let’s talk about Jesus
More and more.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Let’s talk about Jesus,
Let all the world proclaim.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
The pow’r and majesty,
Of such a wondrous name,

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
The babe of Bethlehem,
The bright and morning star,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text: Let’s sing his praises near and far.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Let’s talk about Jesus,
The bread of life is He,

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
The Saviour of the world,
The man of Galilee.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
The Prophet, Priest and King,
The mighty God is He,

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text: The well of living water free.

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
Let’s talk about Jesus
The prince of peace is He,

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
The great physician too,
Down through all history,

sections.label: Verse 15
sections.text:
The lily pure and white,
The rose of sharon fair,

sections.label: Verse 16
sections.text: The sherperd of such tender care.

sections.label: Verse 17
sections.text:
Let’s talk about Jesus,
The rock of ages He,

sections.label: Verse 18
sections.text:
The lamb for sinners slain,
That man of calvary,

sections.label: Verse 19
sections.text:
The Great Emmanuel,
The word of God sublime,

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I’ve found a friend in Jesus, He’s everything to me. 
He’s the fairest of ten thousand to my soul;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
The Lily of  the Valley in Him alone I see, 
All I need to cleanse and make me fully whole,

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
In sorrow He’s my comfort, In trouble He’s my stay,  
He tells me every care on Him to roll.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
He all my griefs has taken, 
And all my sorrows borne;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
In temptation He’s my strong 
And mighty tow’r;

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
I have all for Him forsaken, 
And all my idols torn

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
From my heart, and now  He keeps me by His power.
Though all the world forsake me,

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
And Satan tempt me sore, 
Through Jesus I shall safely reach the goal.

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
He’ll never, never leave me, 
Nor yet forsake me here,

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
While I live by faith and do His blessed will; 
A wall of fire about me, I’ve nothing now to fear;

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text: With His manna He my hungry soul shall fill.

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
Then sweeping up to glory,  We’ll see His blessed face, 
Where rivers of delight shall ever roll.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Hallelujah! He’s the Lily of the Valley, 
The  Bright and Morning Star, 
He’s the fairest of ten thousand to my soul.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Lord, dismiss us with Thy blessing;
Thanks for mercies past receive;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Pardon all, their faults confessing;
Time that’s lost may all retrieve:

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
May Thy children, May Thy children
Ne’er again Thy Spirit grieve.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Let thy Father-hand be shielding
All who here shall meet no more;

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
May their seed-time past be yielding
Year by year a richer store;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Those returning, Those returning
Make more faithful than before.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Bless Thou all our days of leisure,
Help us selfish lures to flee;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Sanctify out every pleasure;
Pure and blameless may it be;

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
May our gladness, May our gladness
Draw us evermore to Thee.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
was sinking deep in sin,
Far from the peaceful shore,
Very deeply stained within,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Sinking to rise no more;
But the Master of the sea
Heard my despairing cry,
From the waters lifted me,
Now safe am I.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Love lifted me! 
Love lifted me!
When nothing else could help, love lifted me.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
ll my heart to Him I give,
Ever to Him I’ll cling, 
In His blessed presence live,
Ever His praises sing,

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Love so mighty and so true 
Merits my soul’s best songs; 
Faithful, loving service, too, 
To Him belongs.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
ouls in danger, look above,
Jesus completely saves;
He will lift you by His love
Out of the angry waves,

sections.label: Verse 7
Verse 8
sections.text:
Love lifted me! 
Love lifted me!
When nothing else could help, love lifted me.
*

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Louez soit l'Eternel
Alléluia x2

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Louez Dieu du haut des cieux. Alléluia
Louez-Le dans les hauteurs. Alléluia

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Louez-Le vous tous les Anges. Alléluia
Louez-Le tout l’univers. Alléluia

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Louez tous le nom de Dieu. Alléluia
Sa parole a tout créé. Alléluia

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
C’est sa loi qu’il nous donne. Alléluia
Pour toujours et à jamais. Alléluia

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Louez tous le nom de Dieu. Alléluia
Car le nom est le seul grand. Alléluia

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
La grandeur du Seigneur Dieu. Alléluia
Il rend fort son peuple élu. Alléluia

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Fait la joie de tous ses saints. Alléluia
Louez Dieu du haut des cieux. Alléluia

title: LOUEZ LETERNEL CAR IL EST BON

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Louez l’Éternel oh oui car Il est bon
Sa miséricorde durera toujours.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
C’est Lui qui rachète l’âme du pécheur
Jamais Il ne le laisse seul et sans secours.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text: Louez l’Éternel car Il est bon (4×)

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
De tous les pays sur la face de la terre
Le Seigneur attire à la gloire de Son Nom

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Des hommes et des femmes autrefois révoltés
Oui mais qu’aujourd’hui implorent Son pardon.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Pour tant de merveilles, pour tant de faveurs,
Pour avoir donné Son Sang sur le Calvaire,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Pour avoir rompu les liens même de la mort,
Pour avoir brisé les forces de l’enfer.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Il a eu pitié de l’âme languissante,
En ouvrant la source au milieu du désert.

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Délivrant le cœur de l’homme chancelant
Lui donnant la vie pour l’Éternité.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Oui qu’on le célèbre là dans l’assemblée
Au milieu des cris de joie, d’adoration,

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Que toute la terre, que tout l’univers
Lui chante Sa gloire pour Ses compassions.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Sainte délivrance pour tous ses élus,
Car Il manifeste pour eux toute Sa puissance

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Pendant que le monde ignore Sa venue
L’Épouse L’attend remplie d’assurance.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Oh magnify the Lord for 
He's worthy to be praised (x3)

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Hosanna, Blessed be the Lord (x2)
Of my salvation.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text: OH MAGNIFY THE LORD

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Maisha mafupi ya huku dunia 
Yanayofanana safari chomboni.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Twapita bahari katika hatari, 
Lakini Mwokozi anatuongoza.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Ikiwa Mwokozi anatuongoza 
Twaweza kuona amani na raha,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Atatufikisha salama mbinguni, 
Na humo hatutakumbuka safari.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Ingawa mawimbi yapiga kwa nguvu, 
Tunakaribia bandari upesi,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Na humo hakuna dhoruba na pepo; 
Safari tutaimaliza salama.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Tutakapofika bandari ya mbingu 
Tutamshukuru Mwokozi mkuu.

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Hatutaziona hatari na hofu 
Karibu na Yesu mwenyewe mbinguni.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Ikiwa Mwokozi anatuongoza 
Twaweza kuona amani na raha,

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Atatufikisha salama mbinguni, 
Na humo hatutakumbuka safari.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Nasimama mlima Nebo, nakabili kanani
Nchi nzuri ni nzuri mno, natamani kufika

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Ni nchi yenye neema, na amani popote, miti yote, 
ni nzuri mno, yazaa siku zote.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text: Nikivuka yordani, atanikaribisha, kwenye mji wa thamani, mji yerusalemi.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Natoka mbali mbali jangwani, na shida nyingi ni-lipata, 
karibu ni-tapumzika, natamani kwetu.

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Upepo nzuri, Maji mazuri, bwana mwenyewe ni mwa- nga kule, 
nifuraha, siku zote, nitafika lini.

sections.label: Chorus 3
sections.text:
Takaa naye pasipo kufa, milele kule na ma- laika, 
nitaimba nitaimba, nimefika kwetu.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Là m’attend un joyeux lendemain,
Où portes perlées s’ouvrent large,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
La vallée de peines traversée,
De l’autre côté je camperai.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Un jour, hors de la portée des mortels,
Un jour, Dieu seul sait juste où et quand,

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Les roues de la vie mortelle s’arrêteront
Et j’irai habiter au mont Sion.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Un jour, j’entendrai chanter les anges,
Là, loin des ombres de la tombe;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Toutes les cloches du Ciel sonneront,
Quand les Saints chantent.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Un jour, je n’aurai plus de labeurs,
Mes errances seront finies,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Terrestres liens brisés, rétablis,
Mes soupirs et pleurs cesseront.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Les nuages sombres se fendront,
Et la nuit obscure passera;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Tous les fardeaux de la vie ôtés,
Et poindra le jour de repos

sections.label: Verse
sections.text: Mungu mtakatifu (x4)

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Umeumba vyote (Umeumba vyote) 
Mbingu na dunia (Mbingu na dunia)

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Twaona milima, (Twaona mabonde),  
Twaona bahari, (Twaona na mito)

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Aksanti Baba, (Akstanti Baba),  
Utukufu wako, (Umejaa na sifa).

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text: MUNGU MTAKATIFU

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
My sins were higher than the mountain,
When the Lord sanctified me.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Singing Glory Hallelujah 
When the fire came down, (x3)

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Singing Glory Hallelujah 
When the fire came down,
Since the Lord sanctified me.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
My joy is flowing like a fountain,
Since the Lord sanctified me.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
My peace is flowing like a fountain,
Since the Lord sanctified me.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
My sheep know My voice, 
And the path that I take,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
They follow wherever I go;
My sheep know My voice

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
And come at My call,
But a stranger’s voice do they not know.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
My sheep know My voice,
And day by day,

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
They abide in the fold,
And go not astray;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
They love Me because
I have made them My choice,

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
And they follow My call,
For My sheep know My voice.

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
My sheep know My voice,
And the pastures of green,

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Where I lead them so often to feed;
My sheep know My voice,

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
And the cool sparkling stream,
Where beside its still waters I lead

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
My sheep know My voice,
And the valley of death,

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Thro' which I shall lead them some day;
But no danger nor harm,

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
Can touch one of them,
For I will be with them always.

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
My sheep know My voice,
And day by day,

sections.label: Verse 15
sections.text:
They abide in the fold,
And go not astray;

sections.label: Verse 16
sections.text:
They love Me because
I have made them My choice,

sections.label: Verse 17
sections.text:
And they follow My call,
For My sheep know My voice.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Mwokozi wetu anatupa Furaha duniani,
How great the joy the Lord provides, For us so freely here;
Atuongoza kwa neema Na anatushibisha.
When at His table He presides, And we to Him draw near!
Tazama, Yupo pamoja nasi,Neema haitaisha kamwe!
His Grace is new each day and hour, And we can rest upon His pow’r.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text: Haleluya, Haleluya, Haleluya … Amina!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Ni vema kumpenda Mungu Aliyetukomboa,
It is so good to love the Lord,Who gave His life for all;
Vizuri kuwa mtu wake, sitapotea kamwe.
So good to trust His living Word, Be lifted when we fall.
Furaha yetu itabakia,Ikiwa vyote vingetoweka.
When earthly pleasures reach their end, Our feast of joy will just begin.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Ikiwa giza mara nyingi,Na jua likifichwa,
When shadows come, as come they will, And gloom pervades the day;
Na tukijaribiwa huku, Twajua ni kua muda.
When hopes once bright,Grow cold and chill,The Lord provides a way.
Mbinguni hatutaona kamwe Huzuni wala machozi tena.
In heav’n His light will always shine, And blessedness be yours and mine.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Na tusisumbukie tena Chakula wala nyumba,
So let us not be filled with care, For home and daily bread,
Maana vyote twavipata Kwa ne’ma yake Mungu!
In Grace the Lord His love will share, And surely we’ll be fed.
Njiani yote atuongoza, Aichukua mizigo yetu.
Through all our days He’s by our side, He bears whatever may be the tide.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Ikiwa vema huku chini kutegemea Yesu,
With joy we walk with Jesus here,How great a Friend is He!
Furaha gani huko juu kuona uso wake !
But think what joy awaits us there, When Heaven’s light we see.
Tutaiona furaha tele,Na utukufu hautaisha
Our hopes and dreams will be complete, When at the Heavenly feast we meet.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Nazali mopaya Na mokili oyo.
Mboka na ngai ya seko
Ezali na lola ; Mokolo mosusu

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Namipesi na Yo Nkolo na ngai Yesu
Lisalisi na ngai Ewuti epai na Yo.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Ntango na kotala Nionso na mokili,
Na masumu nionso Bato bakosala

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Nakomipesa te Na mokili oyo
Nakolanda ata te Moto na mokili

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Na tambolaki solo Na mokili oyo.
Nalukaki nionso Na mangomba nionso ;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Namipesi na Yo Nkolo na ngai Yesu
Lisalisi na ngai Ewuti epai na Yo.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Miso na ngai nionso Ekotala se Yo
Yesu Mobikisi na ngai.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Nehema,Nehema,Nehema ya Bwana
Nehema ya Bwana Mulango ni wazi

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Sikiliza niku elezehee
Sababu nina furaha.

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text: NEHEMA YA BWANA

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Ne crains rien, Je t'aime! Je suis avec toi!
Promesse supreme, Qui soutien ma foi.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
La sombre vallee N'a plus de terreur,
L'ame consolee, Je marche avec mon Sauveur.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Non jamais tout seul! (2x)
Jesus mon Sauveur me garde 
Jamais ne me laisse seul.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
L'aube matiniere, Ne luit qu'aux beaux jours,
Jesus ma lumiere, M'eclaire toujours!

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Quand je perds de vue, L'astre radieux,
A travers la nue, Jesus me montre les cieux!

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Les dangers accourent, Substils inconnus:
De pres ils m'entourent, Plus pres est Jesus.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Qui dans le voyage Me redit: c'est Moi!
Ne crains rien courage, Je suis toujours avec toi!

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
There is a land of pure delight 
Where saints immortal reigns

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Eternal day excludes the night
And pleasures banish pain.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
We're marching through Immanuel's ground
And soon we'll hear the trumpet sound

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
And then we shall with Jesus reign
What never part again, No never part again

sections.label: Chorus 3
sections.text:
What never part again No never part again
And then we shall with Jesus reign
And never, never part again

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
There everlasting spring abides,
And never with'ring flow'rs

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Death like a narrow sea
Divides this heavn'ly land from ours

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Sweet fields beyond the swelling
Flood stand dressed in living green

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
So to the Jews old Canaan stood
While Jordan rolled in between

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
O could we make our doubts remove
Those gloomy thoughts that rise,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
And see the Canaan the we love,
With unbe clouded eyes!

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Could we but climb where Moses stood,
And view the landscape o'er

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Not Jordan's stream, nor death's cold
Should fright us from the shore.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Kuja twimbe mwimbo mpya
Bwana Yesu aliniokowa

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
1
<s1076>Nitaogopa nini gizani duniani?
</s><fPristina>(Shall I fear the darkness of the world? )
</f><s1076>Sikuachiwa  peke’mbali ya tumaini!
</s><fPristina>(I was not left hopelessly alone)
</f><s1076>Mwokozi Yu karibu, asiyebadilika.
</s><fPristina>(The Savior is at hand, unchangeable. )
</f><s1076>(:/:Hutunza ndege ndogo na mimi kadhalika.:/:)
</s><fPristina>(:/:He cares for little birds, He'll do the same for me.:/:)</f>

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
<s1076>Namushukuru Mungu Asiyebadilika.
</s><fPristina>(I thank the immutable God)
</f><s1076>Hutunza ndege ndogo Na mimi kadhalika.
</s><fPristina>(:/:He cares for little birds, He'll do the same for me.:/:)</f>

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
2
<s1076>“E’ usifadhaike moyoni mwako, mwana”,
</s><fPristina>(Trouble not in thine heart, child)
</f><s1076>Anong’oneza Yesu, “Nitegemee sana!” 
</s><fPristina>(Jesus whispers and says " lean on me")
</f><s1076>Na hapo woga wangu waruka kwa hakika. 
</s><fPristina>(Then all my fears flew away)
</f><s1076>Then all my fears flew ight away
(:/: Hutunza ndege ndogo na mimi kadhalika.:/:)
</s><fPristina><s1076>(:/:He cares for little birds, He'll do the same for me.:/:)</s></f>

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
a nikijaribiwa na jua lifichwapo,
<fPristina>(If ever tempted, I have a place to hide) 
</f>Hata sioni raha, wala faraja hapo, 
<fPristina>(Even though I have no joy nor confort)
</f>Nakimbilia Yesu, na yote yapinduka.
(:/: Hutunza ndege ndogo na mimi kadhalika.:/:)
<fPristina>(:/:He cares for little birds, He'll do the same for me.:/:)</f>

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Namushukuru Mungu Asiyebadilika.
<fPristina>(I thank the immutable God)
</f>Hutunza ndege ndogo Na mimi kadhalika.
<fPristina>(:/:He cares for little birds, He'll do the same for me.:/:)
</f>*

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Ni nani wa uwezo?
Ni Yesu mwana Mungu!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Ni nani wa uwezo?
Ni Yesu mwana Mungu!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Ni nani wa ushindi?
Ni Yesu mwana Mungu!

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Ni nani Baba wetu?
Ni Yesu mwana Mungu!

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Ni nani Mungu mwema?
Ni Yesu mwana Mungu!

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Ni nani wa uwezo?
Ni Yesu mwana Mungu!

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
No sliver nor gold hath obtained my redemption ,
Nor riches of earth could have saved my poor soul,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
The blood of the cross is my only foundation,
The death of my Saviour now maketh me whole.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
I am redeemed but not with silver,
I am bought but not with gold,

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Bought with a price – the blood of Jesus,
Precious price of love untold!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
No silver nor gold  hath obtained my redemption,
The guilt of my conscience too heavy had grown

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
The blood of the cross is my only foundation,
The death of my Saviour could only atone.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
No silver nor gold hath obtained my redemption,
The Holy commandment forbade me draw near,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
The blood of the cross is my only foundation
The death of my Saviour removeth my fear.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
No silver nor gold hath obtained my redemption,
The way into heaven could not thus be bought.

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
The blood of the cross is my only foundation,
The death of my Saviour redemption hath brought.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Non non non Jamais ne passera
La parole de Dieu Jamais ne passera

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Si tu es pecheur C'est toi qui passera
La parole de Dieu Jamais ne passera

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Si tu es menteur C'est toi qui passera
La parole de Dieu Jamais ne passera

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Si tu es voleur C'est toi qui passera
La parole de Dieu Jamais ne passera

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Non non non Jamais ne passera
La parole de Dieu Jamais ne passera

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Nothing between my soul and the Savior,
Naught of this world's delusive dream;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
I have renounced all sinful pleasure,
Jesus is mine; there's nothing between.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Nothing between my soul and the Savior,
So that His blessed face may be seen;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Nothing preventing the least of His favor,
Keep the way clear! let nothing between.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Nothing between, like worldly please,
Habits of life though harmless they seem,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Must not my heart from Him e'er sever,
He is my all; there's nothing between.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Nothing between, like pride or station,
Self or friend shall not intervene,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Tho' it may cost me much tribulation,
I am resolved; there's nothing between.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Nothing between, e'en many hard trials,
Tho' the whole world against me convene

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Watching with prayer and much self denial,
I'll triumph at last, with nothing between.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Redeemed, how I love to proclaim it!
Redeemed by the blood of the lamb;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Redeemed through his infinite mercy,
His child, and forever, I am.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Redeemed, redeemed,
Redeemed by the blood of the lamb;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Redeemed, redeemed,
His child, and forever, I am.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Redeemed and so happy in Jesus,
No language my rapture can tell;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
I know that the light of his presence
With me doth continually dwell.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
I think of my blessed redeemer,
I think of him all day long;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
I sing, for I cannot be silent.
His love is the theme of my song.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
I know I shall see in his beauty
The king in whose law I delight;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Who lovingly guideth  my footsteps, 
And giveth me songs in the night.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
WE PRAISE THEE, O GOD!
FOR THE SON OF THY LOVE

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
FOR JESUS WHO DIED, 
AND IS NOW GONE ABOVE.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
HALLELUJAH! THINE THE GLORY.
HALLELUJAH!

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
AMEN. HALLELUJAH! 
THINE THE GLORY.REVIVE US AGAIN.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
WE PRAISE THEE, O GOD!
FOR THY SPIRIT OF LIGHT,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
WHO HAVE SHOWN US OUR SAVIOUR,
AND SCATTERED OUR NIGHT.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
HALLELUJAH! THINE THE GLORY.
HALLELUJAH!

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
AMEN. HALLELUJAH! 
THINE THE GLORY.REVIVE US AGAIN.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
ALL GLORY AND PRAISE
TO THE LAMB THAT WAS SLAIN,

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
WHO HATH BORNE ALL OUR SINS,
AND HATH CLEANSED EVERY STAIN.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
HALLELUJAH! THINE THE GLORY.
HALLELUJAH!

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
AMEN. HALLELUJAH! 
THINE THE GLORY.REVIVE US AGAIN.

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
ALL GLORY AND PRAISE
TO THE GOD OF ALL GRACE,

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
WHO HAST BROUGHT US, 
AND SOUGHT US, AND GUIDED OUR WAYS.

sections.label: Verse 15
sections.text:
HALLELUJAH! THINE THE GLORY.
HALLELUJAH!

sections.label: Verse 16
sections.text:
AMEN. HALLELUJAH! 
THINE THE GLORY.REVIVE US AGAIN.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Gloire a Dieu! 
Gloire a Dieu!

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Gloire a toi, Oh Dieu tout puissant
Par ton saint nom nous sommes vivants Oh Dieu!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Nous t’adorons, Oh Roi des rois et nous vivrons 
A jamais pour toi.

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Oh, Seigneur Dieu tout puissant
Soit loue pour l’eternite

sections.label: Chorus 3
sections.text:
Oh, quel bonheur de vivre en toi
Nous vivrons a jamais pour toi.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Gloire a toi, Oh Dieu tout puissant
Par ton amour nous sommes sauve Oh Dieu!

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Oh quel bonheur de croire en toi
Nous vivrons a jamais pour toi.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Gloire a toi Oh, Dieu tous puissant Oh Dieu! 
Rends nous puissant et nous vaincrons Oh Dieu!

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Tes serviteurs dirons avec foi, 
Nous vivrons a jamais pour toi.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
They were in an upper chamber
They were all with one accord

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
When the Holy Ghost descended 
As was promised by the Lord.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
O Lord, send the pow'r just now (x3)
And baptize everyone

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Yes the pow'r from heav'n descended
With the sound of rushing wind

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Tongues of fire came down upon them
As the Lord said He would send.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Yes, this old-time pow'r was given
To our fathers who were true;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
This is promised to believers 
And we all may have it too.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Naught have I gotten but what I received;
Grace hath bestowed is since I have beleived;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Boasting excluded pride I a base;
I'm only a sinner saved by grace.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Only a sinner by grace!
Only a sinner by grace!

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
This is my story to God be the glory,
Only a sinner by grace!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Once I was foolish, and sin ruled my heart,
Causing my footsteps from God to depart;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Jesus hath found me happy my case,
I now I'm only sinner saved by grace.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Tears unavailing, no merit had I,
mercy had saved me, or else I must die;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Sin had alarmed me fearing God's face;
But now I'm a sinner saved by grace.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Suffer a sinner whose heart over flows,
Loving his Saviour to tell what he knows;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Once more to tell it would I embrace;
I'm only a sinner saved by grace.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
ading away like the stars of the morning,
Losing their light in the glorious sun
Thus would we pass 
From this earth and its toilling
Only remembered for what we have done.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Only remembered, only remembered, 
Only remembered for what We have done,
Thus would we pass 
From earth and its toilling,
Only remembered  for what we have done.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
hall we be missed though 
By others succeeded, reaping the fields 
We in springtime have sown?
Yes, but the sowers may pass 
From their labours, 
Ever remembered by what they have done.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
nly the truth that in life we have spoken,
Only the seed that on earth we have sown;
These shall pass onward when we are forgotten,
Fruits of the harvest and what we have done.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
h, when the Saviour shall make up 
His Jewels,
When the bright crowns of rejoicing are won,
Then shall His faithful and zealous disciples 
All be remembered by what they have done.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Only remembered, only remembered, 
Only remembered for what We have done,
Thus would we pass 
From earth and its toilling,
Only remembered  for what we have done.
*

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Come every soul by sin oppressed
There's mercy with the Lord

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
And He will surely give you rest 
By trusting in His word

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Only trust Him, only trust him, Only trust Him now
He will save you, He will save you, He will save you now

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
For Jesus shed His precious blood
Rich blessings to bestow

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Plunge now in to crimson flood
That washes white as snow

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Yes, Jesus is the Truth, the way
That leads you into rest

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Believe in Him without delay
And you are fully blest

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Come, then, and join this holy band 
And on to glory go

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
To dwell in that celestial land
Where joys immortal flow

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Onward, Christian soldiers! Marching as to war,
With the cross of Jesus Going on before;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Onward, Christian soldiers! Marching as to war,
With the cross of Jesus Going on before.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Like a mighty army Moves the Church of God;
Brothers, we are treading Where the saints have trod;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Crowns and thrones may perish, Kingdoms rise and wane;
But the Church of Jesus Constant will remain;

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
At the sign of triumph, Satan’s host doth flee;
Oh, then, Christian soldiers, On to victory!

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Onward, then, ye people! Join our happy throng;
Blend with ours your voices In the triumph song;

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Onward, Christian soldiers! Marching as to war,
With the cross of Jesus Going on before.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Paix, paix, paix Hallelujah paix
Dans la maison de mon Pere

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Il ya de la paix Paix, 
paix, paix  Hallelujah paix!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Joie, joie, joie Hallelujah joie
Dans la maison de mon Pere

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Il ya de la joie Joie,
joie, joie Hallelujah joie!

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Vie, vie, vie  Hallelujah vie
Dans la maison de mon Pere

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Il ya de la vie Vie, 
vie, vie  Hallelujah vie!

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Joy, joy, joy Hallelujah joy
In my Father's house There is joy

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Joy, joy, joy
 Hallelujah joy!

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Peace, peace, peace Hallelujah peace
In my Father's house There is peace

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Peace, peace,
 peace Hallelujah peace!

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text: En Jesus nous avons la paix

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Nionapo amani kama shwari,
Ama nionapo shida;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Kwa mambo yote umenijulisha,
Ni salama rohoni mwangu.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Salama, Salama, Rohoni, Rohoni,
Ni salama rohoni mwangu.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Ingawa Shetani atanitesa,
Nitajipa moyo kwani;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Kristo ameona unyonge wangu,
Amekufa kwa roho yangu.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Dhambi zangu zote, wala si nusu,
Zimewekwa Msalabani;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Wala sichukui laana yake,
Ni salama rohoni mwangu.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Ee Bwana himiza siku ya kuja,
Panda itakapolia;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Utakaposhuka sitaogopa,
Ni salama rohoni mwangu.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
All my life long I had panted 
For a draught from some cool spring,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
That I hoped would quench the burning 
Of the thrist I felt with in.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Hallelujah I have found him 
Whom my soul so longed has craved

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Jesus satisfies my longings;
Thro' His blood I now am saved.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Feeding on the husks around me,
Till my strenght was almost gone,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Longed my soul for something better 
Only still to hunger on.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Poor I was, and sought for riches,
Something that would satisfy,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
But the dust I gathered round me
Only mocked my soul's sad cry.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Well of water, ever springing,
Bread of life, so rich and free,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Untold wealth that never faileth,
My redeemer is to me.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Sawa na kisima safi, Chenye maji mengi, mema, 
Ni upendo wa Mwokozi, Ukaao ndani yake.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Yesu amelifungua Lango zuri la mbinguni 
Ili niingie humo Kwa neema yake huu.

sections.label: Verse 2

Kama ndege awindwavyo Mara nyingi nili’umwa, 
Moyo wangu ulilia, Yesu hakunifukuza.

sections.label: Verse 3

Ni ajabu kubwa kweli, Alinisamehe yote!
Juu ya rehema yake Ninaimba kwa furaha.

sections.label: Verse 4

Asubuhi ya uzima Nitafika mlangoni;
Kwa ajili ya upendo Nitapata kuingia.

SAYUNI, SAYUNI

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Jesus my Saviour to Bethlehem came,
Born in a manger to sorrow and shame,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Oh, it was wonderful blest be his name,
Seeking for me, for me!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Seeking for me , For me , for me! 
Oh, it was wonderful  Blest be his name!
Seeking for me, for me !

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Jesus my Saviour on Calvary’s tree,
Paid the great debt and my soul he set free,

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Oh it was wonderful how could it be, 
Dying for me, for me!

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Dying for me , for me, for me ! 
Oh it was wonderful How could it be? 
Dying for me, for me!

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Jesus my Saviour the same as of old,
While I was wond’ring afar from the fold,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Gently and long did he plead with my soul
Calling for me , for me !

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Calling for me, For me, for me ! 
Gently and long did he Plead with my soul
Calling for me , for me !

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Jesus my Saviour shall come from on high,
Sweet is the promise as weary years fly

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Oh I shall see him descending the sky,
Coming for me, For me, for me!

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
coming for me, for me, for me
Oh I shall see him Descending the sky,

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text: Coming for me, for me!

send down the rain lord

we need the rain lord

Bring down the rain lord
bring down the rain lord

Siku yangu ya kuona Bwana

sections.text: Bwana kuja twende

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Sing them over again to me,
Wonderful words of Life!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Let me more of their beauty see,
Wonderful words of Life!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Words of life and beauty
Teach me faith and duty.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Beautiful words! Wonderful words!
Wonderful words of Life! (2x)

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Christ, the Blessed One, gives to all
Wonderful words of Life!

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Sinner! List to the loving  call,
Wonderful words of Life!

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
All so freely given,
Wooing us to heaven.

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Sweetly echo the Gospel call
Wonderful words of Life!

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Offer pardon and peace to all;
Wonderful words of Life!

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text: Jesus, only Savior, Sanctify for ever.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Words that come from the heart of God,
Wonderful words of Life!

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Words that speak of the cleansing blood,
Wonderful words of Life!

sections.label: Verse 13

Words of life and glory
Tell the wondrous story.

sections.label: Verse 14

Beautiful words! Wonderful words!
Wonderful words of Life! (2x)

title: SINCE JESUS CAME INTO MY HEART

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
What a wonderful change In my life has been wrought
Since Jesus came into my heart!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
I have light in my soul For which long  I have sought,
 Since Jesus came into my heart!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
I have ceased from my wondring And going astray,
Since Jesus came into my heart!

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
And my sins, which were many, Are all washed away,
Since Jesus came into my heart!

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
There's a light in the valley of death Now for me,
Since Jesus came into my heart!

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
And the gates of the city beyond I can see, 
Since Jesus came into my heart!

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
I shall go there to dwell in that city, I know, 
since Jesus came into my heart!

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
And I'm happy, so happy, as onward I go,
Since Jesus came into my heart!

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Since Jesus came into my heart 
Since Jesus came into my heart

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Floods of joy O'er my soul like the sea Billows roll,
Since Jesus came into my heart!

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Stand up! Stand up for Jesus, 
Ye soldiers of the cross!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Lift high his royal banner; 
It must not suffer loss.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
From victory to victory His army he shall lead
Till every foe is vanquished,And Christ is Lord indeed.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Stand up! Stand up for Jesus!
The trumpet-call obey;

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Forth to the mighty conflict
In this his glorious day!

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Ye that are men , now serve Him
Against unnumbered foes;

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Your courage rise with danger
And strength to strength oppose.

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Stand up! Stand up for Jesus!
Stand in his strength alone;

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
The arm of flesh will  fail you;
Ye dare not trust your own.

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Put on the gospel armour, 
Each piece put on with prayer,

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Where duty calls; or danger, 
Be never wanting there.

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Stand up! Stand up for Jesus.
The strife will not be long.

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
This day the noise of battle,
The next the victor’s song.

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
To him that overcometh. 
A crown of life shall be;

sections.label: Verse 15
sections.text:
He with the king of glory Shall reign eternally
*

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Standing on the promises of Christ my King,
Through eternal ages  let his praises ring;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Glory in the highest,  i will shout and sing,
Standing on the promises of God.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Standing, standing, standing on the promises 
of God my saviour;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Standing, standing,
I’m standing on the promises of God.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Standing on the promises  that cannot fail,
When the howling storms  of doubt and fear assail,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
By the living word of God i shall prevail,
Standing on the promises of God.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Standing on the promises i now can see,
perfect, present cleansing in the blood for me;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Standing in the liberty where Christ makes free.
Standing on the promises of God.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Standing on the promises of Christ the Lord,
Bound to him eternally by love’s strong cord,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Overcoming daily with the spirit’s sword,
Standing on the promises of God,

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Standing on the promises i cannot fall,
List’ning every moment to the spirit’s call,

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Resting in my Saviour, as my all in all,
Standing on the promises of God.

title: SHALL WE GATHER AT THE RIVER

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
“There shall be showers of blessing,”
This is the promise of love;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
There shall be seasons refreshing,
Sent from the Savior above,

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Showers of blessing,
Showers of blessing we need;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Mercydrops round us are falling,
But for the showers we plead.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
“There shall be showers of blessing,”
Precious reviving again;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Over the hills and the valleys,
Sound of abundance of rain,

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
“There shall be showers of blessing,”
Send them upon us O Lord!

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Grand to us now a refreshing,
Come, and now honor Thy Word,

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
“There shall be showers of blessing,” 
Oh, that today they might fall,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Now as  to God we’re confessing
Now as on Jesus we call!

sections.label: Verse
Verse 2
sections.text:
Strong in the Lord of hosts, 
And in His mighty power; 
Who in the strength of Jesus trusts 
Is more than conqueror.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Stand, then, in His great might,
With all His strength endued;
And take, to arm you for the fight,
The panoply of God.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Leave no unguarded place, 
No weakness of the soul; 
Take every virtue, every grace, 
And fortify the whole.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
From strength to strength go on, 
Wrestle and fight and pray; 
Tread all the powers of darkness down, 
And win the well-fought day.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
That having all things done, 
And all your conflicts past, 
Ye may o’ercome, through Christ alone, 
And stand complete at last.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Soon and very soon
We are going to see the King; (x3)

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Halelujah! Halelujah!
We're going to see the King.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
No more crying there,
We are going to see the King;(x3)

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
No more dying there,
We are going to see the King;(x3)

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
That God should love a sinner such as I,
Should yearn to change

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
my sorrow into bliss,
Nor rest till He had planned

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
to bring me nigh,
How wonderful is love like this!

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
That Christ should join so freely in the scheme,
Although it meant His death on Calvary,

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Did ever human tongue find nobler theme
Than love divine that ransomed me?

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
That for a willful outcast such as I,
The Father planned, the Savior bled and died;

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Redemption for a worthless slave to buy
Who long had law and grace defied.

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
And now He takes me to His heart, a son,
He asks me not to fill a servant’s place;

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
The “far-off country” wand’rings all are done,
Wide open are His arms of grace.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Such love, such wondrous love,
Such love, such wondrous love,

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
That God should love a sinner such as I, 
how wonderful is love like this

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Are you weary, are you heavy hearted?
Tell it to Jesus, tell it to Jesus.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Are you grieving over joys departed?
Tell it to Jesus alone.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Do the tears flow down your cheeks unbidden?
Tell it to Jesus, tell it to Jesus.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Do you fear the gathering clouds of sorrow?
Tell it to Jesus, tell it to Jesus.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Are you anxious what shall be tomorrow?
Tell it to Jesus alone.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Are you troubled at the thought of dying?
Tell it to Jesus, tell it to Jesus,

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
For Christ’s coming kingdom are you sighing?
Tell it to Jesus alone

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Tell it to Jesus, tell It to Jesus,
He is a Friend that’s well known.

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
You’ve no other such a friend or brother,
Tell it to Jesus alone.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Blessed be the Fountain of blood, 
To a world of sinners revealed;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Blessed be the dear Son of God;
Only by His stripes we are healed.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Thorny was the crown that he wore;
And the cross His body overcame!

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Whiter than the snow! Whiter than the snow!
Wash me in the blood of the Lamb,
And I shall be whiter than snow.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Father, I have wandered from Thee,
Often has my heart gone astray;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Whiter than the snow! Whiter than the snow!
Wash me in the blood of the Lamb,
And I shall be whiter than snow.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Jesus, to that fountain of Thine,
Learning on Thy promise, I go;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Cleanse me by Thy washing divine,
And I shall be whiter than snow.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Whiter than the snow! Whiter than  the snow!
Wash me in the blood of the Lamb,
And I shall be whiter than snow.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
here’s not a friend like the lowly Jesus,
No, not one! no, not one!
None else could heal all our soul’s diseases,
No, not one! no, not one!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Jesus knows all about our struggles,
He will guide till the day is done,
There’s not a friend like the lowly Jesus,
No, not one! no, not one!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
o friend like Him is so high and holy!
No, not one! no, not one!
And yet no friend is so meek and lowly,
No, not one! Non, not one!

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
here’s not an hour that He is not near us,
No, not one! no, not one!
No night so dark but His love can cheer us.
No not one! no, not one!

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
id ever saint find this Friend forsake him?
No, not one! no, not one!
Or sinner find that He would not take him?
No, not one! no, not one!

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
as e’er a gift like the Saviour given?
No,not one! no,not one!
Will He refuse us a home in heaven?
No,not one! not one!

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Jesus knows all about our struggles,
He will guide till the day is done,
There’s not a friend like the lowly Jesus,
No, not one! no, not one!
*

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
There is a fountain filled with blood,
Drawn from Immanuel’s veins,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
The dying thief rejoiced to see
That fountain in his day;

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Dear dying Lamb, 
Thy precious blood shall never lose its power,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
E’er since by faith I saw the stream
Thy flowing wounds supply,

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Then in a nobler, sweeter song,
I’ll sing Thy power to save,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
When this poor lisping, stammering tongue
Lies silent in the grave,

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Lies silent in the grave,
Lies silent in the grave;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
When this poor lisping, stammering tongue
Lies silent in the grave.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
"There's a great day coming,
A great day coming,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
There's a day coming by and by,
When the saint and the sinner

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
shall be parted right and left;
Are you ready for that day to come?"

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Are you ready? are you ready, 
Are you ready for the judgement day?

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Are you ready? are you ready, 
Are you ready for the judgement day?

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
"There's a bright day coming,
A bright day coming,

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
There's a bright day coming by and by,
But its brightness shall only come

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
To them that love the lord;
Are you ready for that day to come?''

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
''There's a sad day coming,
A sad day coming,

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
There's a sad day coming by and by,
When the sinner shall hear his doom,

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
'Depart, I know ye not;'
Are you ready for that day to come?''

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Are you ready? are you ready, 
Are you ready for the judgement day?

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
Are you ready? are you ready, 
Are you ready for the judgement day?

title: THERE IS A NAME I LOVE TO HEAR

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Nations are breaking, Israel’s awaking, 
The signs that the prophets foretold;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
The Gentile days numbered, With horrors encumbered;
Eternity soon will unfold.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
The day of redemption is near, 
Men’s hearts are failing for fear;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Be filled with the Spirit, Your lamps trimmed and clear,
Look up! your redemption is near.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
The fig tree is growing; Jerusalem’s restoring
Her national life, Long dethroned;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Today she is calling, Her latter rain’s falling,
“Return, O dispersed, To your own.”

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Heaven’s powers are shaking, And many are mistaking
God’s meaning to be of the sky;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
God’s Church is the power 
That’s shaking this hour: The day of redemption is nigh.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
False prophets are lying, God’s Truth they’re denying,
That Jesus the Christ is our God;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Though this generation Spurns God’s revelation, 
We’ll walk where the apostles have trod.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
The great physician Now is near 
The sympathizing Jesus

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
He speaks the drooping  Heart to cheer 
Oh, hear the voice of Jesus

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Sweetest note In seraph song 
Sweetest name On mortal tongue

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Sweetest carol ever sung Jesus, 
blessed Jesus.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Your many sins Are all forgiven 
Oh, hear the voice of Jesus

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Go on your way  In peace to heaven 
And wear a crown with Jesus

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
All glory to the dying lamb! 
I now believe in Jesus

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
I love the blessed 
Saviour’s name I love the name of Jesus

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
His name dispels My guilt and fear, 
No other name but Jesus;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
O how my soul Delights to hear 
The charming name of Jesus.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
the love of God is greater far 
than tongue or pen can ever tell.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
it goes beyond the highest star, 
and reaches to the lowest hell.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
the guilty pair, bowed down with care, 
God gave his son to win.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
his erring child he reconciled,
 and pardoned from his sin,

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
oh, love of God, how rich and pure!
 how measureless and strong!

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
it shall forevermore endure, 
the saints and angels’ song.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
when hoary time shall pass away,
 and earthly thrones and kingdoms fall.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
when men who here refuse to pray,
on rocks and hill and mountains call.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
God’s love so sure, shall still endure,
 all measureless and strong.

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
redeeming grace to Adam’s race,
 the saints’ and angels’ song.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
could we with ink the ocean fill,
 and were the skies of parchment made.

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
was every stalk on earth a quill?
 and every man a scribe by trade.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
to write the love of God above
 would drain the ocean dry

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
nor could the scroll contain the whole, 
though stretched from sky to sky.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I’m so glad that the Lord brought me out;
I’m so glad that the Lord brought me out;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
I’ve been happy since the Lord brought me out;
I’ve been happy since the Lord brought me out;

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Aren’t you glad that the Lord brought you out?
Aren’t you glad that the Lord brought you out?

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
I’ve been singing since the Lord brought me out;
I’ve been singing since the Lord brought me out;

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
If it had not been for Jesus, oh where would I be?
I’m so glad that the Lord brought me out.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
I've been shouting since the lord brougt me out;
I've been shouting since the lord brougt me out;

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
If it had not been for Jesus, oh where would I be?
I’m so glad that the Lord brought me out.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
We’re looking for His coming, in the clouds of heaven,
Coming back to earth to catch away His own;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Then may we all be ready, when midnight cry is given,
To go and reign with Christ on His throne.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Gladly may we herald the message of His blessed appearing,
Soon He’s coming in glory, tell to one and all;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Then awake, ye saints of the Lord,
Why slumber when the end is nearing,
But get ready for the final call.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
We’re longing for the glory that awaits the faithful,
Who shall overcome, and ev’ry conflict win;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Press ever bravely onward, the prize is life eternal
To all who win the fight over sin.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
We’re praying for the advent of our blessed Savior,
Who has promised life to all who trust His grace;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
His coming now is pending, the message being given,
And soon we’ll see our Lord face to face.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
We see the signs appearing of His blessèd coming,
Lo, behold the fig leaves now becoming green;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
The Gospel of His kingdom has gone to every nation;
That we are near the end can be seen.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
My hope is built on nothing less 
Than Jesus blood and righteousness;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
I dare not trust the sweetest frame, 
But wholly lean on Jesus’ name.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
On Christ, the solid Rock, I stand;  
All other ground is sinking sand(x2)

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
When darkness seems to hide His face, 
I rest on His unchanging grace;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
In every high and stormy gale, 
My anchor holds within the veil.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
His oath, His covenant, His blood, 
Support me in the whelming flood;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
When all around my soul gives way, 
He then is all my hope and stay.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
When He shall come with trumpet sound, 
Oh, may I then in Him be found;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Dressed in His righteousness alone, 
Faultless to stand before the throne.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
When the earth shall cease to be
And the heavens pass away

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
The unchanging word of God
We'll see just as it is today.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
On the word of God I calmly rest
With a sweet assurance in my breast

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
For I know it is his holy will
Each promise to fulfill

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Since the morn when time began
Hath his word ceased to prevail

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Is the God of heaven weak as man
Or can his promise fail

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Hath a mortal yet  been found
Who hath trusted him in vain

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
search the whole broad space of earth as round
And search it once again

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Trusting him, I'm not afraid 
For he careth still for me

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
And for me the promise sure was made 
And sealed on Calvary

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Oh, what peace and calm content
Oh, what love and joy divine

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
While I trust thy changeless word are blent
Within this heart of mine.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
O they tell me of a home far beyond the skies,
O they tell me of a home far away;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
O they tell me of a home where no storms clouds rise;
O they tell me of an uncloudy day.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
O the land of a cloudless day,
O the land of an uncloudy day.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
O they tell me of a home where no storm clouds rise,
O they tell me of an uncloudy day.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
O they tell me of a home where my friends have gone,
O they tell me of a land far away;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Where the tree of life in eternal bloom 
Sheds its fragrance thro' the uncloudy day

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
O the land of a cloudless day,
O the land of an uncloudy day.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
O they tell me of a King in His beauty there,
And they tell me that mine eyes shall behold

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Where He sits on the throne that is whiter than snow,
In the city that is made of gold.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
O the land of a cloudless day,
O the land of an uncloudy day.

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
O they tell me of a home where no storm clouds rise,
O they tell me of an uncloudy day.

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
O they tell me that He smiles on His children there,
And His smile drives their sorrows all away;

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
And they tell me that no tears ever come again, 
In that lovely land of uncloudy day.

sections.label: Verse 15
sections.text:
O the land of a cloudless day,
O the land of an uncloudy day.

sections.label: Verse 16
sections.text:
O they tell me of a home where no storm clouds rise,
O they tell me of an uncloudy day.

title: THIS IS LIKE HEAVEN TO ME

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
We find many people who can't understand 
Why we are so happy and free;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
We've crossed over Jordan to Canaan's fair land,
And this is like heaven to me.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Oh, this is like heaven to me (to me) 
Yes, this is like heaven to me (to me)

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
I've crossed over Jordan to Canaan's fair land,
And this is like heaven to me (to me)

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
So when we are happy we sing and we shout,
Some don't understand us I see;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
We're filled with the spirit, there isn't a doubt,
And this is like heaven to me.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
We've heard the sweet music, the heavenly chord,
From glory land over the sea;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
A soul thrilling message from Jesus, Our Lord,
And this is like heaven to me.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
We're looking for Jesus with glory to come,
'Tis Jesus who died on the tree;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
A cloud of bright angels to carry me home,
Oh, that will be heaven to me.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
o God be the glory
Great things He hath done,
So loved He the world that
He gave us His Son;
Who yielded His life
An Atonement for sin
And opened the Life-Gate
That all may go in.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Praise the Lord! Praise the Lord!
Let the earth hear His voice!
Praise the Lord! Praise the Lord!
Let the people rejoice!
Oh, come to the Father
Through Jesus the Son,
And give Him the glory
Great things He hath done!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
h, perfect redemption
The purchase of blood,
To every believer
The promise of God;
The vilest offender
Who truly believes,
That moment from Jesus
A pardon receives.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
reat things He hath taught us, 
Great things He hath done,
And great our rejoycing Through Jesus the Son,
But purer and higher And greater will be
Our wonder, our transport, When Jesus we see.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Praise the Lord! Praise the Lord!
Let the earth hear His voice!
Praise the Lord! Praise the Lord!
Let the people rejoice! Oh, come to the Father
Through Jesus the Son,And give Him the glory
Great things He hath done!
*

sections.label: Verse 2

J'apprends a bien combattre

Et quand le vent me bouge
Il travaille pour mon bien

sections.label: Verse 4

Puisque j’aime Jesus.

sections.label: Verse 5

Et quant a la douleur
Elle travaille pour mon bien

sections.label: Verse 6

J’apprends à bien combattre
Puisque j’aime Jesus.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Et quant a la douleur
Elle travaille pour mon bien

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Elle fortifie ma foi
Puisque j’aime Jesus.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Et quand la mort me prappe
Elle travaille pour mon bien

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Je vais me reposer
Puisque j’aime Jesus.

Tous mes péchés,
Tous mes péchés

Jésus t’attend,

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Victory is mine, Victory is mine
Victory today is mine

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
I told Satan, get thee behind
Victory today is mine!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Healing is mine, Healing  is mine
Healing today is mine

sections.label: Verse 4

Salvation is mine, Salvation is mine
Salvation today is mine

I told Satan, get thee behind

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Ville des perles et de lumière,
Existant sur les hauteurs;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Personne n’a encore sur terre
Pu contempler Sa splendeur.

sections.label: Chorus

Ce sera l’Agneau Lui-même

sections.label: Chorus 2

La nouvelle Jérusalem.

sections.label: Verse 4

sections.label: Verse 5

Quand les pèlerins arrivent

sections.label: Verse 6

sections.label: Verse 7

Quand Jésus sera présent!

sections.label: Verse 8

Y sera éternellement!
