sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
WE ARE MARCHING OVER
TO JERUSALEM (4X)

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Christ our Redeemer Died on the cross,
Died for the sinner, Paid all His due;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Sprinkle your soul With the blood of the Lamb,
And I will pass, Will pass over you.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
When I see the blood (X3),
I will pass, I will pass over you.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Chiefest of sinners, Jesus will save;
All He has promised, that will He do;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Wash in the fountain Opened for sin,
And I will pass, Will pass over you.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Judgment is coming, All will be there,
Each one receiving justly his due;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Hide in the saving, Sin-cleansing blood,
And I will pass, Will pass over you.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Oh, great compassion ! O boundless love!
O loving kindness, Faithful and true!

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Find peace and shelter Under the blood,
And I will pass, I will pass over you.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Am I a soldier of the cross,
A follower of the Lamb,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
And shall I fear to own His cause,
Or blush to speak His Name?

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
And when the battle’s over, 
We shall wear a crown!

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
(Yes, we shall wear a crown!)(2x) 
And when the battle’s over,

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
We shall wear a crown
In the new Jerusalem.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Wear a crown, wear a crown,
Wear a bright and shining  crown,

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
And when the battle’s over, 
We shall wear a crown

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text: In the new Jerusalem.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Must I be carried to the skies
On flowery beds of ease,

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
While others fought to win the prize, 
And sailed through bloody seas?

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Are there no foes for me to face? 
Must I not stem the flood?

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Is this vile world a friend to grace
To help me on to God?

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
Sure I must fight if I would reign, 
Increase my courage, Lord;

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
I’ll bear the toil, endure the pain. 
Supported by Thy Word.

sections.label: Verse 15
sections.text:
Wear a crown, wear a crown,
Wear a bright and shining  crown,

sections.label: Verse 16
sections.text:
And when the battle’s over, 
We shall wear a crown

sections.label: Verse 17
sections.text: In the new Jerusalem.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
When upon the clouds of heaven, 
Christ shall come to earth again,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Will the world be glad to see Him, 
When our Lord shall come again?

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
There’ll be singing,
There’ll be shouting,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
There’ll be sorrow,
There’ll be pain,

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
There’ll be weeping,
There’ll be praying,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
When our Lord
shall come again.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Will His coming bring rejoicing?
 Or the angel’s  glad refrain?

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Are you ready to receive Him, 
When our Lord shall come again?

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Will you join in lamentation?
Or the angel’s glad refrain?

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Will you help His people crown Him, 
When our Lord shall come again?

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Work and pray till Jesus calls you, 
Help to gather in the grain,

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Then with joy you’ll meet the Savior, 
When our Lord shall come again.

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
There’ll be singing,
There’ll be shouting,

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
There’ll be sorrow,
There’ll be pain,

sections.label: Verse 15
sections.text:
There’ll be weeping,
There’ll be praying,

sections.label: Verse 16
sections.text:
When our Lord
shall come again.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I am thinking of the rapture In our blessed home on high,
When the redeemed are gathering in;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
How we’ll raise the heavenly anthem  In that city in the sky.
When the redeemed are gathering in.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
When the redeemed are gathering in,
Washed  like the snow, And free from all sin;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
How we will shout,And how we will sing,
When the redeemed are gathering in.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
There will be a great procession over On the streets of gold,
When the redeemed are gathering in;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
O what music, O what singing, O’er the city will be rolled, 
When the redeemed are gathering in.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Saints will sing redemption’s story With their voices clear and strong. 
When the redeemed are gathering in;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Then the angels all will listen, For they cannot join that song, 
When the redeemed are gathering in.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Then the Savior will give orders To prepare the banquet board, 
When the redeemed are gathering in;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
And we’ll hear His invitation, "Come, ye blessed of the Lord.’’
 When the redeemed are gathering in.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
WE ARE MARCHING OVER
TO JERUSALEM (4X)

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
In the resurrection morning, 
When the Trump of God shall sound,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
We shall rise , we shall rise! 
Then the Saints will come rejoicing

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
And no tears will e'er be found We shall rise, 
we shall rise!

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
We shall rise!Hallelujah! 
Amen! We shall rise!

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
In the resurrection morning, 
When death's prison bars are broken,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
We shall rise, 
we shall rise!

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
In the resurrection morning, 
What a meeting it will be,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
We shall rise, we shall rise! 
When ours fathers and our mothers

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
And our loved ones we shall see, 
We shall rise, we shall rise!

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
In the resurrection morning, 
Blessed thought it is to me,

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
We shall rise, we shall rise!
 I shall see my blessed Savior,

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Who so freely died for me, 
We shall rise, we shall rise!

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
In the resurrection morning, 
We shall meet Him in the air,

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
We shall rise, we shall rise! 
And be carried up to glory,

sections.label: Verse 15
sections.text:
To our home so bright and fair, 
We shall rise, we shall rise!

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
When with the Savior We enter the gloryland, 
Won’t it be wonderful there?

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Ended the troubles And cares of the storyland, 
Won’t it be wonderful there?

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Won’t it be wonderful there? 
Having no burdens to bear?

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Joyously singing with heart-bells all ringing, 
O won’t it be wonderful there?

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Walking and talking with Christ, the supernal One, 
Won’t it be wonderful there?

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Praising, adoring the matchless eternal One, 
Won’t it be wonderful there?

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
There where the tempest will never 
be weeping us, Won’t it be wonderful there?

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Sure that forever the Lord will be keeping us,
Won’t it be wonderful there?

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Yesu azali awa (x2)
Yesu azali awa na biso

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Alleluia, Alleluia
Alleluia na Yesu (x2)

sections.label: Verse 3

Biso toko mona ye (x2)
Biso toko mona ye na lola

sections.label: Verse 4

Kitisa nguya na yo (x2)
Kitisa nguya na yo n'esika oyo

sections.label: Verse 5

Esengo ya ndenge wana (x2)
Esengo ya ndenge wana na lola

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Il nous revele ce qui est (x2)

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
(Yesu mule mu Nyumba) (Sop.)
 Ile murefu (kweli: B)
 Na wanafunzi (2x)

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
(Katikati yetu : Sop.)   Petero, Yakobo, Yoane...
Ninani Buana (ule :B)... Atakutoa. (2x)

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
(Mule mukate huu) (Sop.) 
 Mule mukate (muwaze : B)
  Ni mwili wangu. (2x)

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
(Munyueni mvinyo hii) (Sop.)
 Munyueni Mvinyo (Muwaze : B)
  Ni Damu yangu. (2x)

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
(Katikati yetu : Sop.)   Petero, Yakobo, Yoane...
Ninani Buana (ule :B)... Atakutoa. (2x)

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Like a river glorious is God’s perfect peace,
Over all victorious, in its bright increase:

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Hidden in the hollow of His blessed hand,
Never foe can follow, never traitor stand;

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Every joy or trial falleth from above,
Traced upon our dial by the sun of love.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
We may trust Him fully, all for us to do;
They who trust Him wholly find Him wholly true.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Stayed upon Jehovah, hearts are fully blest;
Finding, as He promised, perfect peace and rest.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
[G]When we walk with the [D]Lord in the [G]light of His word,
[G]What a [C]glory He [G]sheds on our [D]way!
[G]While we do His good [D]will, He a[G]bides with us still,
[G]And with [C]all who will [D]trust and o[G]bey.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
[G]Trust and o[D]bey, for there's [G]no other way
[G]To be [C]happy in [G]Jesus, but to [D7]trust and o[G]bey.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
[G]Not a shadow can [D]rise, not a [G]cloud in the skies,
[G]But His [C]smile quickly [G]drives it a[D]way;
[G]Not a doubt or a [D]fear, not a [G]sigh or a tear,
[G]Can a[C]bide while we [D]trust and o[G]bey.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Abide with me, fast falls the eventide;
The darkness deepens, Lord, with me abide;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
When other helpers fail and comforts flee,
Help of the helpless, O abide with me.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Swift to its close ebbs out life’s little day;
Earth’s joys grow dim, its glories pass away;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Change and decay in all around I see;
O Thou who changest not, abide with me.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
I need Thy presence every passing hour;
What but Thy grace can foil the tempter’s power?

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Who like Thyself my guide and stay can be?
Through cloud and sunshine, O abide with me.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
I fear no foe, with Thee at hand to bless;
Ills have no weight, and tears no bitterness.

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Where is death’s sting? Where, grave, thy victory? 
I triumph still, if Thou abide with me.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Reveal Thyself before my closing eyes;
Shine through the gloom, and point me to the skies,

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Heaven’s morning breaks, and earth’s vain shadows flee;
In life, in death, O Lord, abide with me.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Come thou fount of every blessing,
Tune my heart to sing Thy grace;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Streams of mercy, never ceasing,
Call for songs of loudest praise.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Teach me some melodious sonnet
Sung by flaming tongues above

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
(Praise the mount! I’m fixed upon it 
Mount of Thy redeeming love) (x2)

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Here I raise my Ebenezer
Hither by Thy help I’m come

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
And I hope, by Thy good pleasure
Safely to arrive at home

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Jesus sought me when a stranger
Wandering from the fold of God

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
(He, to rescue me from danger
Interposed His precious blood) (x2)

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
O to grace how great a debtor
Daily I’m constrained to be!

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Let Thy goodness, like a fetter,
Bind my wandering heart to Thee

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Prone to wander, Lord, I feel it,
Prone to leave the God I love;

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
(Here’s my heart, O take and seal it,
Seal it for Thy courts above) (x2)

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
O that day when freed from sinning
I shall see Thy lovely face;

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
Clothed then in blood washed linen
How I’ll sing Thy sovereign grace

sections.label: Verse 15
sections.text:
Come, my Lord no longer tarry
Take my ransomed soul away

sections.label: Verse 16
sections.text:
(Send Thine angels now to carry
Me to realms of endless day) (x2)

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
O happy day, That fixed my choice,
On Thee, my Savior and my God!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Well may this glowing heart rejoice,
And tell its raptures all abroad.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Happy day, happy day,
When Jesus washed my sins away!

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
He taught me how to watch and pray,
And live rejoicing every day,

sections.label: Chorus 3
sections.text:
Happy day, happy day,
When Jesus washed my sins away!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
O happy bond, That seals my vows,
To Him who merits all my love!

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Let cheerful anthems fill His house,
While to that sacred shrine I move.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
“Tis done; the great transaction’s done!
I am my Lord’s and He is mine;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
He drew me, and I followed on,
Charmed to confess the voice divine.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Le grand jour s’est levé, 
Dieu nous a visité, 
Voici des temps nouveaux,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Chantons gloire à l’Agneau, 
Nous recevons de Christ, 
Ce qu’il avait promis, Le Saint Esprit est là.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Le Saint Esprit est là,( x2)
La mort a disparu, 
Dieu donne un plein salut.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Et sur le monde entier, 
Le grand jour s’est levé, 
Le Saint Esprit est là.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
L’obscurité s’enfuit ,La lumière a jailli 
Chasse des coeurs troublés

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Toute incrédulité Car Christ le Roi des rois 
Répands l’Esprit de foi Le Saint Esprit est là.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Le Grand Consolateur, 
Vient remplir tous les coeurs,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
L’Esprit de vérité Nous mets en liberté, 
Il ouvre les prisons Répand la guérison, 
Le Saint Esprit est là.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Que tous les rachetés, Chantent leur liberté, 
Christ a tout accompli, Il a donné l’Esprit,

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Voyez trembler l’enfer, Car dans tout l’univers, 
Le Saint Esprit est là.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Le Saint Esprit est là (bis)
La mort a disparu Dieu donne un plein salut

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Et sur le monde entier 
Le grand jour s’est levé 
Le SaintEsprit est là.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Jesus keep me near the cross, 
There a precious fountain,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Free to all, a healing stream, 
Flows from Calv’ry’s mountain.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
There the Bright and Morning Star
 Sheds its beams around me.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Near the cross! O Lamb of God, 
Bring its scenes before me;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Help me walk from day to day,
With its shadows o’er me.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Near the cross I’ll watch and wait,
Hoping, trusting, ever,

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Till I reach the golden strand, 
Just beyond the river.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
In the cross, in the cross, 
Be my glory ever;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Till my raptured soul shall find 
Rest beyond the river.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Blest be the tie that binds,
Our heart in Christian love;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
The fellowship of kindred
Minds is like to that above.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Before our Father’s throne,
We pour our ardent prayers;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Our fears, our hopes, our aims are one,
Our comforts and our cares.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
We share our mutual woes,
Our mutual burdens bear;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
And often for each other flows
The sympathizing tear.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
When we asunder part,
It gives us inward pain;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
But we shall still be joined in heart,
And hope to meet again.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Nearer my God to thee, nearer to thee 
Even though it be a cross that raiseth me

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Still all my song shall be Nearer my God to thee, 
Nearer my God to thee, Nearer to thee.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Though like the wanderer, the sun go down 
Darkness be over me, my rest a stone

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Yet in my dream I’d be, nearer my God to thee, 
Nearer my God to thee Nearer to thee.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
There let the way appear steps unto heaven 
All that thou sendest me, in mercy given

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Angels to beckon me, nearer my God to thee, 
Nearer my God to thee, nearer to thee.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Then with my walking thoughts, 
Bright with Thy praise 
Out of my stony grief’s bethel I’ll raise.

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
So by my woes to be, nearer my God to thee 
Nearer my God to thee, nearer to thee.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Or if on joyful wing, clearing the sky 
Sun, moon and stars forgot, upward I fly

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Still all my song shall be, Nearer my God to thee 
Nearer my God to thee Nearer to thee.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
A wonderful Saviour ,Is Jesus my Lord,
A wonderful Saviour to me;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
He hideth my soul  In the cleft of the rock,
Where rivers of pleasure I see.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
He hideth my soul in the cleft of the rock,
That shadows a dry, thirsty land;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
He hideth my life with the depths of His love,
And covers me there with His hand (x2)

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
A wonderful Saviour, Is Jesus my Lord,
He taketh my burden away;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
He holdeth me up,  And I shall not be moved,
He giveth me strength as my day.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
With numberless blessings Each moment He crowns,
And filled with His fullness divine,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
I sing in my rapture, Oh, glory to God
For such a Redeemer as mine!

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
When clothed in His brightness, Transported I rise
To meet Him in clouds of the sky,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
His perfect salvation, His wonderful  love
I’ll  shout with the millions on high.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
[G]Amazing Grace! how [G7]sweet the [C]sound
That [G]saved a wretch like [Em]me;
[G]I once was [G7]lost, but [C]now am [G]found,
Was [D]blind but [D7]now I [G]see.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
[G]'Twas grace that [G7]taught my [C]heart to fear,
And [G]grace my fears re[Em]lieved;
[G]How precious [G7]did that [C]grace ap[G]pear,
The [D]hour I first be[G]lieved.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
[G]Through many [G7]dangers, [C]toils and snares
I [G]have already [Em]come;
[G]'Tis grace has [G7]brought me [C]safe this [G]far,
And [D]grace will lead me [G]home.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
[G]When we've been [G7]there ten [C]thousand years,
Bright [G]shining as the [Em]sun;
[G]We've no less [G7]days to [C]sing God's [G]praise,
Than [D]when we'd first be[G]gun.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Sweet hour of prayer, sweet hour of prayer, 
That calls me from a world of care,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
And bids me, at my Father’s throne,
Make all my wants and wishes known,

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
In seasons of distress and grief, 
My soul has often found relief,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
And oft escaped the tempter’s snare,
By thy return, sweet hour of prayer.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Sweet hour of prayer, sweet hour of prayer,
The joy I feel, the bliss I share,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Of those whose anxious spirits burn
With strong desires for thy return!

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
With such I hasten to the place
Where God, my Savior, shows His face,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
And gladly take my station there,
And wait for thee, sweet hour of prayer.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Sweet hour of prayer, sweet hour of prayer,
Thy wings shall my petition bear

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
To Him whose truth and faithfulness 
Engage the waiting soul to bless;

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
And since He bids me seek His face,
Believe His Word and trust His grace,

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
I’ll cast on Him my every care,
And wait for thee, sweet hour of prayer!

title: I LOVE TO TELL THE STORY

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I love to tell the Story  Of unseen things above, 
Of Jesus and His glory,  Of Jesus and His love!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
I love to tell the Story!  Because I know it’s true; 
It satisfies my longings  As  nothing else can do.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
I love to tell the Story! ‘Twill be my theme in glory,
To tell the Old, Old Story,  Of Jesus and His Love!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
I love to tell the Story! More wonderful it seems 
Than all the golden fancies  Of all our golden dreams.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
I love to tell the Story!  It did so much for me!
And that is just the reason  I tell it now to thee.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
I love to tell the Story; Tis pleasant to repeat
What  seems each time  I tell it More wonderfully sweet:

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
I love to tell the Story;  For some have never heard
The message of salvation  From God’s own Holy Word.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
I love to tell the Story! For those who know it best  
Seem hungering and thirsting  To hear it, like the rest.

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
And when, in scenes of glory,  I sing the new, new song,
‘Twill be the old, old story,  That I have loved so long

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
hrist the lord is risen to day Allelujah!
Son’s of men and angels say Allelujah!
Raise your joys and triumphs high Allelujah!
Sing ye heavens and earth reply Allelujah!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
ove's redeeming work is done Allelujah!
Fought the fight the battle won Allelujah!
Vain the fight the watch the seal Allelujah!
Christ hath burst the gates of hell Allelujah!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
ives again our glorious king Allelujah!
Where o death is now thy sting Allelujah!
Once he died our soul to save Allelujah !
Where thy victory o grave Allelujah!

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
oar we now where christ hath led Allelujah!
Following our exalted head Allelujah!
Make like Him, like Him we rise Allelujah!
Ours the cross, the grave, the skies Allelujah!

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
ail the Lord of earth and heaven Allelujah!
Praise to thee by both be given Allelujah !
Thee we greet, in triumph sing Allelujah!
Hail our resurected King Allelujah!
*

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
h! prends mon ame, prends-la Seigneur! 
Et que ta flamme brule dans mon coeur 
Que tout mon etre vibre pour toi;
Sois seul mon Maitre, Oh divin Roi.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Source de vie, de paix d’amour!
Vers toi, je crie la nuit, le jour
Entends ma plainte, sois mon soutien!
Calme ma crainte, toi mon seul bien.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
u mal perfide, oh! garde moi 
Viens, Sois mon guide, Chef de ma foi. 
Quand la nuit voile tout a mes yeux,
Sois mon etoile, brille des cieux.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
oici l’aurore d’un jour nouveau,
Le ciel se dore d’un feu plus beau!
Jesus s’apprete, pourquoi gemir?
Levons nos tetes, il va venir.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Source de vie, de paix d’amour!
Vers Toi, je crie la nuit, le jour
Entends ma plainte, Sois mon soutien!
Calme ma crainte, Toi mon seul bien.
*

title: MY FAITH LOOKS UP TO THEE

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
My faith looks up to Thee,Thou Lamb of Calvary,
Savior divine; now hear me while I pray;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Take all my guilt away, Oh let, me from this days
Be wholly Thine!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
May Thy rich grace impart, Strength to my fainting heart,
My zeal inspire; As Thou hast died for me,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
O may my love to Thee, 
Pure, warm, and changeless be, A living fire!

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
While life’s dark maze I tread,And griefs around me spread,
Be Thou my Guide.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Bid darkness turn to day, Wipe sorrow’s tears away;
Nor let me ever stray From Thee aside.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
When ends life's transient dream
When death's cold sullen stream

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Shall o'er me roll
Blest Saviour , then in love,

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Fear and distrust remove;
Oh, bear me safe above A ransomed soul.

sections.label: Verse 1
Chorus
sections.text:
[Eb]Great is Thy [Ab]faithfulness! [Eb]Great is Thy faithfulness!
[Eb]Morning by [Bb]morning new [Eb]mercies I see;
[Ab]All I have [Eb]needed Thy [C7]hand hath pro[Fm]vided,
[Eb]Great is Thy [Bb]faithfulness, [Bb7]Lord, unto [Eb]me!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
[Eb]Summer and [Ab]winter and [Eb]springtime and harvest,
[Eb]Sun, moon and stars in their [Bb]courses a[Bb7]bove
[Eb]Join with all [Ab]nature in [Eb]manifold witness
[Eb]To Thy great [Bb]faithfulness, [Eb]mercy and love.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
[Eb]Pardon for [Ab]sin and a [Eb]peace that endureth,
[Eb]Thine own dear presence to [Bb]cheer and to [Bb7]guide;
[Eb]Strength for to[Ab]day and bright [Eb]hope for tomorrow,
[Eb]Blessings all [Bb]mine, with ten [Eb]thousand beside!

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
In the land of fadeless day, 
Lies the city four square,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
It shall never pass away, 
And there is no night there.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
All the gates of pearl are made,
 In the city four square,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
All the streets with gold are laid, 
And there is no night there.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
All the gates shall never close, 
To the city four square,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
There life's crystal river flows, 
And there is no night there.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
There they need no sunshine bright,
 In that city four square,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
For the lamb is all the light,
And there is no night there.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
God shall wipe away all tears; 
There's no death no pain nor fears;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
And they count not time by years... 
For there is "no night there".

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Gloire a Dieu! Gloire a Dieu! 
Gloire a Dieu! Gloire a Dieu!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Gloire a toi, Oh Dieu tout puissant
Par ton saint nom nous sommes vivants Oh Dieu!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Nous t’adorons, Oh Roi des rois et nous vivrons 
A jamais pour toi.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Oh, Seigneur Dieu tout puissant
Soit loue pour l’eternite

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Oh, quel bonheur de vivre en toi
Nous vivrons a jamais pour toi.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Gloire a toi, Oh Dieu tout puissant
Par ton amour nous sommes sauve Oh Dieu!

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Oh quel bonheur de croire en toi
Nous vivrons a jamais pour toi.

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Oh, Seigneur Dieu tout puissant
Soit loue pour l’eternite

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Oh, quel bonheur de vivre en toi
Nous vivrons a jamais pour toi.

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Gloire a toi Oh, Dieu tous puissant Oh Dieu!
Rends nous puissant et nous vaincrons Oh Dieu!

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Tes serviteurs dirons avec foi,
 Nous vivrons a jamais pour toi.

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Oh, Seigneur Dieu tout puissant 
Soit loue pour l’eternite

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
Oh, quel bonheur de vivre en toi 
Nous vivrons a jamais pour toi.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I need Thee ev’ry hour, Most gracious Lord;
No tender voice like Thine Can peace afford?

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
I need Thee, Oh I need Thee! Ev’ry hour I need Thee: 
Oh bless me now, my Saviour! I come to Thee.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
I need Thee ev’ry hour, Stay Thou near by
Temptations lose their pow’r When Thou art nigh.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
I need Thee ev’ry hour, In joy or pain;
Come quickly and abide Or life is vain.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
I need Thee ev'ry hour, Teach me Thy will;
And Thy rich promises In me fulfil.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
I need Thee ev'ry hour, Most Holy One;
Oh make me Thine indeed, Thou blessed Son!

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
I need Thee, Oh I need Thee! Ev’ry hour I need Thee:
Oh bless me now, my Saviour! I come to Thee.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Torrents d’amour et de grâce,
Amour du Sauveur en croix!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
A ce grand fleuve qui passe,
Je m’abandonne et je crois.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Je crois à ton sacrifice,
O Jésus Agneau de Dieu,

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Et couvert par ta justice,
J’entrerai dans le Saint lieu.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Ah! Que partout se répande
Ce fleuve â  la grande voix;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Que tout l’univers  entende
L’appel qui vient de la croix!

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Que toute âme condamnée
Pour qui tu versas ton sang,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Soit au Père ramenée
Par ton amour tout puissant.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
J’entends ta douce voix,
Jésus, je viens à Toi,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Je viens, O Sauveur, lave-moi
Dans le sang de la Croix!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Jésus, Roi des rois,
Qui mourut pour moi,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Je veux mourir avec Toi,
Avec Toi sur la Croix.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
J’entends ta douce voix,
Qui me dit: «Crois en Moi!»

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Je crois, Seigneur, soutiens ma foi, 
Tiens-moi près de la Croix!

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Jésus, Roi des rois,
Qui mourut pour moi,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Je veux mourir avec Toi,
Avec Toi sur la Croix.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
J’entends ta douce voix,
Elle pénètre en moi

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Et me dit d’aimer comme Toi
De l’amour de ta Croix!

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Jésus, Roi des rois,
Qui mourut pour moi,

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Je veux mourir avec Toi,
Avec Toi sur la Croix.

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
J’entends ta douce voix,
Toi qui mourus pour moi,

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
Seigneur, que je m’unisse à Toi
Dans ta mort, par la foi!

sections.label: Verse 15
sections.text:
Jésus, Roi des rois,
Qui mourut pour moi,

sections.label: Verse 16
sections.text:
Je veux mourir avec Toi,
Avec Toi sur la Croix

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Just as I am, without one plea
But that Thy blood was shed for me,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Just as I am, and waiting not
To rid my soul of one dark blot,

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Just as I am, though tossed about
With many a conflict, many a doubt,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Just as I am, poor, wretched, blind;
Sight, riches, healing of the mind,

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Just as I am, Thou wilt receive,
Wilt welcome, pardon, cleanse, relieve,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Just as I am, Thy love unknown
Has broken every barrier down;

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Just as I am, of that free love
The breadth, length, depth and height to prove,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Here for a season, then above,
O Lamb of God, I come.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Rock of Ages, cleft for me,
 Let me hide myself in Thee;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Let the water and the blood, 
From Thy wounded side which flowed

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Be of sin the double cure, 
Save from wrath and make me pure.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Could my tears forever flow, 
Could my zeal no languor know,

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
These for sin could not atone; 
Thou must save, and Thou alone;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
In my hand no price I bring, 
Simply to Thy cross I cling.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
While I draw this fleeting breath, 
When my eyes shall close in death,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
When I rise to worlds unknown,
And behold Thee on Thy throne,

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Rock of Ages, cleft for me,
 Let me hide myself in thee

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
God be with you till we meet again!
By His counsels guide, uphold you,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
With His sheep securely fold you;
God be with you till we meet again!

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Till we meet! Till we meet!
Till we meet at Jesus’ feet;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Till we meet! Till we meet!
God be with you till we meet again!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
God be with you till we meet again!
‘Neath His wings securely hide you,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Daily manna still provide you;
God be with you till we meet again!

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
God be with you till we meet again!
When life’s perils thick confound you,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Put His arms unfailing round you;
God be with you till we meet again!

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
God be with you till we meet again!
Keep love’s banner floating o’er you,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Smite death’s threat’ning wave before you;
God be with you till we meet again.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Wonderful story of love;
Tell it to me again;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Wonderful story of love;
Wake the immortal strain!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Angels with rapture announce it,
Sheperds with wonder receive it;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Sinner O won't you beleive it?
Wonderful story of love;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Wonderful story of love;
Tho' you are far away;

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Wonderful story of love;
Still He doth call today;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Calling from Calvary's mountain,
Down from the crystal bright fountain,

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
E'en from the dawn of creation,
Wonderful story of love;

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Wonderful story of love;
Jesus provides a rest;

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Wonderful story of love;
For all the pure and blest,

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Rest in those mansions above us
With those who've gone before us,

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
Singing the rapturous chorus,
Wonderful story of love;

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
Wonderful! wonderful! 
Wonderful! Wonderful story of love!

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Wonderful! wonderful! 
Wonderful! Wonderful story of love!

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Misericorde insondable! 
Dieu peut il tout pardonner

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Absourdre un si grand coupable, 
Et mes peches oublies.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Jesus, je viens! je viens a toi! 
Tel que je suis, je viens a toi. (x2)
Prends-moi.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Longtemps j’ai loin de sa face, 
Provoque son saint courroux,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Ferme mon coeur a sa grace,
Blesse le sien devant tous.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Oh Jesus! a toi je cede,
 Je veux etre libere,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
De tout peche qui m’obsede 
Etre a jamais delivre.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Alleluia! plus de doute, 
Mon fardeau m’est enleve;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Pour le ciel je suis en route,
Heureux pour l’eternite.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Shall we gather at the river,  Where bright angel feet have trod,
With its crystal tide forever, Flowing by the throne of God?

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Yes, we’ll gather at the river, The beautiful,
The beautiful river; Gather with the saints at the river 
That flows by the throne of God.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
On the margin of the river, Washing up its silver spray,
We will walk and worship ever, All the happy, golden day,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Ere we reach the shining river Lay we every burden down
grace our spirits will deliver Hand provide a robe and crown

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
At the smiling of the river, Mirror of the Savior’s face,
Saints whom death will never sever  Raise their songs of saving grace,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Soon we’ll reach the silver river, Soon our pilgrimage will cease; 
Soon our happy hearts will quiver With the melody of peace.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Yes, we’ll gather at the river, The beautiful,
The beautiful river; Gather with the saints at the river 
That flows by the throne of God.

title: WHAT A FRIEND WE HAVE IN JESUS

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
[F]What a Friend we have in [C]Jesus,
[F]All our sins and griefs to [C7]bear!
[F]What a privilege to [Bb]carry
[F]Everything to [C7]God in [F]prayer!
[F]O what peace we often [C]forfeit,
[F]O what needless pain we [C7]bear,
[F]All because we do not [Bb]carry
[F]Everything to [C7]God in [F]prayer!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
[F]Have we trials and temp[C]tations?
[F]Is there trouble any[C7]where?
[F]We should never be dis[Bb]couraged,
[F]Take it to the [C7]Lord in [F]prayer.
[F]Can we find a friend so [C]faithful,
[F]Who will all our sorrows [C7]share?
[F]Jesus knows our every [Bb]weakness,
[F]Take it to the [C7]Lord in [F]prayer.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
[F]Are we weak and heavy [C]laden,
[F]Cumbered with a load of [C7]care?
[F]Precious Savior, still our [Bb]refuge —
[F]Take it to the [C7]Lord in [F]prayer.
[F]Do thy friends despise, for[C]sake thee?
[F]Take it to the Lord in [C7]prayer;
[F]In His arms He'll take and [Bb]shield thee,
[F]Thou wilt find a [C7]solace [F]there.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
What a fellowship,  What a joy divine,  
Leaning on  The everlasting arms;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
What a blessedness, What a peace is mine, 
 Leaning on  The everlasting arms.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Leaning, leaning; Safe and secure From all alarms; 
Leaning, leaning, Leaning on The everlasting arms.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Oh, how sweet to walk  In this pilgrim way,
Leaning on  The everlasting arms;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Oh, how bright the path  Grows from day to day,
Leaning on The everlasting arms.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
What have I to dread, What have I to fear,
Leaning on The everlasting arms;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
I have blessed peace  With my Lord so near,
Leaning on The everlasting arms.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Cling to the Bible! tho' all else be taken;
Lose not its precepts so precious and pure;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Souls that are sleeping its tidings awaken;
Life from the dead in its promises sure.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Cling to the Bible!Cling to the Bible!
Cling to the Bible! Our lamp and our guide.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Cling to the Bible! this jewel and treasure
Bring life eternal and saves fallen man.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Surely its value no mortal can measure,
Seek for its blessing O soul while you can!

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Lamp for the feet that in by ways have wandered
Guide for the youth that would otherwise fall;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Hope for the sinner whose life has been squandered
Staff for the aged, and the best book of all.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Sizohamba naye, wo wo wo, sizohamba naye (x2)
Ngomhla wenjabula, sizohamba naye (x2)

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Sizohlabelela, wo wo wo, Sizohlabelela (2x)
Ngomhla wenjabula, Sizohlabelela (2x)

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Sizothwala umthwalo, wo wo wo, Sizothwala umthwalo (2x)
Ngomhla wenjabula, Sizothwala umthwalo (2x)

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
We will walk with God, My brothers, we will walk with God.
We will walk with God, My sisters,

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
We will walk with God.
We will go rejoicing till the kingdom has come (x2)

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Have Thine own way, Lord! 
Have Thine own way!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Thou art the Potter; I am the clay, 
Mould me and make me

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
After Thy will, While I am waiting, 
Yielded and still.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Have Thine own way, Lord! 
Have Thine own way!

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Search me and try me, Master, today! 
Whiter than snow, Lord,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Wash me just now,  
As in Thy presence Humbly I bow,

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Have Thine own way, Lord!
Have Thine own way!

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Wounded and weary,
Help me, I pray! Power, all power,

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Surely is Thine!
Touch me and heal me, Savior divine!

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Have Thine own way, Lord!
Have Thine own way!

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Hold o’er my being Absolute sway!
Fill with Thy Spirit Till all shall see

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Christ only, always,
Living in me.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Jerusalem, cité de Dieu quand 
pourrais-je  franchir ton seuil

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Et recevoir dans ton saint lieu de 
mon Sauveur un doux acceuil.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Plus haut plus loin que l’azur infini, 
mes yeux verront

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
mon redempteur beni  dans 
son palais d’or pur etincelant

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
ou tout dit gloire, 
au Grand Roi triomphant.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
J’entends des chants harmonieux 
des harpes d’or au son si beau

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Les rachêtés dans les hauts cieux
entonnent le chant de l’Agneau.

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
« Etre avec Chirst » o saint espoir
 le contempler dans sa splendeur

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
A ses côtés oser m 'asseoir pour moi, 
pécheur, rien de meilleur.

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Là je verrai tous mes trésors 
qu’ici bas j’ai trop tôt perdu

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Tous revetus d’un nouveau corps 
nous louerons le Seigneur Jésus.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Redempteur adorable Sur la croix attache,
Traite comme coupable, Brise pour mon peche,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Abandonne du Pere, Dans mon ame troublee,
Buvant la coup'amere, Pour ton iniquite,

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Le sang de mes blessures, Ma coronne de Roi,
Toutes ses meurtrissures, Comprends-le c'est pour toi,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Ton amour me reclame, Me voici Cher Sauveur,
Prends mon corps et mon ame, Pour prix de la douleur,

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Oui, mon ame ravie, Desormais ne veux plus,
Que vivre de Ta vie, A ta gloire, O Jesus.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
My Jesus I love thee, I know Thou art mine!
For Thee all the follies of sin I resign;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
My gracious Redeemer, My Saviour art Thou;
If ever I loved Thee, My Jesus ‘tis now!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
I love Thee because Thou hast first loved me,
And purchased my pardon On Calvary’s tree;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
I love Thee for wearing The throns on Thy brow,
If ever I loved Thee, My Jesus ‘tis now!

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
I will love Thee in life, I will love Thee in death,
And praise Thee as long as Thou lendest me breath,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
And say, when the death Dew lies cold on my brow,
If ever I loved Thee, My Jesus ‘tis now!

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
In mansions of glory And endless delight,
I’ll ever adore Thee In heaven so bright;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
I’ll sing with the glittering crown on my brow,
If ever I loved Thee, My Jesus ‘tis now!

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Days are filled with sorrow and care, 
Hearts are lonely and drear;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Burdens are lifted at Calvary,
Jesus is very near.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Burdens are lifted at Calvary, Calvary, Calvary.
Burdens are lifted at Calvary, Jesus is very near.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Cast your care on Jesus today,
Leave your worry and fear;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Burdens are lifted at Calvary,
Jesus is very near.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Troubled soul, The saviour can see every 
Heartache and tear.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Burdens are lifted at Calvary,
Jesus is very near.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
On t'a fait connaitre homme ce qui est bien
Ce que l'Eternel demande de toi;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Ce que tu pratiques la justice Que tu aimes la misericorde;
Que tu marches humblement avec ton Dieu.

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text: ON T'A FAIT CONNAITRE

sections.label: Verse
sections.text: Be still and know that I am God. (x3)

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text: I am the Lord that healeth thee. (x3)

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text: In Thee, O Lord, do I put my trust. (x3)

title: I WILL SING THE WONDEROUS STORY

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Alleluyah! Alleluyah! 
Alleluyah! Alleluyah! (2x)

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I will sing the wondrous story 
Of the Christ who died for me,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
How He left His home in glory
For the cross of calvary.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Yes, I'll sing the wondrous story
Of the Christ who died for me,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Sing it with the saints, in glory
Gathered by the crystal sea.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
I was lost, but Jesus found me,
Found the sheep that went astray,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Threw His loving arms around me,
Drew me back into His way.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
I was bruise, but Jesus healed me,
Faint was I from many a fall,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Sight was gone, and fears possessed me,
But He freed me from them all.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Days of darkness still come o'er me, 
Sorrow's path I often tread,

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
But His presence still is with me;
By His guiding hand I'm led.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
He will keep me till the river 
Rolls its waters at my feet;

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Then he'll bear me safely over
Where the love one I shall see.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Pelerin sur cette terre, Je m’avance vers le ciel,
Vers le pays de lumiere, Sejour eternel!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Aime du plus tendre Pere Qui m’a conduit en chemin, 
Et dirige ma carriere par Sa sure main,

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Travailler pour un tel maitre Le servir en l’attendant, 
Apprendre a mieux le connaitre en le contemplant!

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Le port,c’est le doux rivage Ou cesseront tout nos pleurs. 
Ou de Jesus Christ l’image  ravira nos coeurs.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Qu’importe donc la souffrance, Jesus vient! levons les yeux! 
Bien pres de la delivrance. (Ils s’ouvrent les cieux!)(2x)

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Speak to my soul, dear Jesus, 
Speak now in tend’rest tone;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Whisper in loving kindness, 
“Thou art not left alone.”

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Open my heart to hear Thee, 
Quickly to hear Thy voice,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Fill thou my soul with praises,
 Let me in Thee rejoice.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Speak to Thy children ever,
 Lead in the holy way;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Fill them with joy and gladness, 
Teach them to watch and pray.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
May they in consecration 
Yield their whole lives to Thee,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Hasten Thy coming kingdom, 
Till our dear Lord we see.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Speak now as in the old time 
Thou didst reveal Thy will;

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Let me know all my duty, 
Let me Thy law fulfill.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Lead me to glorify Thee, 
Help me to show Thy praise,

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Gladly to do Thy bidding, 
Honor Thee all my days

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Speak Thou in softest whispers 
Whispers of love to me,

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
“Thou shall be always conq’ror, 
Thou shall be always free.

sections.label: Chorus 3
sections.text:
”Speak Thou to me each day, Lord, 
Always in tend’rest tone,

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Tous unis dans l'esprit,
Tous unis en Jesus; (2x)

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Nous prions que bientot
Ce qui divise ne soit plus.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Et le monde saura que 
Nous sommes Chretiens

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Par l'amour dont 
Nos actes sont empreints.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Nous marchons cote a cote
Et la main dans la main; (2x)

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
A la table du Rois
Nous partageons le meme pain.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
D'un seul coeur nous voulons
Travailler pour Jesus; (2x)

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Proclamer a tout homme
Qu'il nous offre le salut.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Gloire au Dieu Createur De la terre et de cieux
Gloire au Dieu Eternel Redempteur glorieux

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Gloire, gloire au Christ Qui verse en nous 
L'amour de Dieu.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Et le monde saura que 
Nous sommes Chretiens

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Par l'amour dont 
Nos actes sont empreints.

title: WHEN I GET TO THE END OF THE WAY

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
The sands have been washed in the footprints 
Of the Stranger on Galilee’s shore,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
And the voice that subdued the rough billows,
Will be heard in Judea no more,

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
But the path of that lone Galilean
With joy I will follow today,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
And the toils of the road will seem nothing,
When I get to the end of the way,

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
And the toils of the road will seem nothing,
When I get to the end of the way.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
There are so many hills to climb upward, 
I often am longing for rest,

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
But He who appoints me my pathway,
Knows just what is needful and best,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
I know in His word He hath promised 
That my strength, “it shall be as my day,”

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
And the toils of the road will seem nothing. 
When I get to the end of the way,

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
And the  toils of the road will seem nothing,
When I get to the end of the  way.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
He loves me too well to forsake me 
Or give me one trial too much,

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
By and by I shall see Him and praise Him, 
In the city of unending day,

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
And The toils of the  road will seem nothing, 
When I get to the end of the way.

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
When the last feeble step has been taken, 
And the gates of that city appear,

sections.label: Verse 15
sections.text:
And the beautiful songs of the angels
Float out on my listening hear,

sections.label: Verse 16
sections.text:
When all that now seems so mysterious 
Will be bright and as clear as the day,

sections.label: Verse 17
sections.text:
Then the toils of the road will seem nothing. 
When I get to the end of the way,

sections.label: Verse 18
sections.text:
Then the toils of the road will seem nothing,
When I get to the end of the way.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Spirit of the living God,
 fall fresh on me;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Spirit of the living God,
 fall fresh on me;

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Break me! Melt me!
 Mould me! Fill me!

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Spirit of the living God,
 fall fresh on me.

title: I HAVE DECIDED TO FOLLOW JESUS

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I have decided to follow Jesus(x3)
no turning back, no turning back.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
The world behind me, the cross before me(x3)
no turning back, no turning back.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Thou none go with me, still I will follow (x3)
no turning back, no turning back.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text: I HAVE DECIDED TO FOLLOW JESUS

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Hark! ‘tis the Shepherd’s voice I hear,
Out in the desert dark and drear,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Calling the sheep who’ve gone astray,
Far from the Shepherd’s fold away.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Bring them in, bring them in,
Bring them in from the fields of sin;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Bring them in, bring them in,
Bring the wondering ones to Jesus.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Who’ll go and help this Shepherd kind,
Help Him the wand’ring ones to find?

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Who’ll bring the lost ones to the fold,
Where they’ll be sheltered from the cold?

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Out in the desert hear their cry,
Out on the mountains wild and high;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Hark! ‘tis the Master speaks to thee,
“Go find My sheep where’er they be.”`

title: WHAT CAN WASH AWAY MY SINS

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
What can wash away my sin?
Nothing but the blood of Jesus;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
What can make me whole again?
Nothing but the blood of Jesus.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Oh, precious is the flow,
That makes me white as  snow;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
No other fount I know,
Nothing but the blood of Jesus.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
For my cleansing this I see,
Nothing but the blood of Jesus;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
For my pardon this my plea,
Nothing but the blood of Jesus.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Nothing can for sin atone,
Nothing but the blood of Jesus;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Naught of good that I have done,
Nothing but the blood of Jesus.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
This is all my hope and peace,
Nothing but the blood of Jesus;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
This is all my righteousness,
Nothing but the blood of Jesus.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Now by this I'll overcome,
Nothing but the blood of Jesus;

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Now by this I'll reach my home,
Nothing but the blood of Jesus.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Glory! Glory! thus I sing,
Nothing but the blood of Jesus;

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
All my praise for this I bring,
Nothing but the blood of Jesus.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Come to the Saviour, Make no delay;
Here in His word He’s shown us the way

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Here in our midst He’s standing today,
Tenderly saying “Come!”

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Joyful, Joyful Will the meeting be
When from sin Our hearts are pure and free;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
And we shall gather,Saviour, with Thee,
In our eternal home.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Suffer the children Oh hear his voice.
Let every heart Leap forth and rejoice

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
And let us freely Make Him our choice
Do not delay but come.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Think once again He’s with us today
Heed now His blest Commands, and obey

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Hear now His accents Tenderly say
Will you My children come?

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
he name of Jesus is so sweet,
I love its music to repeat,
It makes my joys full and complete,
The precious name of Jesus precious name.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Jesus Oh how sweet the name!
''Jesus'' every the same,''Jesus'', let all
Saints proclaim its worthy praise forever
Its worthy praise.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
love the name of Him whose heart
Knows all my griefs and bears a part;
Who bids all anxious fears depart 
I love the name of Jesus.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
hat name I fondly love to hear,
It never fails my heart to cheer,
Its music dries the falling tear;
Exalt the name of Jesus.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
o word of man can ever tell
How sweet the name I love so well;
Oh, let its praises ever sweet,
Oh, praise the name of Jesus.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Jesus Oh how sweet the name!
''Jesus'' every the same,''Jesus'', let all
Saints proclaim its worthy praise forever
Its worthy praise.
*

title: HARK A VOICE DIVIDES THE SKY
WHAT A DAY THAT WILL BE

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
There is coming a day when no heartaches shall come,
No more clouds in the sky, no more tears to dim the eye;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
All is peace forevermore on that happy golden shore,
What a day, glorious day that will be.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
What a day that will be when my Jesus I shall see,
And I look upon His face, the One who saved me by His grace;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text: When He takes me by His hand, and leads me through the Promised Land, What a day, glorious day that will be.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
There’ll be no sorrow there, no more burdens to bear,
No more sickness, no pain, no more parting over there;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
And forever I will be with the One who died for me,
What a day, glorious day that will be.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
What a day that will be when my Jesus I shall see,
And I look upon His face, the One who saved me by His grace;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text: When He takes me by His hand, and leads me through the Promised Land, What a day, glorious day that will be.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Walking in sunlight all of my journey,
Over the mountains, through the deep vale;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Jesus has said, I’ll never forsake thee;
Promise divine that never can fail.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Heavenly sunlight, Heavenly sunlight,
Flooding my soul with glory divine;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Hallelujah I am rejoicing, 
Singing his praises,
Jesus is mine.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Shadows  around me shadows above me,
Never conceal my Saviour and Guide;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
He is the light, in Him is no darkness,
Ever I’m walking close to his side.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
In the bright sunlight, ever rejoicing, 
Pressing my way to mansions above;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Singing His praises, gladly I’m walking, 
Walking in sunlight, sunlight of love.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I must tell Jesus all of my trials;
I cannot bear these burdens alone;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
In my distress He kindly will help me;
He ever loves and cares for His own.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
I must tell Jesus! I must tell Jesus!
I cannot bear my burdens alone;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
I must tell Jesus! I must tell Jesus!
Jesus can help me, Jesus alone.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
I must tell Jesus all of my troubles;
He is a kind, compassionate Friend;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
If I but ask Him, He will deliver,
Make of my troubles quickly an end.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Tempted and tried I need a great Savior,
One who can help my burdens to bear;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
I must tell Jesus, I must tell Jesus;
He all my cares and sorrows will share.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
O how the world to evil allures me!
O how my heart is tempted to sin!

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
I must tell Jesus, And He will help me
Over the world the vict’ry to win.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
I must tell Jesus! 
I must tell Jesus!

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
I cannot bear my burdens alone;
I must tell Jesus!

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
I must tell Jesus!
Jesus can help me, Jesus alone

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
SOME DAY THE SILVER CORD WILL BREAK,
AND I NO MORE AS NOW SHALL SING;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
BUT OH, THE JOY WHEN I SHALL WAKE
WITHIN THE PALACE OF THE KING.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
AND I SHALL SEE HIM FACE TO FACE,
AND TELL THE STORY SAVED BY GRACE;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
AND I SHALL SEE HIM FACE TO FACE,
AND TELL THE STORY SAVED BY GRACE.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
SOME DAY, WHEN FADES THE GOLDEN SUN,
BENEATH THE ROSY TINTED WEST,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
MY BLESSED LORD SHALL SAY, “WELL DONE”
AND I SHALL ENTER INTO REST.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
SOME DAY; TILL THEN I’LL WATCH AND WAIT
MY LAMP ALL TRIMM’D AND BURNING BRIGHT;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
THAT WHEN MY SAVIOUR OPENS THE GATE.
MY SOUL TO HIM MAY TAKE ITS FLIGHT

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
AND I SHALL SEE HIM FACE TO FACE,
AND TELL THE STORY SAVED BY GRACE;

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
AND I SHALL SEE HIM FACE TO FACE,
AND TELL THE STORY SAVED BY GRACE.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
All to Jesus I surrender,
All to Him I freely give;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
I will ever love and trust Him,
In His presence daily live.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
I surrender all,
I surrender all,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
All to Thee, my blessed Savior,
I surrender all.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
All to Jesus I surrender,
Humbly at His feet I bow,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Worldly pleasures all forsaken,
Take me, Jesus, take me now,

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
All to Jesus I surrender,
Make me, Savior, wholly Thine;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Let me feel the Holy Spirit, truly know that
Thou art mine.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
All to Jesus I surrender,
Lord, I give myself to Thee;

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Fill me with Thy love and power,
Let Thy blessing fall on me.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
All to Jesus I surrender,
Now I feel the sacred flame;

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Oh, the joy of full salvation!
Glory, glory to His name.

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
I surrender all,
I surrender all,

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
All to Thee, my blessed Savior,
I surrender all.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Je suis la lumiere,
A dit le Seigneur;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Avec moi mon frere,
Ouvre Lui ton coeur.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Le monde est plein d'ombre:
Brillons, brillons bien,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Toi dans ton coin sombre,
Et moi dans le mien.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Si la pure flame parfois
Baisse un peu,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Veillons sur notre ame,
Ravivons le feu.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Le monde est plein d'ombre:
Brillons, brillons bien,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Toi dans ton coin sombre,
Et moi dans le mien.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Quand le jour se voile
Au clair firmament,

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
La plus humble etoile
Brille doucement.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Le monde est plein d'ombre:
Brillons, brillons bien,

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Toi dans ton coin sombre,
Et moi dans le mien.
*

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I’ve reached the land of corn and wine, 
And all its riches freely mine;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Here shines undimmed one blissful day, 
For all my night has passed away.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
My Saviour comes and walks with me, 
And sweet communion here have we;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
A sweet perfume upon the breeze 
Is borne from ever vernal trees,

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
The zephyrs seem to float to me, 
Sweet sounds of Heaven’s melody,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
As angels with the white-robed throng 
Join in the sweet Redemption song.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
O Beulah Land, sweet Beulah Land, 
As on thy highest mount I stand,

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
I look away across the sea, 
Where mansions are prepared for me,

sections.label: Chorus 3
sections.text:
And view the shining glory-shore, 
My heaven, my home forevermore!

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Come, we that love the Lord,
And let our joys be known,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Join in a song with sweet accord,
Join in a song with sweet accord,

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
And thus surround the throne,
And thus surround the throne.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Let those refuse to sing
Who never knew our God;

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
But children of the heavenly King,
But children of the heavenly King,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
May speak their joys abroad,
May speak their joys abroad.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
The hill of Zion yields
A thousand sacred sweets

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Before we reach the heavenly fields,
Before we reach the heavenly fields,

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Or walk the golden streets,
Or walk the golden streets.

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Then let our songs abound,
And every tear be dry;

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
We’re marching thru Immanuel’s ground,
We’re marching thru Immanuel’s ground,

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
To fairer worlds on high.
To fairer  worlds on high.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
We’re marching to Zion.
Beautiful, beautiful Zion;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
We’re marching Upward to Zion,
The beautiful city of God.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Tempted and tried We’re oft made to wonder
Why it should be thus all the day long,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
While there are others living about us,
Never molested though in the wrong.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Farther along we’ll know all about it,
Farther along we’ll understand why;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Cheer up, my brother, Live in the sunshine,
We’ll understand it all by and by.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
When death has come And taken our loved ones,
It leaves our home so lonely and drear;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Then do we wonder why others prosper;
Living so wicked year after year.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Faithful till death said our loving Master,
A few more days to labor and wait;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Toils of the road will Then seem as nothing,
As we sweep through the beautiful gate.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
When we see Jesus coming in glory,
When He comes from His home in the sky;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Then we shall meet Him In that bright mansion,
We’ll understand it all by and by.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Jésus ne change pas, (ter)
Non, jamais!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Jésus m’a pardonné, (ter)
Pour toujours!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Jésus me satisfait, (ter)
Pour toujours!

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Jésus me recevra, (ter)
Dans le ciel!

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Toujours près de Jésus (ter)
Je serai!

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Gloire, Gloire à Jésus! (ter)!
A jamais!

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
On a hill far away stood an old rugged cross,
The emblem of suff’ring and shame,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
And I love that old cross 
Where the Dearest and Best,

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
For a world of lost
sinners was slain.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
So I’ll cherish the old rugged cross,
Till my trophies at last I lay down;

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
I will cling to the old rugged cross,
And exchange it some day for a crown.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Oh, that old rugged cross, 
So despised by the world,

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Has a wondrous 
attraction for me;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
For the dear Lamb of God 
Left His glory above,

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
To bear it to 
dark Calvary.

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
In the old rugged cross, 
Stained with

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
blood so divine,
A wondrous beauty I see,

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
For ‘twas on that old cross 
Jesus suffered and died,

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
To pardon 
and sanctify me.

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
To the old rugged cross 
I will ever be true,

sections.label: Verse 15
sections.text:
Its shame and 
reproach gladly bear;

sections.label: Verse 16
sections.text:
Then He’ll call me some day 
To my home far away,

sections.label: Verse 17
sections.text:
Where His glory 
forever I’ll share.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Fear not, little flock,
From the cross to the throne,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Fear not, little flock, he goeth ahead, 
Your shepherd selected

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Fear not, little flock, whatever your lot, 
He enters all rooms,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
The doors being shut;
He never forsakes, he never is gone,

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
So count on his presence 
In darkness and dawn.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Only believe, Only believe,
All things are possible,

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Only believe, Only believe,
All things are possible,

sections.label: Chorus 3
sections.text:
Only believe, Only believe,
All things are possible,

sections.label: Chorus 4
sections.text:
Only believe;
Only believe, Only believe,

sections.label: Chorus 5
sections.text:
All things are possible, 
Only believe.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Man of sorrows! what a name 
For the Son of God, who came

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Ruined sinners to reclaim! 
Hallelujah! what a Saviour!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Bearing shame and scoffing rude, 
In my place condemned He stood;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Sealed my pardon with His blood: 
Hallelujah! what a Saviour!

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Guilty, vile, and helpless, we; 
Spotless Lamb of God was He:

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Full atonement—can it be? 
Hallelujah! what a Saviour!

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Lifted up was He to die, 
‘It is finished!’ was His cry:

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Now in heaven exalted high: 
Hallelujah! what a Saviour!

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
When He comes, our glorious King, 
All His ransomed home to bring,

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Then anew this song we’ll sing: 
‘Hallelujah! what a Saviour!’

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
More about Jesus would I know;
 More of His grace to others show;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
More of His saving fullness see; 
More of His love who died for me.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
More about Jesus let me learn;
 More of His holy will discern.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Spirit of God, my Teacher be,
 Showing the things of Christ to me.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
More about Jesus; in His Word,
 Holding communion with my Lord;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Hearing His voice in every line;
 Making each faithful saying mine.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
More about Jesus on His throne,
 Riches in glory all His own;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
More of His kingdom’s sure increase;
 More of His coming, Prince of Peace.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
More, more about Jesus; 
More, more about Jesus;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
More of His saving fullness see; 
More of His love who died for me.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Does Jesus care, when my heart is pained
Too deeply for mirth or song

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
As the burdens press, and the cares distress,
And the way grows weary and long?

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Oh, yes He cares, I know He cares
His heart is touched with my grief,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
When the days are weary, the long nights dreary,
I know my Saviour cares.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Does Jesus care when my way is dark,
With a nameless dread and fear?

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
As the daylight fades into deep night shades,
Does He care enough to be near?

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Oh, yes He cares, I know He cares
His heart is touched with my grief,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
When the days are weary, the long nights dreary,
I know my Saviour cares.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Does Jesus care, when I’ve tried and failed
To  resist some temptation strong,

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
When for my deep grief I find no relief,
Though my tears flow all the night long?

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Oh, yes He cares, I know He cares
His heart is touched

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
With my grief,When the days are weary, 
The long nights dreary,I know my Saviour cares.

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
Does  Jesus care, when I’ve said “Goodbye”
To the dearest on earth to me,

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
And my sad heart aches Till it nearly breaks
It is aught to Him? Does He see?

sections.label: Verse 15
sections.text:
Oh, yes He cares, I know He cares 
His heart is touched With my grief,

sections.label: Verse 16
sections.text:
When the days are weary, 
The long nights dreary, I know my Saviour cares.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
There’s a call comes ringing O’er the restless wave
“Send the light, send the light”. There are souls to rescue, 
There are souls to save, “Send the light, send the light”.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
We have heard The Macedonian call today, 
“Send the light, send the light!”. And our grateful offring 
At the cross we lay, “ Send the light, send the light!”.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
May the grace of Jesus unto all abound, 
“Send the light, send the light!” And a Christ like spirit 
Ev’ry where be found, ” Send the light, send the light!”

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Let us not grow weary In the work of love, 
“Send the light, Send the light!” While we gather 
Jewels for our crown above, “Send the light, Send the light!”

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Send the light! Send the light! Send the light!
The blessed gospel light, Let it shine from shore to shore
Send the light, the blessed gospel light, Let it shine for evermore.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Softly and tenderly Jesus is calling,
Calling for you and for me,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
See on the portals He’s waiting and watching,
Watching for you and for me.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Why should we tarry When Jesus is pleading,
Pleading for you and for me?

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Why should we linger And heed not His mercies,
Mercies for you and for me?

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Time is now fleeting, The moments are passing,
Passing from you and from me;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Shadows are gathering, Death’s night is coming,
Coming for you and for me.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Oh! for the wonderful love He has promised,
Promised for you and for me;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Though we have sinned, He has mercy and pardon,
Pardon for you and for me.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Come home, come home,
Ye who are weary, come home;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Earnestly, tenderly, Jesus is calling, calling, 
O sinner, come home!

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I am Thine, O Lord,
I have heard Thy voice,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
And it told Thy love to me;
But I long to rise

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
In the arms of faith,
And be closer drawn to Thee.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Draw me nearer,Nearer blessed Lord!
To the cross whereThou hast died;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Draw me nearer, nearer,nearer, blessed Lord,
To Thy precious, bleeding side.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Consecrate me now
To Thy service, Lord,

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
By the pow’r of grace divine;
Let my soul look up

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
With a steadfast hope,
And my will be lost in Thine.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Oh, the pure delight
Of a single hour

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
That before Thy throne I spend,
When I kneel in prayer,

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
And with Thee, my God,
I commune as friend with friend.

sections.label: Verse 10
