sections.text:
There are depths of love
That I cannot know

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Till I cross the narrow sea,
There are heights of joy

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
That I may not reach,
Till I rest in peace with Thee.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Hallelujah! Hallelujah!
Hallelujah! Hallelujah, Hallelujah!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Seek ye first the kingdom of God,
And His righteousness,

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
And all these things shall be added unto you.
Hallelujah, Hallelujah!

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Hallelujah! Hallelujah!
Hallelujah! Hallelujah, Hallelujah!

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Man shall not live by bread alone,
But by every word, that proceeds

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
From the mouth of God.
Hallelujah, Hallelujah!

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Hallelujah! Hallelujah!
Hallelujah! Hallelujah, Hallelujah!

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Ask and it shall be given unto you,
Seek and ye shall find,

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Knock and the door shall be opened up to you.
Hallelujah, Hallelujah!

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Hallelujah! Hallelujah!
Hallelujah! Hallelujah, Hallelujah!

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Must I go-and empty-handed?
Thus my dear redeemer meet?

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Not one day of service give Him,
Lay no trophies at his feet?

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Must I go-empty-handed?
Must I meet my Saviour so?

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Not one soul with which to greet Him?
Must I empty-handed go?

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Not at death I shrink or falter,
For My Saviour saves me now;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
But to meet Him empty-handed,
Thought of that now clouds my brow.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Oh, the years of sinning wasted,
Could I but recall them now,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
I would give them to my Saviour,
To His will I’d gladly bow.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Must I go-empty handed?
Must I meet my Saviour so?

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Not one soul with which to greet Him?
Must I empty-handed go?

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Up, ye saints arouse, be earnest!
Up and work while yet ‘tis day;

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Ere the night of death o’ertake you,
Strike for souls while yet you may.

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
Must I go-empty handed?
Must I meet my Saviour so?

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
Not one soul with which to greet Him?
Must I empty-handed go?

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Jesus! source of life eternal,
Jesus! author of our breath

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Thou, O Son of God, wert bearing
Cruel mockings, hatred, scorn;

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
All the shame men heaped upon Thee,
Thou didst patiently endure;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Heartfelt praise and adoration,
Saviour, thus to Thee we give;

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
For thy life humiliation,
For Thy death, whereby we live.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
All the grief Thou wert securing,
All the bliss Thy wert securing:

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
(Evermore the theme shall be
Of thanksgivings, Lord, to Thee.)(2x)

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I can hear my Saviour calling,
“Take thy cross, and follow, follow Me.”

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Where He leads me I will follow,
I’ll go with Him, with Him all the way.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
I’ll go with Him through the garden,
I’ll go with Him, with Him all the way.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
I’ll go with Him through the judgment,
I’ll go with Him, with Him all the way.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
He will give me grace and glory,
And go with me, with me all the way.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Le Seigneur m'aime Bonheur supreme
Le Seigneur m'aime Il est amour!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Je redirai toujours Le Seigneur m'aime
Le Seigneur m'aime Il est amour!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Dans la misere, La plus amere,
Dans la misere J'etais plonge

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Dans la souffrance Sans esperance
Dans la souffrance Je gemissais.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Portant ma peine Ma lourde chaine
Portant ma peine J'etais perdu

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Dieu dans sa grace Prit a ma place
Dieu dans sa grace Prit son cher Fils.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
En sacrifice A la justice
En sacrifice Il vint s'offrir

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Le poids immense De mon offense
Le poids immense Tomba sur lui

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Sur le calvaire Loin de son Pere
Sur le calvaire Il vint mourir

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Il purifie Toute ma vie
Il purifie Avec son Sang

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
A toi la gloire Et la victoire
A toi la gloire Agneau de Dieu

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Je redirai toujours Le Seigneur m'aime
Le Seigneur m'aime Il est amour!

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Hear the Lord of harvest sweetly calling
Who will go and work for me today?

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Who will bring to Me the lost and dying?
Who will point them to the narrow way?

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Speak, my Lord, speak, my Lord,
Speak, and I'll be quick to answer Thee;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Speak, my Lord, speak, my Lord,
Speak and I will answer, Lord send me.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
When the coal of fire touched the prophet,
Making him as pure, as pure can be,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
When the voice of God said, who'll go for us?
Then he answered, Here I am, send me.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Millions now in sin and shame are dying,
Listen to their sad and bitter cry;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Hasten, brother, hasten to the rescue;
Quickly answer, Master here am I.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Soon the time for reaping will be over;
Soon we'll gather for the harvest home;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
May the Lord of harvest smile upon us,
May we hear His blessed, Child, well done.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
heard an old, old story,
How a Savior came from glory,
How He gave His life on Calvary
To save a wretch like me;
I heard about His groaning,
Of His precious blood’s atoning,
Then I repented of my sins
And won the victory.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
O victory in Jesus,
My Savior, forever,
He sought me and bought me
With His redeeming blood;
He loved me ere I knew  Him
And all my love is due Him,
He plunged me to victory,
Beneath the cleansing flood.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
heard about His healing,
Of His cleansing pow’r revealing,
How He made the lame to walk again
And caused the blind to see;
And then I cried, “Dear Jesus,
Come and heal my broken spirit,”
And somehow Jesus came and brought
To me the victory.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
heard about a mansion
He has built for me in glory,
And I heard about the streets of gold
Beyond the crystal sea;
About the angels singing,
And the old redemption story,
And some sweet day I’ll sing up there
The song of victory.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
O victory in Jesus,
My Savior, forever,
He sought me and bought me
With His redeeming blood;
He loved me ere I knew Him
And all my love is due Him,
He plunged me to victory,
Beneath the cleansing flood.
*

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
In shady, green pastures, So rich and so sweet,
God leads His dear children along;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Some through the waters, Some through the flood,
Some through the fire, But all through the blood;

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Sometimes on the mount Where the sun shines so bright,
God leads His dear children along;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Tho’ sorrows befall us, And Satan oppose,
God leads His dear children along;

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Away from the mire, And away from the clay,
God leads His dear children along;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Away up in glory, Eternity’s day,
God leads His dear children along.

title: JUST A CLOSER WALK WITH THEE

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I am weak but Thou art strong. 
Jesus keep me from all wrong;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
I’ll be satisfied as long, 
As I walk let me walk close to Thee.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Just a closer walk with Thee,
 Grant it, Jesus, is my plea;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Daily walking close to Thee, 
Let it be, dear Lord, let it be.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Thru this world of toil and snares,
 If I falter, Lord, who cares?

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Who with me my burden shares?
None but Thee, dear Lord, none but Thee.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
When my feeble life is o’er,
 Time for me will be no more;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Guide me gently, safely o’er,
 To Thy kingdom shore, to Thy shore.

title: ALL HAIL THE POWER OF JESUS NAME

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
All hail the power of Jesus' name! Let angels prostrate fall;
Bring forth the royal diadem, And crown Him Lord of all.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Crown Him, ye martyrs of your God, Who from His altar call;
Extol Him in whose path ye trod, And crown Him Lord of all.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Ye chosen seed of Israel’s race, Ye ransomed of the fall,
Hail Him who saves you by His grace, And crown Him Lord of all.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Sinners, whose love can ne’er forget The wormwood and the gall,
Go, spread your trophies at His feet, And crown Him Lord of all.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Let every kindred, every tribe On this terrestrial ball,
To Him all majesty ascribe, And crown Him Lord of all.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
O that, with yonder sacred throng, We at His feet may fall,
Join in the everlasting song, And crown Him Lord of all!

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
O soul are you weary and troubled?
No light in the darkness you see?

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Turn your eyes upon Jesus,
Look full in His wonderful face,

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Throu't death into to life everlasting,
He passed and we follow Him there;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
His word shall not fail you He promised;
Believe Him, and all will  be well:

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Turn your eyes upon Jesus,
Look full in His wonderful face,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
And the things of earth will grow strangly dim,
In the light of His glory and grace.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
When I survey The wondrous cross,
On which the Prince Of glory died,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
My richest gain I count but loss,
And pour contempt On all my pride.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Forbid it, Lord, That I should boast,
Save in the death Of Christ, my God;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
All the vain things That charm me most,
I sacrifice them to His blood.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
See, from his head, His hands, his feet,
Sorrow and love Flow mingled down,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Did e’er such love And sorrow meet,
Or thorns compose So rich a crown?

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Were the whole realm Of nature mine, 
That were a present Far too small;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Love so amazing, So divine,
Demands my soul, My life, my all!

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
There is a name I love to hear,
I love to sing its worth;It sounds like

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Music in mine ear,
The  sweetest name on earth.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Oh, how I love Jesus,(x3)
Because He first loved me.
(I’ll never forsake Him . . .)

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
It tells me of A Saviour’s love,
Who died to set me free;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
It tells me of His precious blood;
The sinner’s perfect plea.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
It tells me what My Father hath 
In store for every day,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
And though I tread A darksome path,
Yields sunshine all the way.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
It tells of One Whose loving heart 
Can feel my deepest woe,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Who in each Sorrow bears a part,
That none can bear below.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
O for a thousand tongues to sing 
My great Redeemer’s praise, 
My great Redeemer’s praise! 
The glories of my God and King, 
The triumphs of His grace!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Jesus! the name that charms our fears, 
That bids our sorrows cease, 
That bids our sorrows cease; 
’Tis music in the sinner’s ears, 
’Tis life, and health, and peace.

sections.label: Verse 3
Verse 4
sections.text:
He breaks the power of cancelled sin, 
He sets the prisoner free, 
He sets the prisoner free; 
His blood can make the foulest clean, 
His blood availed for me.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
He speaks and, listening to His voice, 
New life the dead receive, 
New life the dead receive; 
The mournful, broken hearts rejoice, 
The humble poor believe.

sections.label: Verse 6
Verse 7
sections.text:
My gracious Master and my God, 
Assist me to proclaim, 
Assist me to proclaim, 
To spread through all the earth abroad 
The honours of Thy name.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Once our blessed Christ of beauty
Was veiled off from human view;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
But through suffering, death and sorrow
He has rent the veil in two.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
O behold the man of sorrows,
O behold Him in plain view;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
(Lo! He is the mighty conqueror,
Since He rent the veil in two.)(2x)

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Now He is with God the Father,
Interceding there for you;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
For He is the mighty conqueror,
Since He rent the veil in two.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Holy angels bow before Him,
Men of earth give praises due;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
For He is the well beloved
Since he rent the veil in two.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Through out time and endless ages,
Heights and depths of love so true;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
He alone can be the giver
Since He rent the veil in two.

title: HE WAS NAILED TO THE CROSS FOR ME

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
What a wonderful, wonderful Savior
Who w'ud die on the cross for me!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Freely shedding His precious life blood,
That the sinner might be made free.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
He was nailed to the cross for me;
He was nailed to the cross for me;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
On the cross crucified, for me He died:
He was nailed to the cross for me.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Thus He left His heavenly glory
To accomplish His Father's plan;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
He was born of the virgin Marry,
Took upon Him the form of man.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
He was wounded for our transgressions,
And He carried our sorrows, too;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
He's the Healer of ev'ry sickness,
This He came to the world to do.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
So He gave His life for others
In redeeming this world from sin

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
And He's gone to prepare a mansion,
That at last we may enter in.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Living below In this old sinful world,
Hardly a comfort can afford;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Striving aloneTo face temptations sore,
Where could I go? But to the Lord

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Where could I go? O where could I go?
Seeking a refuge for my soul?

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Needing a friend To help me in the end,
Where could I go? But to the Lord

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Neighbours are kind, I love them every one,
We get along in sweet accord;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
But when my soul Needs manna from above,
Where could I go? But to the Lord

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Life here is grand with friends  I love so dear,
Comfort I get From God’s own word;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Yet when I face  The chilling hand of death,
Where could I go? But to the Lord

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
C’est mon joyeux service
D’offrir à Jésus Christ,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
En vivant sacrifice,
Mon corps et mon esprit.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
J’abandonne ma vie, 
Sans regret, ni frayeur,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
A ta grâce infinie,
O mon libérateur!

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Qu’un feu nouveau s’allume
Par ton amour en moi,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Et dans mon Coeur consume
Ce qui n’est pas à toi!

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Viens, Jésus! Sois mon Maître;
Par Ton sang racheté,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
A toi seul je veux être
Et pour l’éternité.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Accepte mon offrande, Bien-aimé Fils de Dieu!
Et que sur moi descende La flame du Saint lieu!

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Day by day, and with each passing moment,
Strength I find, to meet my trials here;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Trusting in my Father’s wise bestowment,
I’ve no cause for worry or for fear.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
He Whose heart is kind beyond all measure
Gives unto each day what He deems best

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Lovingly, its part of pain and pleasure,
Mingling toil with peace and rest.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Every day, the Lord Himself is near me
With a special mercy for each hour;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
All my cares He fain would bear, and  cheer me,
He Whose Name is Counselor and Power;

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
The protection of His child and treasure
Is a charge that on Himself He laid;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
“As thy days, thy strength shall be in measure,”
This the pledge to me He made.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Help me then in every tribulation
So to trust Thy promises, O Lord,

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
That I lose not faith’s sweet consolation
Offered me whithin Thy holy Word.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Help me, Lord, when toil and trouble meeting,
E'er to take, as from a Father’s had,

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
One by one, the days, the moments fleeting,
Till I reach the promised land.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text: He careth for you, (2X)

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Through sunshine or shadow,
He careth for you.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
God is so good, God is so good,
God is so good, He’s so good to me.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Jesus is so real, Jesus is so real,
Jesus is so real, He’s so real to me.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Now I am free, Now I am free,
Now I am free, He’s so good to me.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
God is so good, He took my sin,
Now I am free, He’s so good to me.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
He saved my soul, He saved my soul.
He saved my soul, and he made me whole.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
I'll praise his name, I'll praise his name.
I'll praise his name, He's so good to me.

title: I KNOW THAT MY REDEEMER LIVES

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I know that my Reedemer liveth,
And on the earth again shall stand;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
I know eternal life He giveth,
That grace and pow'r are in His hand.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
I know, I know that Jesus liveth
And on the earth again shall stand

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
I know, I know that life He giveth
That grace and pow'r are in His hand.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
I know His promise never failleth
The word He speaks, it cannot die;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Tho' cruel death my flesh assailleth,
Yet I shall see Him by and by.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
I know my mansion He prepareth,
That where He is there I may be

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
O wondrous tho't for me He careth
And He at last will come for me.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
own from His glory, ever living story,
My God and Saviour came,  and Jesus was His Name,
Born in a manger, to His own a stranger,
A Man of sorrows, tears and agony.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
O how I love Him! 
How I adore Him!
My breath, my sunshine,
 my all in all!
The Great Creator 
became my Saviour,
And all God’s fullness 
dwelleth in Him.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
hat condescension, 
Bringing us redemption;
That in the dead of night, 
Not one faint hope in sight;TTTTT
God, gracious, tender, 
Laid aside His splendor,
Stooping to woo, to win, 
Tto save my soul.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
ithout reluctance, 
Flesh and blood His substance,
He took the form of man, 
Revealed the hidden plan.
O glorious mystery, 
Sacrifice of Calvary,
And now I know 
Thou art the great “I AM ".

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
O how I love Him! 
How I adore Him!
My breath, my sunshine,
my all in all!
The Great Creator 
became my Saviour,
And all God’s fullness 
dwelleth in Him.
*

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
If the world from you with hold of its silver and its gold,
And you have to get along with meager fare,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Just remember, in His Word, how He feeds the little bird;
Take your burden to the Lord and leave it there.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Leave it there, leave it there,
Take your burden to the Lord and leave it there;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
If you trust and never doubt, He will surely bring you out;
Take your burden to the Lord and leave it there.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
If your body suffers pain and your health you can’t regain,
And your soul is almost sinking in despair,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Jesus knows the pain you feel, He can save and He can heal;
Take your burden to the Lord and leave it there.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
When your enemies assail and your heart begins to fail,
Don’t forget that God in heaven answers prayer;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
He will make a way for you and will lead you safely through;
Take your burden to the Lord and leave it there.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
When your youthful days are gone and old age is stealing on,
And your body bends beneath the weight of care;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
He will never leave you then, He’ll go with you to the end;
Take your burden to the Lord and leave it there.

title: HAVE YOU BEEN BAPTIZED INTO THE BODY
PRAISE TO THE LORD THE ALMIGHTY

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Praise to the Lord, the Almighty, 
The King of creation!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
O my soul, praise Him, 
For He is your health and salvation!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Come all who hear; now to His temple draw near, 
Join me in glad adoration!

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Praise to the Lord, 
Above all things so wondrously reigning;

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Sheltering you under His wings, 
And so gently sustaining!

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Have you not seen all that is needful has been
Sent by His gracious ordaining?

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Praise to the Lord, 
Who will prosper your work and defend you:

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Surely His goodness and mercy 
Shall daily attend you.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Ponder a new what the Almighty can do,
If with His love He befriends you.

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Praise to the Lord, 
O let all that is in me adore Him!

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
All that has life and breath, 
Come now with praises before Him.

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Let the Amen sound from His people again;
Gladly forever adore Him.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Take my life, and let it be 
Consecrated, Lord to Thee;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Take my moments and my days
Let them flow in ceaseless praise.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Take my hands, and let them move
At the impulse of Thy love;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Take my feet, and let them be 
Swift and beautiful for Thee.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Take my voice, and let me sing
Always, only for my  King,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Take my lips, and let them be
Fill'd with messages from Thee.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Take my silver and my gold 
Not amite would I with hold,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Take my intellect and use
Every power as Thou shalt choose.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Take my will, and make it Thine
It shall be no longer mine,

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Take my heart it is Thine own,
It shall be Thy royal throne.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Take my love, my Lord, I pour 
At Thy feet its treasure store,

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Take myself, and I will be 
Ever, only, all for Thee.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Jesus lover of my soul;
Let me to Thy bosom fly,

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
While the nearer waters roll,
While the tempest still is high;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Hide me O my saviour, hide
Till the storm of life is past,

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Safe into the haven guide,
O recieve my soul at last !

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Other refuge have I none;
Hang my helpless soul on Thee;

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Leave oh! leave me not alone
Still support and comfort me.

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
All my trust on thee is stayed,
All my help from thee I bring

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Cover my defenseless head
With the shadow of thy wing.

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Plenteous grace with thee is found,
Grace to cover all my sin;

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Let the healing streams abound;
Make and keep me pure within

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Thou of life the fountain art, 
Freely let me take of thee

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
Spring them up within my heart,
Rise to all eternity.

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
vile and full of sin I am;
Thou art full of truth and grace

sections.label: Verse 15
sections.text:
Lo! I sink, I faint, I fall,
Lo! on thee! I cast my care

sections.label: Verse 16
sections.text:
Just and Holy is thy name, 
I am all unrighteousness;

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Holy words long preserved, 
For our walk in this world;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
They resound with God's own heart,
Oh, let thee ancient words impart,

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Words of life, words of hope, 
Give us strength, help us cope;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
In this world where we roam,
Ancient words will guide us home.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Ancient words, ever true, 
Changing me and Changing you;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
we have come With open hearts, 
Oh let the ancient words impart.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Holy words of our faith, 
Handed down to this age,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Came to us through sacrifice 
Oh heed the faithful words of Christ;

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Holy words long preserve, 
For our walk in this world;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
They resound with God's own heart 
Oh let the ancient words impart.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
How deep the father's love for us!
How vast beyond all measure!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
That He should give His only 
Son to make a wretch His treasure!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
How great the pain of searing loss!
The Father turns His face away.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
As wounds which mar the chosen One;
Bring many sons to glory.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Behold the man upon the cross!
My sin upon His shoulders

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Ashamed I hear my mocking voice 
Call out among the scoffers.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
It was my sin that held Him there.
Until it was accomplished.

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
His dying breath has brought me life!
I know that it is finished.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
I will not boast in anything;
No gift, no pow'r no wisdom.

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
But I will boast in Jesus Christ 
His death and resurrection.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Why should I gain from His reward?
I can not give an answer.

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
But this I know with all my heart;
His wounds has paid my ransom.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Wonderful, merciful Saviour, 
Precious Redeemer and friend

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Who would have thought that a Lamb could 
Rescue the  souls of men ? 
O You rescued the souls of men.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
You are the one that we praise, 
You are the one we adore ,

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
You give the healing and grace, 
Our hearts always hunger for, 
O our heart always hunger for.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Counselor, comforter, keeper, 
Spirit we long to embrace, 
You offer hope when our hearts,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Have hopelessly lost our way,
O we've hopelessly lost our way.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Almighty, infinite Father, 
Faithfully loving your own,
Here in our weakness you find us

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Falling before Your throne
Oh, we're falling before Your throne

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
A mighty fortress is our God. A bulwark never failing;
Our helper He amid the flood of mortal ills prevailling;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Did we in our own streghth confide, Our striving would be losing;
Were not  the right man on our side,

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
And though this world, with devils filled
Should threaten to undo us,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
That word above, all earthly powers
No thanks to them abideth.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Then Spirit and the gifts are ours,
Through Him who with us siddeth Let goods and kindred go,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
This mortal life also; The body they may kill,
God's truth abideth still; His kingdom is for ever.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
All along on the road to 
The soul's true abode,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
There's an eye watching you,
Every step that you take this

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Great eye is awake,
There's an eye watching you

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
As you make life's great fight,
Keep the path way of right,

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
There's an eye watching you,
God will warn not to go in

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
The path of the foe,
There's an eye watching you

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Fix your mind on the goal,
That sweet home of the soul,

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
There's an eye watching you,
Never turn from the way to the

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Kingdom of day,
There's an eye watching you

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Watching you (2x)
Everyday mind the course you pursue

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Watching you (2x)
There's an all seeing eye watching you.

title: WE HAVE COME INTO HIS HOUSE

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
We have come into His house 
And gathered in His name To worship Him (x2)

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
We have come into His house 
And gathered in His name

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
To worship Christ the Lord.
Worship Him Christ the Lord.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Let's forget about ourselves
And magnify the Lord And worship Him (x2)

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Let's forget about ourselves
And magnify the Lord

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
And worship Christ the lord.
Worship Him Christ the Lord.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
hen my life is ended and 
I cross the swelling tide,
When the bright and 
Glorious morning I shall see;
I shall know my Redeemer 
When I reach the other side, 
And His smile will be 
The first to welcome me.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
I shall know Him,
I shall know Him
As redeemed  by His side 
I shall stand;
I shall know Him, 
I shall know Him 
By the print of the nails in His hand.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
h the soulthrilling rapture 
When I view His blessed face, 
And the luster of 
His kindly beaming eye;
How my full heart will praise 
Him for the mercy, love and grace, 
That prepares for me 
A mansion in the sky.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
h the dear ones in glory, 
How they beckon me to come,
And our parting at the river i recall; 
In the sweet vales of Eden 
We shall meet no more to roam, 
But I long to see my Saviour first of all.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
hro' the gates  to the city, 
In a robe of spotless white,
He will lead me where 
No tears shall ever fall; 
In the glad song of ages 
I shall mingle with delight; 
But I long to meet 
My Saviour first of all.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
I shall know Him,
I shall know Him
As redeemed  by His side 
I shall stand;
I shall know Him, 
I shall know Him 
By the print of the nails in His hand.
*

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Seeking the lost, yes kindly entreating
Wanderers on the moutain astray;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
"Come  unto Me" His message repeating,
Words of the Master speaking today...

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Going afar upon the mountain bringing
The wand'rers back again, back again

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Into the fold of our Redeemer 
Jesus the Lamb for sinners  slain.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Seeking the lost, and pointing to Jesus 
Souls that are weak, and hearts that are sore;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Leading them forth in ways of salvation,
Showing the path to life evermore...

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Thus would we go on missions of mercy
Following Christ from day to day;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Cheering the faint, and raising the fallen,
Pointing the lost to Jesus the way...

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Alleluia! Sing to Jesus! His the Scepter His the throne;
Alleluia! His the triumph, His the Victory alone!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Hark! The songs of peaceful 
Zion thunder like a mighty flood;

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
''Jesus out of ev'ry nation has 
redeemed us by His blood.''

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Alleluia! Not as orphans 
Are we left in sorrow now;

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Alleluia! He is near us; 
Faith believes, nor questions how.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Though the cloud from sight 
received Him when the forty days were o'er,

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Shall our hearts forget His promise,
''I am with you evermore''?

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Alleluia! Bread of angels, 
Here on earth our food, our stay;

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Alleluia! Here the humble 
Flee to you from day to day.

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Intercessor, Friend of sinners,
 earth's Redeemer, hear our plea

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Where the songs of all the sinless 
sweep across the crystal sea.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Master, the tempest is  raging! 
The billows are tossing  high!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
The sky is  o’er- shadowed with blackness. 
No shelter or help is Nigh.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Carest thou not  that we perish? 
How canst thou lie asleep

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
When each moment so madly is threat’ning 
a grave in the  angry deep?

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Master, with anguish of spirit I bow in my grief today. 
The  depths of my sad heart are troubled.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Oh, waken and save, I pray!
 Torrents of sin and of anguish

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Sweep o’er my sinking soul, And I perish! 
I perish! dear Master. Oh, Hasten and take control!

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Master, the terror is over. 
The elements sweetly rest.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Earth’s sun in the calm lake is mirrored,
And heaven’s within my breast.

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Linger, O blessed Redeemer!
 Leave me alone no more,

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
And with joy I shall make the blest harbor
And Rest on the blissful shore.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
The winds and the waves shall obey thy will: 
Peace, be still.

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Whether the wrath of the storm-tossed sea 
Or demons or men or whatever  it be,

sections.label: Chorus 3
sections.text:
no waters can swal-low the ship  where lies 
the Master of ocean and earth and skies.

sections.label: Chorus 4
sections.text:
they all shall sweetly obey thy will: 
Peace, be still; peace, be still.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Thine be the glory, risen, conqu'ring Son:
endless is the vict'ry thou o’er death hast won;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
angels in bright raiment rolled the stone away,
kept the folded grave-clothes where thy body lay.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Thine be the glory, risen, conqu'ring Son;
Endless is the vict'ry thou o’er death hast won.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Lo! Jesus meets thee, risen from the tomb;
lovingly he greets us, scatters fear and gloom;

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
let the church with gladness, hymns of triumph sing,  
for her Lord now liveth, death hath lost its sting.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Thine be the glory, risen, conqu'ring Son;
endless is the vict'ry thou o’er death hast won.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
No more we doubt thee, glorious Prince of life;
life is naught without thee: aid us in our strife;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
make us more than conqu'rors, thro' thy deathless love;  
bring us safe thro' Jordan to thy home above.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Thine be the glory, risen, conqu'ring Son;
endless is the vict'ry thou o’er death hast won.

title: I WILL SING OF MY REDEEMER

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
There’ll be no dark valley when Jesus comes,
There’ll be no dark valley when Jesus comes;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
There’ll be no dark valley when Jesus comes
To gather His loved ones home.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
There’ll be no more sorrow when Jesus comes,
There’ll be no more sorrow when Jesus comes;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
But a glorious morrow when Jesus comes
To gather His loved ones home.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
There’ll be no more weeping when Jesus comes,
There’ll be no more weeping when Jesus comes;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
But a blessed reaping when Jesus comes
To gather His loved ones home.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
There’ll be songs of greeting when Jesus comes,
There’ll be songs of greeting when Jesus comes;

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
And a joyful meeting when Jesus comes
To gather His loved ones home.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
To gather His loved ones home (safe home),
To gather His loved ones home (safe home);

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
There’ll be no dark valley when Jesus comes
To gather His loved ones home.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text: MEET ME THERE

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
On the happy, golden shore, 
Where the faithful part no more,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
When the storms of life are o’er, 
Meet me there;

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Where the night dissolves away 
Into pure and perfect day,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
I am going home to stay 
Meet me there.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Meet me there, meet me there, 
Where the tree of life is blooming,

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Meet me there; 
When the storms of life are o’er,

sections.label: Chorus 3
sections.text:
On the happy golden shore,
Where the faithful part no more, Meet me there.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Here our fondest hopes are vain, 
Dearest links are rent in twain,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
But in Heav’n no throb of pain
 Meet me there;

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
By the river sparkling bright In the city of delight,
Where our faith is lost in sight, Meet me there.

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Where the harps of angels ring,  
And the blest forever sing,

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
In the palace of the King, Meet me there;
Where in sweet communion blend

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Heart with heart and friend with friend,
In a world that ne’er shall end, Meet me there.

title: IT IS WELL WITH MY SOUL

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
[C]When peace like a [F]river at[C]tendeth my way,
When [C]sorrows like [Am]sea billows [G]roll;
[C]Whatever my [F]lot, Thou hast [C]taught me to say,
[G]It is well, it is [C]well with my [G7]soul.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
[C]It is [F]well [C]with my soul,
[G]It is [G7]well, it is [C]well with my [G7]soul.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
[C]Though Satan should [F]buffet, though [C]trials should come,
Let [C]this blest as[Am]surance con[G]trol;
[C]That Christ hath re[F]garded my [C]helpless estate,
[G]And hath shed His own [C]blood for my [G7]soul.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
[C]My sin — oh, the [F]bliss of this [C]glorious thought —
My [C]sin, not in [Am]part, but the [G]whole;
[C]Is nailed to the [F]cross and I [C]bear it no more,
[G]Praise the Lord, praise the [C]Lord, O my [G7]soul!

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
When my heart is sore oppressed, And I seek in vain for rest,
This my daily prayer shall be, Draw me nearer, Lord, to Thee.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
In temptation’s trying hour, When I feel the tempter’s power,
Near me then, O Lord, abide, Strengthen me, and be my guide.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
When my day of life is o’er, And I tremble on the shore
Of the dark and unknown sea, Then, O Lord, my comfort be.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Hide me, Oh, my Savior, hide me, ’Till the storm of life is past;
Safe into the haven guide me, Oh, receive my soul at last.

title: ON JORDANS STORMY BANK I STAND

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
On Jordan's stormy banks I stand
And cast a wishful eye

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
To Canaan's fair and happy land
Where my possessions lie

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
I am bound for the Promise Land (X2)
Oh, who will come

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
and go with me
I am bound for the promised land

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
All o'er those wide extended plains
Shines one eternal day

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Jesus Christ forever reigns
And scatters night away.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
When shall I see that happy place
And be forever blessed

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
When shall I see my saviour's face
And in God's bosom rest

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I’m redeemed, I’m redeemed,  
 From the darkness of the night,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
That so thickly enveloped my  soul; 
In my heart  there have gleamed

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Rays of wonderful light,   
Where the waves of Thy glory do roll.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
I’m redeemed, praise the Lord! 
  I’m redeemed  by the blood of the Lamb

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
I am  saved  from  all  sin,    
And I’m walking in the  light,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text: I’m redeemed by the blood  of  the  Lamb.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
I’m redeemed by Thy  blood, 
 From the  power of the grave,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
And the vict’ry I have over death;
Oh, that wonderful flood!

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
How, I felt its pow’r  to save,     
When  I  plunged in its fathomless depth!

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
I’m redeemed, praise the Lord! 
  I’m redeemed  by the blood of the Lamb

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
I am  saved  from  all  sin,    
And I’m walking in the  light,

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text: I’m redeemed by the blood  of  the  Lamb.

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
I’m redeemed from all  sin     
And I’m walking  in  the light,

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
And Thy  Spirit illumines my way;  
I’ve no  fear now within

sections.label: Verse 15
sections.text:
“For  the terror of  the night,        
Nor the arrow that flieth by day.”

sections.label: Verse 16
sections.text:
I’m redeemed, praise the Lord! 
  I’m redeemed  by the blood of the Lamb

sections.label: Verse 17
sections.text:
I am  saved  from  all  sin,    
And I’m walking in the  light,

sections.label: Verse 18
sections.text: I’m redeemed by the blood  of  the  Lamb.

sections.label: Verse 19
sections.text:
The redeemed,  they shall walk          
In the pathway of the just,

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
O think of the home over there, 
By the side of the river of light,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Over there, over there, O think of the home over there,
Over there, over there, O think of the home over there.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
O think of the freinds over there,
Who before us the journey have trod,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Over there, over there, O think of the friends over there,
Over there, over there, O think of the friends over there.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
My Savior is now over there,
There my kindred and friends are at rest,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Over there, over there,
 My Saviuor is now over there,

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
I'll soon be at home over there,
For the end of my journey I see;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Over there,over there, 
I'll soon be at home over there.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Lead me gently home, Father,
Lead me gently home,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
When life’s toils are ended,
and parting days have come;

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Sin no more shall tempt me,
Ne’er from Thee I’ll roam,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
If Thou’lt only lead me, Father,
Lead me gently home.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Lead me gently home, Father,
lead me gently,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Lest I fall upon the wayside,
Lead me gently home.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Lead me gently home, Father,
Lead me gently home,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
In life’s darkest hours, Father,
When life’s troubles come;

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Keep my feet from wand’ring,
Lest from Thee I'll roam,

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Lest I fall upon the wayside,
Lead me gently home.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Lead me gently home, Father,
Lead me gently home,

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
In temptation's hour, Father,
when sore trials come;

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
Be Thou near to keep me,
Take me as Thine own,

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
For I cannot live without Thee,
Lead me gently home.

sections.label: Verse 15
sections.text:
Lead me gently home, Father,
Lead me gently home,

sections.label: Verse 16
sections.text:
While I humbly follow and 
When my pleasures come.

sections.label: Verse 17
sections.text:
Give to me my portion,
Those across the foam,

sections.label: Verse 18
sections.text:
Such the glory never fadeth,
Lead me gently home.

sections.label: Verse 19
sections.text:
Lead me gently home, Father,
lead me gently,

title: WHEN WE ALL GET TO HEAVEN

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Sing the wondrous love of Jesus,
Sing his mercy and his grace;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
In the mansions, bright and blessed,
He’ll prepare for us a place.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
While we walk the pilgrim pathway,
Clouds will overspread the sky;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
But when trav’ling days are over,
Not a shadow, not a sigh.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Let us then be true and faithful,
Trusting, serving, every day;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Just one glimpse of him in glory
Will the toils of life repay.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Onward to the prize before us!
Soon his beauty we’ll behold;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Soon the pearly gates will open,
We shall tread the streets of gold.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
When we all get to heaven,
What a day of rejoicing that will be!

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
When we all see Jesus,
We’ll sing and shout the victory.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I’ve Got Peace Like A River(X2)
I’ve Got Peace Like A River In My Soul,

sections.label: Verse 3

I’ve Got Love Like An Ocean In My Soul,

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:

I’ve Got Joy Like A Fountain In My Soul.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Love one another, for love is of God. 
he who loves is born of God and knows God

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
he who does not love, does not know God, 
for God is love, God is love.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Love one another, for love is of God. 
Love bears all things, believes all things,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
he who loves is born of God and knows God 
love hopes all things, endures all things.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Love one another, for love is of God. 
Love bears all things, believes all things,
God is love, God is love, God is love.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
he who loves is born of God and knows God 
love hopes all things, endures all things.
God is love, God is love, God is love.

sections.label: Verse 7

Love the Lord thy God  with all thy heart with all thy soul,all thy strength all thy mind 
Love one another, for love is of God.

love the Lord thy God with all thy heart,
 for God is love, God is love, God is love.
he who loves is born of God and knows God 
love hopes all things, endures all things.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Sinners Jesus will receive:
Sound this word of grace to all

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Who the heav'nly pathway leave,
All who linger, all who fall.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Sing it o'er and o'er again:
Christ receivethsinful men.

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Make the message clear and plain
:Christ receiveth sinful men.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Come, and He will give you rest;
Trust Him, for His word is plain;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
He will take the sinfulest;
Christ receiveth sinful men.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Now my heart condemns me not,
Pure before the law I stand;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
He who cleansed me from all spot
Satisfied its last demand.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Christ receiveth sinful men,
Even me with all my sin;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Purged from ev’ry spot and stain,
Heav’n with Him I enter in.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
If for the prize we have striven,
After our labors are o'er,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Rest to our souls will be given,
On the eternal shore

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Home of the soul beautiful home,
There we shall rest never to roam

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Free from all care happy and bright,
Jesus is there, He is the light! Oft'n in the storm,

sections.label: Chorus 3
sections.text:
Lonely we are sighing 
for home longing for thee,

sections.label: Chorus 4
sections.text:
Beautiful home of the ransomed,
Beside the crystal sea.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Yes, a sweet rest is remaining 
For the true children of God

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Where there will be no complaining,
Never a chast'ning rod

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Soon, the bright homeland adorning,
We shall behold the glad dawn;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Lean on the Lord till the morning
 trust till the night has gone.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Let the beauty of Jesus be seen in me,
All His wonderful passion and purity;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
O Thou Spirit divine, all my nature refine,
Till the beauty of Jesus be seen in me.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
My only hope is you, Jesus, my only hope is you
From early in the morning, Till late at night My only hope is you.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
My only peace is you, Jesus, my only peace is you
From early in the morning, Till late at night My only peace is you.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
My only joy is you, Jesus, my only joy is you
From early in the morning, Till late at night My only joy is you.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
All that I need is you, Jesus, all that I need is you
From early in the morning, Till late at night All that I need is you.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Faith of our father living still In spite of dungeon fire
And sword, O how our hearts Beat high with joy

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Our fathers, chained in prisons dark,
Were still in heart and conscience free:

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Faith of our fathers! we will love
Both friend and foe in all our strife:

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
And preach thee too, as love knows how,
By kindly words and virtuous life:

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Faith of our fathers Holy faith!
We will be true to Thee till death!

title: IN THE CITY WHERE THE LAMB

sections.label: Verse

sections.label: Verse 2

sections.label: Verse 3

sections.label: Verse 4

sections.text: (In the morning)

sections.label: Verse 7

sections.label: Verse 8

title: O LORD SEND THE POWER JUST NOW

sections.label: Verse
sections.text: Rejoice in the Lord always again I say rejoice. x2

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text: Rejoice, rejoice and again I say rejoice! x2

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text: Rejoice in the Lord always again I say rejoice. x2

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
With my Saviour  ever near to  guide me,         
I  am safe,  whatever may be-tide  me

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
From the storm  and  tempest He will hide me                 
 in the hollow of  His  hand.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
In the hollow of His hand!
In the hollow of His hand!

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
I am safe, whatever may betide me, 
In the hollow of His hand!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
In His  arms  of  love He doth en-fold me;            
Words of  peace  His voice Divine   hath told Me;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
I am  safe, for God Himself doth  
hold me in the hollow  of   His  hand.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
He will  guard  my  soul, and leave  me never;            
From His  love  no power on earth shall sever;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
And I    know  He'll keep me now and ever  
in the hollow  of His hand.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
There is sunshine in my soul today,
More glorious and bright

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Than glows in any earthly sky,
For Jesus is my light.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
O there's sunshine, blessed sunshine, 
When the peaceful happy moments roll;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
When Jesus shows His smiling face, 
There is sunshine in my soul.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
There is music in my soul today,
A carol to my king;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
And Jesus, listening, can hear 
The songs I cannot sing.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
There is music in my soul today, 
For when my Lord is near

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
The dove of peace sings in my heart,
The flowers of grace appear.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
There is gladness in my soul today,
And hope and praise and love

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
For the blessings in which He gives now,
For joys laid up above.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Jesus is tenderly calling the home,
Calling today, calling today;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Why from the sunshine of love wilt thou roam
Farther and farther away?

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Calling today, calling today,
Jesus is calling, is tenderly calling today.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Jesus is calling the weary to rest,
Calling today, calling today;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Bring Him thy burden and thou shall be blest;
He will not turn thee away.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Jesus is waiting; O come to Him now
Waiting today, waiting today;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Come with thy sins, at His feet lowly bow,
Come and no longer delay.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Jesus is pleading; O list to His voice,
Hear Him today, hear Him today

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
They who believe on His name shall rejoice,
Quickly arise and away.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Praise Him, Praise Him! Jesus our blessed redeemer;
Sing, O earth, His wonderful love proclaim!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Hail Him, hail Him! highest archangels in glory, 
Strength and honour give to His holy name.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Like a shepherd, Jesus will guard His children, 
In His arms He carries them all day long;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
O ye saints that dwell in the mountains of Zion, 
Praise Him! praise Him! ever in joyful song.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Praise Him, praise Him! Jesus, our blessed Redeemer; 
For our sins He suffered and bled and died.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
He, our Rock, our hope of eternal salvation, 
Hail Him, hail Him! Jesus the Crucified.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Loving Saviour, meekly enduring sorrow, 
Crowned with thorns that cruelly pierced His brow;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Once for us rejected, despised, and forsaken, 
Prince of glory, ever triumphant now.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Praise Him, praise Him! Jesus, our blessed Redeemer; 
Heavenly portals loud with hosannas ring!

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Jesus, Saviour, reigneth for ever and ever, 
Crown Him, crown Him! Prophet and Priest and King!

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Death is vanquished, tell it with joy, ye faithful! 
Where is now thy victory, boasting grave?

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Jesus lives, no longer thy portals are cheerless; 
Jesus lives, the mighty and strong to save.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
O Lord I have started to walk in the light,
That shines on my path way so bright

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
I've made all the world and its follies a dieu;
And now with my Saviour I mean to go thro.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
I'm going thro', Jesus, I'm going thro'
I'll pay the price, whatever others do;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
I'll take the way with the Lord's despised few,
I've started in Jesus, I'm going thro'.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
How many once started to run in the race,
But with our dear Saviour, they could not keep the pace;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
While others accepted because it was new,
But not very many seem'd bound to go thro'.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
I'd for rather follow my Saviour alone,
And have for my pillow, like israel, a stone,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Than gain all the world and its pleasures pursue;
Than turn from the pathway and fall to go thro'.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
O, come then, my brother, and start in this way,
This world and its follies, will surely never pay

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Then turn from your idols and join with the few, 
Let's start in with Jesus and those going thro'.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Time is fillled with swift transition;
Naught of earth un-moved can stand;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Build your hopes on things eternal!
Hold to God's unchanging hand!

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Hold to God's unchanging hand!
Hold to God's unchanging hand!

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Build your hopes on things eternal,
Hold to God's unchanging hand!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Trust in Him who will not leave you,
Whatsoever years may bring;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
If by earthly friends forsaken,
Still more closely to Him cling!

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Covet not this world's vain riches,
That so rapidly decay;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Seek to gain the heav'nly treasures,
They will never pass away!

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
When your journey is completed, 
If to God you have been true,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Fair and bright the home in glory,
Your en-raptured soul will view!

Verse 2

Glory! Glory, hallelujah!

sections.text:

Glory! Glory, hallelujah!

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Teach me thy way, O Lord, teach me thy way!
Thy guiding grace afford teach me thy way!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Help me to walk, a right, more by faith, less 
By sight lead me with heav'nly light teach me thy way!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
When I am sad at heart teach me thy way!
When earthly joys depart, teach me thy way!

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
In hours of loneliness in times of dire distress 
In failure or success way teach me thy way!

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
When doubts and fears a rise, teach me thy way!
When storms o'er spread the skies, teach me thy way

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Shine thro' the uncloud and rain, thro' sorrow toil 
And pain make thou my path way plain teach me thy way!

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Long as my life shall last teach me thy way!
Where'er my lot be cost teach me thy way!

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Until the race is run until the journey's done 
Until the crown is won, teach me thy way!

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I hear the saviour say 
"Thy strenght indeed is small,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Child of weakness watch and pray,
Find in me thine all in all ".

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Jesus paid it all, 
All to him I owe,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Sin had left a crimson stain,
He washed it white as snow.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Lord, now indeed I find
Thy pow'r and thine alone,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Can change the lepers spots,
And melt the heart of stone.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Jesus paid it all, 
All to him I owe,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Sin had left a crimson stain,
He washed it white as snow.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Since nothing good have I
Where by thy grace to calim;

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
I'll wash my garments white,
In the blood of calvary's lamb.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Jesus paid it all, 
All to him I owe,

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Sin had left a crimson stain,
He washed it white as snow.

title: GOD WILL TAKE CARE OF YOU

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Be not dismayed what e'er betide,
God will take care of you;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Beneath His wings of love abide,
God will take care of you.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
God will take care of you,
Through everyday, o'er all the way;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
He will take care of you,
God will take care of you.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Through days of toil when heart doth fail,
God will take care of you;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
When dangers fierce your path assail,
God will take care of you.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
God will take care of you,
Through everyday, o'er all the way;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
He will take care of you,
God will take care of you.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
All you may need He will provide,
God will take care of you;

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Nothing you ask will be denied,
God will take care of you.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
God will take care of you,
Through everyday, o'er all the way;

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
He will take care of you,
God will take care of you.

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
Lonely or sad, from friends apart,
God will take care of you;

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:

God will take care of you.

sections.label: Verse 15
sections.text:
God will take care of you,
Through everyday, o'er all the way;

sections.label: Verse 16
sections.text:
He will take care of you,
God will take care of you.

sections.label: Verse 17

God will take care of you;

sections.label: Verse 18

sections.label: Verse 19
