God will take care of you,
Through everyday, o'er all the way;

title: IL NE VINT JUGER LE MONDE

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Il ne vint pas juger le monde
Il vint sans nous blamer,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Nous chercher dans la nuit profonde,
Il vint pour nous sauver

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Quand nous l'appelons Jesus,
Quand nous l'appelons Jesus,

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
C'est son vrai Nom, oui c'est son Nom!
Il vint pour nous sauver!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Pour nous, dans son amour immense,
Il mourut sur la croix;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
De nos peches, de nos offenses,
Il porta tout le poids.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Du ciel ou vainqueur Il prit place,
Il suit avec amour

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Nos faibles pas et dans sa grace,
Il nous sauve toujours.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Bientot achevant sa victoire,
Il reviendra du ciel

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Et nous gouterons dans la gloire 
Un salut eternel.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Jesus gave his life a ransom yonder on calvary,
On mount calvary, cruel calvary;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Paved the way by blood that we might 
Win a bright shining crown

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Praise His holy name 
(Salvation has been brought down O glory)

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Praise the Lord (Praise the Lord, blessed Lord),
Salvation has been brought down (From heaven),

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Go and shout and tell it the world around,
(Go preach it and) Tell it today, (To people in sorrow) 
Tell it today, (And tell it it tomorrow)

sections.label: Chorus 3
sections.text:
Preach the word of God that we might win a crown
(Win a shining crown in heaven) Tell the lost,

sections.label: Chorus 4
sections.text:
Salvation is full and free (To sinners),
Spread the news all over the land and sea,

sections.label: Chorus 5
sections.text:
(Go teach it and) Tell it afar, (All over creation)
Praise the Lord , salvation has been brought down

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
All alone without friend He suffered to pay it all
Yes, He paid it all, Jesus paid it all;

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
In His blessed promises sweet victory can be found,
Praise His holy name (Salvation has been bro't down O glory)

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
There's a blessed home prepared way over in glory land;
In bright glory land, blessed glory land

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
I have trusted in His love and now I am heaven bound,
Praise His holy name (Salvation has been bro't down O glory)

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
In Christ alone my hope is found;
He is my light, my strength, my song;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
This cornerstone, this solid ground,
Firm through the fiercest drought and storm.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
What heights of love, what depths of peace,
When fears are stilled, when strivings cease!

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
My comforter, my all in all
Here in the love of Christ I stand.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
In Christ alone, Who took on flesh,
Fullness of God in helpless babe!

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
This gift of love and righteousness,
Scorned by the ones He came to save.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Till on that cross as Jesus died,
The wrath of God was satisfied;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
For ev’ry sin on Him was laid
Here in the death of Christ I live.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
There in the ground His body lay,
Light of the world by darkness slain;

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Then bursting forth in glorious day,
Up from the grave He rose again!

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
And as He stands in victory,
Sin’s curse has lost its grip on me;

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
For I am His and He is mine
Bought with the precious blood of Christ.

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
No guilt in life, no fear in death
This is the pow’r of Christ in me;

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
From life’s first cry to final breath,
Jesus commands my destiny.

sections.label: Verse 15
sections.text:
No pow’r of hell, no scheme of man,
Can ever pluck me from His hand;

sections.label: Verse 16
sections.text:
Till He returns or calls me home
Here in the pow’r of Christ I’ll stand.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
There waits for me a glad tomorrow
Where gates of pearl swing open wide

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
And when I've passed this vale of sorrow
I'll dwell upon the other side

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Some day beyond the reach of mortal ken
Some day God only knows just where and when

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
The wheels of mortal life shall all stand still
And I shall go to dwell on Zion's hill

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Some day I'll hear the angels singing
Beyond the shadows of the tomb;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
And all the bells of heaven ringing
While saints are singing, "Home, sweet home."

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Some day my labors will be ended
And all my wand'rings will be o'er

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
And all earth's broken ties be mended
And I shall sigh and weep no more

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Some day the dark clouds will be rifted
And all the night of gloom be past;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
And all life's burdens will be lifted
The day of rest shall dawn at last

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
O how sweet the glorious message simple faith claim
Yesterday, today, forever Jesus is the same.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Still He loves to save the sinful, heal the sick and lame
Cheer the mourner, still the tempest, glory to His Name.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Yesterday today, forever, Jesus is the same.
All may change, but Jesus never, Glory to His Name!

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Glory to His Name! Glory to His name!
All may change, but Jesus never, Glory to His name!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
He, who was the friend of sinners, seeks the lost one now
Sinner come, and at His foot-stool penitently bow

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
He who said " I'll not condemn thee go and sin no more "
Speaks to thee that word of pardon as in days of yore.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Oft on earth He healed the sufferer by His mighty hand
Still Our sicknesses and sorrows go at His command

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
He Who gave His healing virtue to a woman's touch
To the faith that claims His fullness still will give as much.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
As of old He walked to Emmaus with them to abide
So through all life's way He walketh ever near our side

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Soon again we shall behold Him hasten Lord the day 
But t'will still be this same Jesus as He went away.

title: SOLDIERS OF CHRIST IN TRUTH ARRAYED

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Soldiers of Christ, in truth arrayed,
A world in ruins needs your aid.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
A world by sin destroyed and dead.
A world for which the savior bled.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
His gospel to the lost proclaim,
Good news for all in Jesus's name;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Let light upon the darkness break
That sinners from their death may wake.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Morning and evening sow the seed,
God's grace the effort shall succeed.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Seed times of tears have 
Oft'en been found

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
we meet to part, but part to meet
when earthly labors are complete,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
To join in yet more blest employ
In an eternal world of joy.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Par tous les saints glorifie
Jesus inspire leurs louanges
Plus belles que les chant des anges

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Gloire a l'agneau, Gloire a l'agneau
Gloire a l'agneau sacrifie

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
C'est par lui qu'est justifie
Tout pecheur qui demande grace
Pretres et rois devant sa face

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Par le Pere magnifie 
Tout l'univers lui rend hommage
L'Agneau regnera d'age en age

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Par son Esprit vivifie
Je veux jusqu'a ma derniere heure
Chanter l'amour qui seul demeure.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Pour nous il fut crucifie
Song sang a rachete notre ame
C'est pourquoi notre amour l'acclame

title: MY FAITH HAS FOUND A RESTING PLACE

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
My faith has found a resting place, not in device or creed;
I trust the ever-living One, His wounds for me shall plead.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
I need no other argument, I need no other plea;
it is enough that Jesus died, and that He died for me.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Enough for me that Jesus saves, this ends my fear and doubt;
a sinful soul I came to Him… He’ll never cast me out.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
My heart is leaning on the Word, the living Word of God;
salvation by my Savior’s name, salvation through His blood.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
My Great Physician heals the sick, the lost He came to save;
for me His precious blood He shed, for me His life He gave.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Oh! be like Thee, blessed redeemer
This is my constant longing and prayer

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Gladly I'll forfeit all earth's treasures
Jesus thy perfect likeness to wear.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Oh! to be like Thee Oh! to be like Thee
Blessed redeemer pure as thy art

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Come in thy sweetness, come in thy fullness 
Stamp thine own image deep on my heart

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Oh! be like Thee, full of compassion
Loving, forgiving tender and kind

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Helping the helpless, cheering the fainting
seeking the wandr'ing sinner to find.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Oh! to be like Thee, lowly in spirit
Holy and harmless, patience and brave

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Meekly enduring cruel reproaches
Willing to suffer, others to save.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Oh! to be like Thee, Lord, I am coming
Now to recieveth anointing divine

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
All that I am and have, I am bringing
Lord, from this moment all shall be thine

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Oh to be like Thee, while I am pleading
Pour out out Thy spirit , fill with love

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Make me a temple meet for thy dwelling
Fit me for life and Heaven above

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Beneath the cross of Jesus
I fain would take my stand,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
The shadow of a mighty Rock
Within a weary land;

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
A home within the wilderness,
A rest upon the way,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
From the burning of the noon day heat
And the burden of the day.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Upon that cross of Jesus 
Mine eye at times can see

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
The very dying form of one
Who suffered there for me

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
And from my smitten heart with tears
Two wonders I confess,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
The wonders of His glorious love,
And my own worthlessness.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
I take, O cross thy shadow
For my abiding place

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Content to let the world go by.
To know no gain nor loss

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
My sinful self my only shame,
My  glory all the cross.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I care not today what the morrow may bring,
If shadow or sunshine or rain,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
The Lord I know ruleth o’er everything,
And all of my worries are vain.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Living by faith in Jesus above,
Trusting, confiding in His great love;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
From all harm safe in His sheltering arm,
I’m living by faith and feel no alarm.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Though tempests may blow and the storm clouds arise,
Obscuring the brightness of life,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
I’m never alarmed at the overcast skies—
The Master looks on at the strife.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
I know that He safely will carry me through,
No matter what evils betide;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Why should I then care though the tempest may blow,
If Jesus walks close to my side.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Our Lord will return for His loved ones someday,
Our troubles will then all be o’er;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
The Master so gently will lead us away,
Beyond that blest heavenly shore.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
There's a message true and glad
For the sinful and the sad,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Ring it out, ring it out;
It will give them courage new

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
It will help them to be true;
Ring it out, ring it out.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Ring out the word o'er land and sea,
Still far from Jesus many live in sin and doubt,

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Ring out the news that makes men free,
To all the lost of ev'ry nation,
Ring the message out.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Tell the world of saving grace,
Make it known in ev'ry place,

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Ring it out, ring it out;
Help the needy ones to know

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Him from whom all blessings flow;
Ring it out, ring it out.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Sin and doubt to sweep away,
Till shall dawn the better day,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Ring it out, ring it out;
Till the sinful world be won

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
For Jehovah's mighty Son;
Ring it out, ring it out.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Where He may lead me I will go,
For I have learned to trust Him so,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
And I remember 'twas for me,
That He was slain on Calvary.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Jesus shall lead me night and day,
Jesus shall lead me all the way,

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
He is the truest Friend to me,
For I remember Calvary.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
O I delight in His command,
Love to be led by His dear hand,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
His divine will is sweet to me,
Hallowed by blood-stained Calvary.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Onward I go, nor doubt, nor fear,
Happy with Christ, my Saviour near,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Trusting that I some day shall see
Jesus my Friend, of Calvary.

title: OUR LORDS RETURN TO EARTH AGAIN

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I am watching for the coming of the glad millennial day,
When our blessèd Lord shall come and catch His waiting bride away.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Oh! my heart is filled with rapture as I labor, watch, and pray,
For our Lord is coming back to earth again.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Oh, our Lord is coming back to earth again.
Yes, our Lord is coming back to earth again.

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Satan will be bound a thousand years; we’ll have no tempter then,
After Jesus shall come back to earth again.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Jesus’ coming back will be the answer to earth’s sorrowing cry,
For the knowledge of the Lord shall fill the earth and sea and sky.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
God shall take away all sickness and the sufferer’s tears will dry,
When our Savior will come back to earth again

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Yes, the ransomed of the Lord shall come to Zion then with joy,
And in all His holy mountain nothing hurts or shall destroy.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Perfect peace shall reign in every heart, and love without alloy,
After Jesus shall come back to earth again.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Then the sin and sorrow, pain and death of this dark world shall cease,
In a glorious reign with Jesus of a thousand years of peace.

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
All the earth is groaning, crying for that day of sweet release,
For our Jesus shall come back to earth again.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I wandered in the shades of night,
Till Jesus came to me,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
And with the sunlight of His love
Bid all my darkness flee.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Sunlight, sunlight in my soul today,
Sunlight, sunlight all along the way;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Since the Savior found me Took away my sin,
I have had the sunlight of his love within.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Tho' clouds may gather in the sky,
And billows round me roll,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
However dark the world may be,
I've sunlight in my soul.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
While walking in the light of God,
I sweet communion find;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
O press with holy vigor on,
And leave the world behind.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
I cross the wide-extended fields,
I journey o'er the plain,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
And in the sunlight of His love
I reap the golden grain.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Soon I shall see Him as He is,
The light that came to me,

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Behold the brightness of his face,
Thro'out eternity.

title: I KNOW GODS PROMISE IS TRUE

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
For God so loved this sinful world, 
His son He freely gave,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
That whosoever would obey,
Eternal life should have.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Tis true, O, yes tis true, ( the promise is true)
God's wonderful promise is true ('tis true)

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
For I've trusted, and tested, and tried it,
And I know God's promise is true. (tis true.)

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
I was a a wayward wand'ring child,
A slave to sin and fear,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Until this blessed promise fell
Like music on my ear.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
The "whosoever" of the Lord,
I trusted was for me;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
I took Him at His gracious word,
From sin He set me free.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Eternal life, promised below, 
Now fills my heart and soul;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
I'll sing His praise forever more,
Who has redeemed my soul.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Joys are flowing like a river, 
Since the comforter has come;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
He abides with us forever, 
Makes the trusting heart His home.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Blessed quietness! Holy quietness!
What assurance in my soul!

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
On the stormy sea, Jesus speaks to me,
And the billows cease to roll.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Springing to life and gladness 
All around this glorious guests,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Banished unblelief and sadness,
And we just obey and rest.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Like the rain that falls from heaven,
Like the sunlight from the sky,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
So the Holy Ghost given
Coming on us from on high.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
See, a fruitful field is growing 
Blessed fruits of righteousness;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
And the streams of life are flowing
In the lonely wilderness.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
What a wonderful salvation, 
Where we always see His face!

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
What a peaceful habitation!
What a quiet resting place!

title: ALL THE WAY MY SAVIOUR LEADS

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
All the way my saviour leads me,
What have I to ask beside?
Can I doubt His tender mercy,
Who through life has been my guide?
Heavenly peace, divinest comfort,
Here by faith in Him to dwell,
For I know whate’er befall me,
Jesus doeth all things well.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
All the way my Saviour leads me,
Cheers each winding path I tread.
Gives me grace for every trial,
Feeds me with the Living Bread.
Though my weary steps may falter
And my soul athirst may be,
Gushing from a Rock before me,
Lo! a spring of joy I see.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
And all the way my Saviour leads me,
Oh, the fullness of His love.
Perfect rest to me is promised
In my Father’s house above.
And when my spirit clothed immortal
Wings its flight to realms of day,
This my song through endless ages,
Jesus led me all the way.

title: THIS WORLD IS NOT MY HOME

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
his  world is not my home,
I’m just a passing through,
My treasures are laid up
Some where beyond the blue;
The angels’ beck on me
From Heavens open door,
And I can’t feel at home
In this  world  anymore.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Lord, You know,
I have no friend like You,
If Heaven not my home,
Then lord what will I do?
The angels  beck on me
From Heavens open door,
And I can’t feel at home
In this world anymore.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
hey’re all expecting me
And  that’s one thing I know,
My Saviour pardoned me
And now I onward go;
I know He’ll take me through
Through I am weak and poor,
And I can’t feel at home
In this world anymore

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
have a loving mother
Up in glory land,
I don’t expect to stop
Until I shake her hand;
She’s waiting now for me
In Heaven open door ,
And I can’t feel at home
In this world anymore.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
ust up in glory land
We’ll live eternally,
The saints on every hand
Are shouting victory;
Their songs of sweetest praise
Drift back from Heaven shore,
And I can’t feel at home
In this world anymore

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Oh, the unsearchable riches of Christ
Wealth that can never be told;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Riches exhaustless of mercy and grace,
Precious, more precious than gold

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Precious, more precious,
Wealth that can never be told

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Oh, the unsearchable riches of Christ
Precious, more precious than gold

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Oh, the unsearchable riches of Christ,
Who shall their greatness declare?

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Jewels whose lustre our lives may adorn,
Pearls that the poorest may wear

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Oh, the unsearchable riches of Christ!
Freely, how freely they flow,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Making the souls of the faithful and true
Happy wherever they go

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Oh, the unsearchable riches of Christ
Who would not gladly endure

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Trials, afflictions, and crosses on earth,
Riches like these to secure

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Joyful, joyful, we adore Thee,
God of glory, Lord of love;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Hearts unfold like flow'rs before Thee,
Op'ning to the sun above.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Melt the clouds of sin and sadness;
Drive the dark of doubt away;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Giver of immortal gladness,
Fill us with the light of day!

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
All Thy works with joy surround Thee,
Earth and heav'n reflect Thy rays,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Stars and angels sing around Thee,
Center of unbroken praise;

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Field and forest, vale and mountain,
Flow'ry meadow, flashing sea,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Chanting bird and flowing fountain
Call us to rejoice in Thee.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Thou art giving and forgiving,
Ever blessing, ever blest,

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Well-spring of the joy of living,
Ocean-depth of happy rest!

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Thou our Father, Christ our Brother,
All who live in love are thine;

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Teach us how to love each other,
Lift us to the joy divine.

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
Mortals, join the mighty chorus,
Which the morning stars began;

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
Love Divine is reigning o’er us,
Binding all within its span.

sections.label: Verse 15
sections.text:
Ever singing, march we onward,
Victors in the midst of strife;

sections.label: Verse 16
sections.text:
Joyful music leads us sunward,
In the triumph song of life.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
O what a wonderful, wonderful day
Day I will never forget

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
After I'd wandered in darkness away
Jesus my Saviour I met

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
O what a tender, compassionate friend
He met the need of my heart;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Shadows dispelling, with joy I am telling
He made all the darkness depart

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Born of the Spirit with life from above
Into God's fam'ly divine

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Justified fully thru Calvary's love
O what a standing is mine!

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
And the transaction so quickly was made
When as a sinner I came

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Took of the offer of grace He did proffer
He saved me, O praise His dear name!

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Now I've a hope that will surely endure
After the passing of time

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
I have a future in heaven for sure,
There in those mansions sublime

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
And it's because of that wonderful day
When at the cross I believed

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Riches eternal and blessings supernal
From His precious hand I received.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Heaven came down and glory filled my soul (filled my soul)
When at the cross my Saviour made me whole (made me whole)

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
My sins were washed away
And my night was turned to day

sections.label: Chorus 3
sections.text:
Heaven came down and glory filled my soul (filled my soul)
When at the cross my Saviour made me whole (made me whole)

sections.label: Chorus 4
sections.text:
My sins were washed away
And my night was turned to day

sections.label: Chorus 5
sections.text:
Heaven came down and glory filled my soul (filled my soul)
When at the cross my Saviour made me whole (made me whole)

sections.label: Chorus 6
sections.text:
My sins were washed away
And my night was turned to day

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I am thinking today of that beautiful land
I shall reach when the sun goeth down;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
When thro' wonderful grace by my Savior I stand,
Will there be any stars in my crown?

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Will there be any stars, any stars in my crown
When at evening the sun goeth down?

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
When I wake with the blest in the mansions of rest,
Will there be any stars in my crown

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
In the strength of the Lord let me labor and pray
Let me watch as a winner of souls;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
That bright stars may be mine in the glorious day,
When His praises like the sea-billow rolls.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Oh, what joy it will be when His face I behold,
Living gems at His feet to lay down;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
It would sweeten my bliss in the city of gold,
Should there be any stars in my crown.

title: HIDE ME O MY SAVIOUR HIDE ME

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
When my heart is sore oppressed,
And I seek in vain for rest,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
This my daily prayer shall be,
Draw me nearer, Lord, to Thee.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Hide me, Oh, my Savior, hide me,
’Till the storm of life is past;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Safe into the heaven guide me,
Oh, receive my soul at last.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
In temptation’s trying hour,
When I feel the tempter’s power,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Near me then, O Lord, abide,
Strengthen me, and be my guide.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
When my day of life is o’er,
And I tremble on the shore

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Of the dark and unknown sea,
Then, O Lord, my comfort be.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
One day when heaven was filled with His praises
One day when sin was as black as could be

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Jesus came forth to be born of a virgin
Dwelt among men, my example is He!

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Living, He loved me; dying He saved me;
Buried He carried my sins far away;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Rising, He justified freely forever: 
One day He's coming O, glorioius day!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
One day they led Him up Calvary's mountain,
One day they nailed Him to die on the tree,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Suffering anguish despised and rejected;
Bearing our sins, my Redeemer is He!

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
One day they left Him alone in the garden,
One day He rested from suffering free;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Angels came down o'er His tomb to keep vigil;
Hope of the hopeless my savior is He!

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
One day grave could conceal Him no longer,
One day the stone rolled away from the door;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Then He arose, Over death He had conquered; 
Now is ascended, my Lord evermore!

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
One day the trumpet will sound for His coming, 
One day the skies with His glory will shine;

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Wonderful day, my Beloved One bringing;
Glorious savior, this Jesus is mine!

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Peace, blessed peace is filling now my soul,
Since He pardon’d all my sin;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Love, perfect love in billows o’er me roll,
Since He cleans’d my heart within.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Peace, perfect peace! Love perfect love!
Sweeping o’er my soul in heav’nly tides!

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Rest, perfect rest! Joy, perfect joy!
Is mine since the Holy Ghost abides.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Rest, perfect rest now all my nature stills,
Since His promis’d grace is mine;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Joy, perfect joy my happy spirit thrills,
Since the day I said, “I’m Thine.”

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Fire, holy fire is burning in my heart,
And the glory rolls in tides;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Pow’r, holy pow’r is filling ev’ry part,
Since the Holy Ghost abides.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Light, perfect light shines on this holy way;
Twice He touch’d my blinded eyes;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Sight, perfect sight my vision has today,
Healed by blood that sanctifies.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
King of my life I crown Thee now,
Thine shall the glory be;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
lest I forget Thy thorn-crowned brow,
lead me to Calvary.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Lest I forget Gethsemane,
lest I forget Thine agony,

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
lest I forget Thy love for me,
lead me to Calvary.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Show me the tomb where Thou wast laid,
tenderly mourned and wept;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
angels in robes of light arrayed
guarded Thee whilst Thou slept.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Let me like Mary, through the gloom,
come with a gift to Thee;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
show to me now the empty tomb,
lead me to Calvary.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
May I be willing, Lord, to bear
daily my cross for Thee;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
even Thy cup of grief to share,
Thou hast borne all for me.

title: IS THY HEART RIGHT WITH GOD

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Have thy affections been nailed to the cross?
Is thy heart right with God?

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Dost thou count all things for Jesus but loss?
Is thy heart right with God?

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Is thy heart right with God,
Washed in the crimson flood,

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Cleansed and made holy, humble and lowly,
Right in the sight of God?

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Hast thou dominion o’er self and o’er sin?
Is thy heart right with God?

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Over all evil without and within?
Is thy heart right with God?

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Is there no more condemnation for sin?
Is thy heart right with God?

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Does Jesus rule in the temple within?
Is thy heart right with God?

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Are all thy powers under Jesus’ control?
Is thy heart right with God?

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Does He each moment abide in thy soul?
Is thy heart right with God?

title: A SHELTER IN THE TIME OF STORM

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
The Lord's our rock, in Him we hide,
A shelter in the time of storm;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Secure whatever ill betide,
A shelter in the time of storm.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Mighty Rock in a weary land,
Cooling shade on the burning sand,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Faithful guide for the pilgrim band-
A shelter in the time of storm.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
A shade by day, defense by night,
A shelter in the time of storm;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
No fears alarm, no fears affright,
A shelter in the time of storm.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Mighty Rock in a weary land,
Cooling shade on the burning sand,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Faithful guide for the pilgrim band-
A shelter in the time of storm.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
The raging storms may round us beat,
A shelter in the time of storm;

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
We'll never leave our safe retreat,
A shelter in the time of storm.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Mighty Rock in a weary land,
Cooling shade on the burning sand,

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Faithful guide for the pilgrim band-
A shelter in the time of storm.

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
O Rock divine, O Refuge dear,
A shelter in the time of storm;

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
Be Thou our helper ever near,
A shelter in the time of storm.

sections.label: Verse 15
sections.text:
Mighty Rock in a weary land,
Cooling shade on the burning sand,

sections.label: Verse 16
sections.text:
Faithful guide for the pilgrim band-
A shelter in the time of storm.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
How sweet are the tidings that greet the pilgrim’s ear,
As he wanders in exile from home!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Soon, soon will the Savior in glory appear,
And soon will His kingdom come.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
He’s coming, coming, coming soon I know,
Coming back to this earth to reign;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
And the weary pilgrims will to glory go,
When Jesus comes again.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
The mossy old graves where the pilgrims sleep
Shall be open as wide as before,

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
And the millions that sleep in the mighty deep
Shall live on this earth once more.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
There we’ll meet all our loved ones in Eden
Sweet songs of redemption we’ll sing;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
From the north, from the south, all the ransom'd shall come,
And worship our heavn'ly King.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Hallelujah, Amen! Hallelujah again!
In a little while we shall be there

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
O, be watchful, be hopeful, be joyful till then,
And a crown of bright glory we’ll wear.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
I am so glad that our Father in heaven
Tells of His love in the Book He has giv'n;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Wonderful things in the Bible I see,
This is the dearest, that Jesus loves me.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
I am so glad that Jesus loves me,
Jesus loves me, Jesus loves me;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
I am so glad that Jesus loves me,
Jesus loves even me.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Though I forget Him and wander away,
Still He doth love me wherever I stray;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Back to His dear loving arms would I flee,
When I remember that Jesus loves me.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
O, if there's only one song I can sing,
When in His beauty I see the great King,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
This shall my song in eternity be:
O, what a wonder that Jesus loves me!

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
We read of a place that’s called heaven,
It’s made for the pure and the free;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
These truths in God’s Word He hath given,
How beautiful heaven must be.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
How beautiful heaven must be,
Sweet home of the happy and free;

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Fair haven of rest for the weary,
How beautiful heaven must be.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
In heaven no drooping nor pining,
No wishing for elsewhere to be;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
God’s light is forever there shining,
How beautiful heaven must be.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Pure waters of life there are flowing,
And all who will drink may be free;

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Rare jewels of splendor are glowing,
How beautiful heaven must be.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
The angels so sweetly are singing,
Up there by the beautiful sea;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Sweet chords from their gold harps are ringing,
How beautiful heaven must be.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Ta loi est parfaite elle est juste, sainte et Bonne, 
mais sans toi Seigneur qu' est ce que je peux faire de bien

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Dans mon coeur Seigneur je prends plaisir a ta loi,
 pour L' accomplir j'ai besoin de ton assistance X2

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Tu veux que la vérité soit au fond du coeur, 
fais donc penetrer la sagesse au dedans de moi

sections.label: Chorus 2
sections.text:
Voici je suis Ne dans l' iniquite Seigneur,
 purifie moi avec L'hysope et je serai pur X2

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Dieu compatissant et misericordieux, 
Riche en bonte et lent a la colere

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Seigneur tu connais de quoi nous nous sommes formes 
ne nous traite pas salon nos iniquite X2

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
C'est par ta parole que tu transformas cette terre, 
je suis devant toi fais de meme avec mon ame

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Tu es le potier et moi je suis de l'argile, 
Dieu de mon salut faconne-moi a ton image X2

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Oh! Dieu cree en moi je te prie un coeur pur, 
renouvelle en moi un Esprit bien dispose

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Rends moi la joie de ton salut 
et qu'un Esprit de bonne volonte me soutienne, oh! Mon Rocher X2

title: POUR MOI CHRETIEN LA TERRE EST UN EXIL

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Pour moi chrétien, la terre est un exil ;
 Mais tout est bien, mais tout est bien.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Il faut marcher de péril en péril ;
 Mais tout est bien, mais tout est bien.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Pourquoi les pleurs, la terreur ou l'ennui ?
 Christ est à moi demain comme aujourd'hui ;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Au ciel bientôt je serai tout à lui.
 Oui, tout est bien, oui, tout est bien.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Larmes, travail, deuil, tristesse ici-bas ;
 Mais tout est bien, mais tout est bien.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
De Canaan j'approche à chaque pas ;
 Oui, tout est bien, oui, tout est bien.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
En vain le monde et son charme trompeur
 Dans ses liens veut retenir mon cœur ;

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
J'avance en paix, les yeux sur mon Sauveur.
 Oui, tout est bien, oui, tout est bien.

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Encore un jour, et j'atteindrai le but ;
 Oui, tout est bien, oui, tout est bien.

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Et je verrai le pays du salut ;
 Oui, tout est bien, oui, tout est bien.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Encore un jour, le monde va passer.
 O pèlerin, marche sans te lasser ;

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Bientôt en Dieu tu vas te reposer.
 Oui, tout est bien, oui tout est bien.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
LET GO AND LET GOD HAVE 
HIS WONDERFUL WAY,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
LET GO AND LET GOD HAVE HIS WAY
YOUR SORROW WILL VANISH,

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
YOUR NIGHT TURN TO DAY.
LET GO AND LET GOD HAVE HIS WAY.

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text: LET GO AND LET GOD HAVE HIS WAY

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Shine on me, Lord, shine on me,
Let the Light from the lighthouse shine on me. (x2)

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
He paid a debt He did not owe,
I owed a debt I could not pay,

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
I needed someone To wash my sins away;
And now I sing A brand new song,

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Amazing grace all day long,
Christ Jesus paid a debt That I could never pay.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
He paid a debt at Calvary,
He cleansed my soul and set me free,

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
I’m glad that Jesus did all my sins erase,
I now can sing a brand new song,

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Amazing grace all day long,
Christ Jesus paid a debt That I could never pay.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
One day He’s coming back for me,
To live with Him eternally,

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Won’t it be glory to see Him on that day!
I then will sing a brand new song,

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Amazing grace all day long
Christ Jesus paid a debt That I could never pay.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
(Akekho ofana noJesu
Akekho afana naye) (x2)

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Sazula zula Akekho, akekho
Safuna funa Akekho, akekho

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Sabekha bekha Akekho, akekho
Akekho ofana no Jesu.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Takwaba uwabanga Yesu (x3)
Takwaba takwakabe

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Naenda…enda, Konse, Konse
Nafwaya, Fwaya, Konse Konse

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Nashinguluka, Konse Konse
Takwaba Takwakabe.

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
Mokote akokani na Yesu,
Mokote akokani naye.

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Mokote akokani na Yesu,
Aza….azali te

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
Naluki….luki nionso, wapi
Na baloli nionso pamba

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Na Zunguluki nionso pamba
Aza….azali te.

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Hakuna Mungu kama wewe(x3)
Hakuna hakutakuwa.

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
Naenda…enda kote kote
Nimetafuta kote kote

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
Nimezunguka kote kote
Hakuna hakutakuwa.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
E’Yesu, sitausahau Uchungu wako ‘kubwa, 
Ulipoteswa Gethsemane Usiku peke yako.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Mateso uliyoyaona, Uchungu na machozi, 
(Usiku ule Gethsemane, Siyasahau kamwe.)(2x)

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Naona Wewe Gethsemane, Ulivyoteswa huko 
Kwa ‘jili ya makosa yangu, Na kuitoa damu.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Huzuni nyingi uliona Katika teso lako 
Ulipoachwa peke yako Na wanafunzi wako.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Na ukiona roho yangu Haina pendo kwako, 
Uniongoze Gethsemane, Nione teso lako!

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Mateso uliyoyaona, Uchungu na machozi, 
(Usiku ule Gethsemane, Siyasahau kamwe.)(2x)

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Kwetu ku di momwa mūlu, Mo mwikele Yesu
Ne bonso ba kwitabija E mo ba ka fika.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Yelusalema wa ndoe, Bamo ba pwa kala,
Ku fika bwabo bukila Bwa obe munonga.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Abo ba pwa ku funduka, Bendele kwa Leza,
Ne ku lumbuluka biya Kokwa ku tabuke.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Shi mobo etu a ngitu A bole mu lufu,
Tu di ne mobo a nyeke A mwa Yesu mūlu.

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Aye we tu fwila batwe. We toije mashi.
U ke tu lubula kokwa, Kwikalako nandji.

sections.label: Verse
sections.text:
Pendo la Mungu ni kubwa ,
pasha habari hizi;

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
pendo la Mungu nikubwa
 mwanzo wa nyimbo zote;

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
na malaika mbinguni 
walihubiri dunia ;

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
mutu wa zambi sikia , 
pendo la Mungu ni kubwa!

sections.label: Verse 5
sections.text:
Pendo kubwa ,pendo kubwa, 
Pendo kubwa ,pendo la Mungu ni kubwa!

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Pendo la Mungu ni kubwa 
kwako uliye mbali;

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
pendo la Mungu ni kubwa, 
yeye anakuita.

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
Toka kilima kalvari, 
tangu ku-umba dunia,

sections.label: Verse 9
sections.text:
limeonyesha hakika, 
pendo la Mungu ni kubwa !

sections.label: Verse 10
sections.text:
Pendo kubwa ,pendo kubwa, 
pendo kubwa ,pendo la Mungu ni kubwa!

sections.label: Verse 11
sections.text:
Pendo la Mungu ni kubwa, 
kutuletea raha;

sections.label: Verse 12
sections.text:
pendo la Mungu ni kubwa ,
tutafurahi sana.

sections.label: Verse 13
sections.text:
Tutakutana mbinguni 
na waliotangulia,

sections.label: Verse 14
sections.text:
na tutaimba pamoja :
 « pendo la Mungu ni kubwa. »

sections.label: Verse 15
sections.text:
Pendo kubwa ,pendo kubwa, 
pendo kubwa ,pendo la Mungu ni kubwa!

title: I WILL SING THE WONDROUS STORY
WHEN I GET TO THE END OF THE DAY
WHAT CAN WASH AWAY MY SIN?
HARK! A VOICE DIVIDES THE SKY
LORD DISMISS US WITH YOUR BLESSING
WHEN I SURVEY THE WONDROUS CROSS
PRAISE TO THE LORD, THE ALMIGHTY
HE THE PEARLY GATES WILL OPEN –G-
ON JORDAN’S STORMY BANK I STAND
I’M SO GLAD, JESUS LIFTED ME
THE DAY OF REDEMPTION IS NEAR
HOLD TO GOD’S UNCHANGING HAND A
MINE EYES HAVE SEEN THE GLORY Bb
I WILL SING THE WONDROUS STORY
WHEN I GET TO THE END OF THE DAY
WHAT CAN WASH AWAY MY SIN?
HARK! A VOICE DIVIDES THE SKY
LORD DISMISS US WITH YOUR BLESSING
WHEN I SURVEY THE WONDROUS CROSS
Take My Life and Let It Be
Pass Me Not, O Gentle Savior
More Love to Thee, O Christ
Jesus, Keep Me Near the Cross
Come Thou Fount of Every Blessing
'Tis So Sweet to Trust in Jesus

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
[D]Holy, holy, [G]holy! Lord [D]God Al[A]mighty!
[D]Early in the [A]morning our [D]song shall rise to [A]Thee;
[D]Holy, holy, [G]holy! [D]Merciful and [Bm]mighty!
[D]God in three [A]persons, [E7]blessed [A]Trinity!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
[D]Holy, holy, [G]holy! All the [D]saints a[A]dore Thee,
[D]Casting down their [A]golden crowns a[D]round the glassy [A]sea;
[D]Cherubim and [G]seraphim [D]falling down be[Bm]fore Thee,
[D]Who wert, and [A]art, and [E7]evermore shalt [A]be.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
[D]Holy, holy, [G]holy! Though the [D]darkness hide [A]Thee,
[D]Though the eye of [A]sinful man Thy [D]glory may not [A]see;
[D]Only Thou art [G]holy; there is [D]none beside [Bm]Thee,
[D]Perfect in [A]power, in [E7]love, and pu[A]rity.

title: All Hail the Power of Jesus' Name
Jesus Is All the World to Me
Savior, Like a Shepherd Lead Us

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
[G]All praise to Him who reigns a[C]bove
In [G]majesty su[D]preme,
[G]Who gave His Son for [C]man to die,
[G]That He might [D]man re[G]deem!

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
[G]Blessed be the name, blessed be the name,
[G]Blessed be the [D]name of the [D7]Lord!
[G]Blessed be the name, blessed be the name,
[G]Blessed be the [D]name of the [G]Lord!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
[G]His name above all [C]names shall stand,
Ex[G]alted more and [D]more,
[G]At God the Father's [C]own right hand,
[G]Where angel [D]hosts a[G]dore.

sections.label: Verse 1
Chorus
sections.text:
[G]Because He [C]lives, I can face to[G]morrow,
[G]Because He [Em]lives, all [A7]fear is [D]gone;
[G]Because I know [C]He holds the [G]future,
[G]And life is [C]worth the [G]living [D]just be[G]cause He lives!

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
[G]How sweet to hold a newborn [C]baby,
And [G]feel the pride and [D]joy He gives;
[G]But greater still the calm as[C]surance,
This [G]child can face un[D]certain days be[G]cause He lives!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
[G]And then one day I'll cross the [C]river,
I'll [G]fight life's final [D]war with pain;
[G]And then as death gives way to [C]victory,
I'll [G]see the lights of [D]glory and I'll [G]know He reigns!
